name: Michael Henry
subject: Not only is he declining a presidential salary…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF MICHAEL HENRY
body:
Not only is he declining a presidential salary...
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=00b49faf3f8a40b3ade7be2936e1919b&_e=99ATQSGjvc4mSK-7mfckL8opuQOMLx2dRKqts6ROXiITzKBAE1FS4Diy4JW8nrl6wC_hbhbZA1XOk96PXvee6HHnb1DWj7k8NPvIPFWt_Wf3cfrhnzXnMXvEiYxRUzJkjPWNDjDYKZVJKETih3yJiqSBNx8QlX5YWwqRglEGS4G46u1IMIdwLvDM8cOrkxDZhnlYgwEa6LzuGCjxo-fnoHHxXThp_ej4YUKWr4SwU1NlgON0-N1ziSnKs3GMQ3ODdM7lHt6doygpcJFUVOw0EZ0oLdCJRq47lA1ZNVF64g7HHksQ0sf-FMJhrAcSBy-s0AoKe9gAVuwKdUBw9dXlVxWEzHRm6u9xzt9F0RBGhIV242fsPtNPG-YwpT2XRA3N)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump decided to TURN DOWN his $400,000 annual salary as President of the United States.
---
Most Americans see this as an honorable sacrifice and as an act of good faith to put our _country_ FIRST.
---
_But the same cannot be said of New York’s Attorney General, Tish James, who is continuing to wage legal warfare against President Trump and put politics before our country._
---
**On top of foregoing his salary, President Trump will ALSO incur a _DAILY_ FINE of $112,000 at the hands of Attorney General Tish James.**
---
In other words, it will cost President Trump $112,000 per day to serve as President – all because Tish James has weaponized the Office of Attorney General.
---
**That’s why I’m running to FIRE Tish James and lead as an Attorney General whose sole mission is to uphold the law.**
---
_But with President Trump now sworn in, we cannot wait until my own inauguration as Attorney General. We have to fight back against this lawfare right now._
---
So, every day that President Trump is required to pay $112,000, I’m asking **112,000 grassroots Americans** to sign my campaign’s [**OFFICIAL GRASSROOTS PETITION**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=00b49faf3f8a40b3ade7be2936e1919b&_e=99ATQSGjvc4mSK-7mfckL8opuQOMLx2dRKqts6ROXiITzKBAE1FS4Diy4JW8nrl6wC_hbhbZA1XOk96PXvee6HHnb1DWj7k8NPvIPFWt_Wf3cfrhnzXnMXvEiYxRUzJkjPWNDjDYKZVJKETih3yJiqSBNx8QlX5YWwqRglEGS4G46u1IMIdwLvDM8cOrkxDZhnlYgwEa6LzuGCjxo-fnoHHxXThp_ej4YUKWr4SwU1OTbEh8cDZ7jdaWq5cQCTRa_O8k9ghouPHOcDJuVLCMDCR1B93WYLNgrOLQtiSSAQU0lpbiE065nMYThBML4UPLMx27awPvdHFr455PjfvnSEwUSJUfheK2e9vP8fuujsWDSCP7O7O_94KKvCz2rvg1) demanding an END to this unjust, politically-motivated witch hunt.
---
[**Please add your name to sign my official “112,000-Patriot Petition” DEMANDING an END to Tish James’ witch hunt intended to bleed the 47th President dry.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=00b49faf3f8a40b3ade7be2936e1919b&_e=99ATQSGjvc4mSK-7mfckL8opuQOMLx2dRKqts6ROXiITzKBAE1FS4Diy4JW8nrl6wC_hbhbZA1XOk96PXvee6HHnb1DWj7k8NPvIPFWt_Wf3cfrhnzXnMXvEiYxRUzJkjPWNDjDYKZVJKETih3yJiqSBNx8QlX5YWwqRglEGS4G46u1IMIdwLvDM8cOrkxDZhnlYgwEa6LzuGCjxo-fnoHHxXThp_ej4YUKWr4SwU1NORv0HAOQ4zsAxe6wXO9mZ96ZSb8p2zpeIUD0p1CblU64FVWTQhjibqZnKPguCFw_SlH7EXk4wroaD9Qsl9Z49Gz2j4y_OaxesoiR5yhoW9ygSfdxWp7itSV8QbBkq-pzzsW4p4nb7PbFUh7xNzUXt)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=00b49faf3f8a40b3ade7be2936e1919b&_e=99ATQSGjvc4mSK-7mfckL8opuQOMLx2dRKqts6ROXiITzKBAE1FS4Diy4JW8nrl6wC_hbhbZA1XOk96PXvee6HHnb1DWj7k8NPvIPFWt_Wf3cfrhnzXnMXvEiYxRUzJkjPWNDjDYKZVJKETih3yJiqSBNx8QlX5YWwqRglEGS4G46u1IMIdwLvDM8cOrkxDZhnlYgwEa6LzuGCjxo-fnoHHxXThp_ej4YUKWr4SwU1NzjQDKkHqw_rVLcuuLlCEMK5SwG6fOBtsbB1dl-XUoILV55-elcJ58tfj_ADwpCIp66MqrDZ2T4UkKCOydvdszmO1DpmOlF-x4Mr_zf0e3d6N00bN6vbEqcqbCSJU_goQ8r_V-_LioOdfsdRcbIqFi)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=48c4ee5612044cb6890f29d142e3f269&_e=FtabNlOc2tVCJNwu2tjmnJ2UJyqMgNS5krFPoCBov8YOOei-afMxVSdPhPrQEo-nxOkd1Cf_kB8xXama6nI91jR9u-YLFPnyiQu0pcIR-29Y_QFNLKTaqF-pE5qtPJKv3co-lglb-GhATwfWyjVaRvt1XUU0rmlngMmj2wFbWl_vSaOBha0Vwopv9E33N9-kEGoopX2F5U8GSgZIawdTF9gBlvsHVonaHQaT__2AllTgn6oqmQIrq6LdhsWss5J7LKABJ3IHvTbtb_TKNB_lS2EOJZ1QuEatbDpCxcQzk3RzS7qmgZT3sXZcQaVBeXGA9DPWB_cqelBw3GLKjxQT5dCXYS6Ua-fuFtfEB0ajEHAUYaJb8MCHUZw2yzr8L2RK)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=48c4ee5612044cb6890f29d142e3f269&_e=FtabNlOc2tVCJNwu2tjmnJ2UJyqMgNS5krFPoCBov8YOOei-afMxVSdPhPrQEo-nxOkd1Cf_kB8xXama6nI91jR9u-YLFPnyiQu0pcIR-29Y_QFNLKTaqF-pE5qtPJKv3co-lglb-GhATwfWyjVaRvt1XUU0rmlngMmj2wFbWl_vSaOBha0Vwopv9E33N9-kEGoopX2F5U8GSgZIawdTF9gBlvsHVonaHQaT__2AllR83Uc6gjLWbZCm1mRLvk-JVD_5-6NwleAqcwtLatF57vsZq_eAECOh24pj716GsmqUFkypZ6EJ3fmDx4lFlUEc6VF10ELGO5ExHzlnIkvcqUtt9sUOPa0Aea9qazlupvrwt57g76vgFTAQUJqdBzcJ)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.

>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=48c4ee5612044cb6890f29d142e3f269&_e=FtabNlOc2tVCJNwu2tjmnJ2UJyqMgNS5krFPoCBov8YOOei-afMxVSdPhPrQEo-nxOkd1Cf_kB8xXama6nI91jR9u-YLFPnyiQu0pcIR-29Y_QFNLKTaqF-pE5qtPJKv3co-lglb-GhATwfWyjVaRvt1XUU0rmlngMmj2wFbWl_vSaOBha0Vwopv9E33N9-kEGoopX2F5U8GSgZIawdTF9gBlvsHVonaHQaT__2AllTmNQhoWjcfBL-awJRiJQQrf25FX2fLiq5Hu2r0D_3F5dV2jgEaKN22OxtsyeNqHoNns9Kzn4bzu1jrtPMVtIh7zVRpMkC-x6GZ-Xafs8Z19y7ULga7xyqXD4ohyhK8YdEEIXZHwK7XYw17w4sxeH6Q) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=48c4ee5612044cb6890f29d142e3f269&_e=FtabNlOc2tVCJNwu2tjmnJ2UJyqMgNS5krFPoCBov8YOOei-afMxVSdPhPrQEo-nxOkd1Cf_kB8xXama6nI91jR9u-YLFPnyiQu0pcIR-29Y_QFNLKTaqF-pE5qtPJKv3co-lglb-GhATwfWyjVaRvt1XUU0rmlngMmj2wFbWl_vSaOBha0Vwopv9E33N9-kEGoopX2F5U8GSgZIawdTF9gBlvsHVonaHQaT__2AllSqMKYU_lqo8m3hQDYnos87NE2YhbUaIF-dz0_QPpoIdPqnnhxE6NzvlG0wn1QNHtYLZsIsQIoycfHnI5mM7iJsD_aNikyk_snPAxHCKhFuwXj28379A3kmSWh9OKw-HV2Z8OxROKR5Bv-t4JMMc_gf)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=48c4ee5612044cb6890f29d142e3f269&_e=FtabNlOc2tVCJNwu2tjmnJ2UJyqMgNS5krFPoCBov8YOOei-afMxVSdPhPrQEo-nxOkd1Cf_kB8xXama6nI91jR9u-YLFPnyiQu0pcIR-29Y_QFNLKTaqF-pE5qtPJKv3co-lglb-GhATwfWyjVaRvt1XUU0rmlngMmj2wFbWl_vSaOBha0Vwopv9E33N9-kEGoopX2F5U8GSgZIawdTF9gBlvsHVonaHQaT__2AllTtgq3jpfqj8f0ysBUq8mWUtK_7qzgIkaSD8H8CAS35VhoKdhvfRTBcEcUdRepB28B2UorTuqB_zc8ZRbTlqDlXlO8ARkuLwsynFzl_ua2OHpOErvJZNRv0EQjAnpPFByXyhrgY33XWG-teI7dlWcaL)** There's no time to waste. ---
|
---
Team,

I’m overwhelmed with gratitude. **Because of your support, we just WON our primary making me the OFFICIAL Democratic Nominee in FL-06.**

This victory wouldn’t have been possible without the grassroots energy that powered our campaign, and I am so incredibly thankful for every person who believed in me and this movement.

But now, the real fight begins.

|
---
**[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us take on Trump’s hand-picked MAGA crony, Randy Fine, in the general election? Every dollar is going to be critical in these next 80 days.](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MjczMzk2NTI5MjAyNzMwLFwiclwiOjE0NTI3MzQ1MzMwMjI1MzUyNn0iLCJzIjoiYTlhMGM3MzA0OWM2NTk2ZSJ9)**
|
---
| | [ Donate now >> ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MjczMzk2NTMyMzQ4NDU5LFwiclwiOjE0NTI3MzQ1MzMwMjI1MzUyNn0iLCJzIjoiYjU4NzdiZGM5YzEzNTViZCJ9)
---
|
---
_Nobody expected a public school teacher to achieve this._ But we did it with the help of people like you who know what’s at stake.
And now, we’re taking on Trump’s handpicked crony, Randy Fine. We’re going to beat him, stop MAGA extremism in its tracks, and flip this seat into Democratic hands.

Momentum is on our side, but we need to keep it up. The next 60 days will decide the future of Florida’s 6th District. With Trump’s agenda at stake, the MAGA machine will stop at nothing to crush us.

subject: Join the Movement to Protect Women’s Rights
body:
Making Women Female Again
| Friend, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. **_Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet!_**
However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front.
President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Friend. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. **Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights.** This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world.
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Your gift of $50, $100, or even more can empower us to continue our vital mission.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e23dd8fca1ef4423ab0f844856302902&_e=ABx2EBsEVA38oWeuBbgxEG0kTPOF7fjR2yXRNwP8lrdBrBoRhnZnzKziwrjEoxt0UzN8OcrqSlkqcxlr1-81rwsSFz_x0lNoE_X3m-TgPkRyqO26kzVOTWcyNOxpJ7AIHhJvwxlxNQT0x4i9ifDDdF-oW3RI5hg5a6Z3bk2KhlQGS95iByCOCEw3A_uR6oRPwZfoLum1VMU4dHcBBB2TLEH1ZsXZd4eBzWRt0BAcg50iTtpnIOFlSH-7Xv7csUFJ1Boz9naRjZkYwoD0o8kuHlK4cAiF-P2jijWVZHmG6TSYDqrRs1rrwGCFtbiKOIW_NsUBqLMjRUSu4km78xPx_KzyjciC2ESDtcv_faVXbiT2wrokAiohO3hc2v--IkN3IbWbZLNw9aOFmQy-AxHfyg%3D%3D) Your support is essential in this fight. Contributions help us fund initiatives, organize events, and promote awareness about the challenges women face today. Together, you and I can amplify our message and reach more people than ever before. Don’t miss the chance to be part of this vital movement. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute

name: Voter Action Project
subject: You can be sure they'll try this nationwide
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The mantra of the vote suppressors must be "if you can't beat 'em," Team, "just try and get their votes thrown out".
This may be happening in North Carolina but it's a problem everywhere. As Republican Justice Richard Dietz said in his scathing dissent, joining his lone Democratic colleague: “ the timing of Griffin’s claims speaks volumes about their substance. By waiting until after the votes were cast and the results tallied, Griffin seeks to retroactively rewrite the rules of the election to tilt the playing field in his favor .”
In other words: The challenger's campaign only sued to get these votes tossed because he lost.
This isn't about false claims of "election integrity" or whatever buzzwords opponents of voting rights use, this is blatant retroactive voter suppression. RUSH $25 or more today to stop vengeful partisans from wrongfully silencing these voters, flipping this election, and more >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020225_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_3&amount=25]
NC Newsline: Republicans on the NC Supreme Court block certification of the Democratic incumbent’s election [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020225_3&amount=25]
This case is still going on in North Carolina, Team, and we have to spread the word because the media is ignoring election theft in plain sight.
The North Carolina state Supreme Court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court , which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties.
For background: On Election Day, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead.
Now Judge Griffin has sued to remove 60,000 voters' ballots from the count , even though they've been validated in the recount. The state Board of Elections dismissed his request , but now his partisan, would-be colleagues -- the court has a 5-2 Republican majority -- have stepped in to adjudicate the election and possibly kick off one of their own.
Justices Anita Earls (D) and Richard Dietz (R) dissented while Justice Riggs properly recused herself, so the judicial stay on election certification was put in place by a 4-2, mainly party-line vote.
The bottom line is that the partisan Supreme Court is stepping into an election for one of their own members to try and reverse the results of the vote because their party didn't win. Opponents of voting rights are trying to steal this election in plain sight.
We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and defend these votes in North Carolina and so many other votes across the country? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020225_3&amount=25]

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_3&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_3&amount=25]

name: Sarah w/ ParentsTogether
subject: Petition: Stop grocery price hikes
body:
The top two grocery chains in the US are planning to merge - let’s stop it before there’s a grocery monopoly! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=7e921d898f&i=*|ITERATION_UNIQUE_ID|*&u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=6e9c1b187d)
---
| | Hi Peter, Every time I go grocery shopping I’m shocked by the skyrocketing prices – the price of eggs has DOUBLED and meat, cereal, and baked goods aren’t cheap either! Things could get even worse because grocery giants Kroger and Albertsons have announced their plans to merge, which experts say will cause even HIGHER prices. This merger will be the biggest grocery store merger EVER! The Senate has already grilled the Kroger and Albertsons CEOs at a special hearing, and the Federal Trade Commission has issued two requests for information from Kroger on its $24.6 billion deal to acquire Albertsons. Kroger had initially planned for the merger to start in early 2024, but federal regulators have the power to block the merger by enforcing antitrust laws. The merger will undermine competition, eliminate jobs, and result in payouts for wealthy shareholders **– all while driving up grocery prices for families like ours.** The Federal Trade Commission launched an investigation to see if this breaks federal laws.**If families build on this momentum to speak out and raise the pressure – together we can STOP the merger!**
---
|
#### **Will you sign my petition to prevent a grocery monopoly?**
---
| | [Sign the petition](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=5b5740feae&e=7e921d898f&i=0817c34904 "Sign the petition")
---
| Kroger and Albertsons are the two largest grocery companies in the country. If their proposed merger succeeds, their new company along with corporate giant Walmart would control more than 70% of the market in 167 different cities, and 90% of some local markets! Prices have already skyrocketed after COVID-19 and inflation has been used by CEOs to hike prices while earning record profits and shareholder payouts. It’s clear that the Kroger-Albertsons merger would lead to unprecedented price increases, while families are struggling to make ends meet. On top of the FTC investigation, just this week a group of consumers filed a federal antitrust lawsuit to block the merger! The suit argues that the merger will result in higher prices, lost jobs, and reduced competition. Together we can add to the pressure and tell the government families need prices to go down – not up! [Sign my petition telling the FTC to stop this harmful merger!](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=6cd51d79e7&e=7e921d898f&i=0817c34904)
---
| Thanks so much, **Sarah w/ ParentsTogether**

On top of the FTC investigation, just this week a group of consumers filed a federal antitrust lawsuit to block the merger! The suit argues that the merger will result in higher prices, lost jobs, and reduced competition. Together we can add to the pressure and tell the government families need prices to go down – not up! | Thanks so much, Sarah w/ ParentsTogether | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | mailto:advocacy@parents-together.org | mailto:advocacy@parents-together.org ---|--- | Regular actions and updates to support families and help them thrive. Copyright © 2025 ParentsTogether Action, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1629 K St. NW Suite 300, Washington, DC 20006 to a friend. Not subscribed? . We don't want to see you go! But if you need to, you can .

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Did you see Mark Warner question Tulsi Gabbard?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
You might have missed it, Derek, but last week in the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, Mark Warner questioned Tulsi Gabbard, Donald Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence.
And I have to say, he did a stellar job – but before I dive into the details, I’m asking if you can pitch in anything you can, split between Mark’s re-election campaign and my Common Ground PAC, to let him know how much we appreciate his work in Washington getting the truth from Trump’s nominees [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner] .
In the hearing, Mark talked a lot about trust.
He said there’s no legal requirement for allies to share intel with us – it’s all predicated on trust – trust that our allies will protect each other’s secrets.
He pointed out that Gabbard has repeatedly excused our adversaries for their worst actions and instead blamed them on the U.S. and those very allies. Mark begs an important question: Can Gabbard develop the trust necessary to give our allies confidence that they can share their intelligence? Because if they stop, our country will be less safe.
Now, I’m not on the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence so I didn’t question Gabbard.
But you know that I would never vote to confirm someone that the American people can’t trust. And what I know is that you can trust Senator Warner to always have the best interests of all Virginians and Americans at heart.
Mark is on the ballot in 2026, and I know it would mean a lot to him if you showed support for his re-election campaign. Will you split a $5 donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Much appreciated,
Tim Kaine
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101443098/526004206/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTM3MDY5Ny1kMmUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImbcY8fNR2N0g1d5raxuihcDHYnsMmDorTsE5AoNwZs=)
We’ll be blunt, friend. Donald Trump’s first few weeks in office have been a disaster for democracy and for the rule of law. We saw sweeping pardons for Jan. 6 insurrectionists. We watched his administration try to subvert the 14th Amendment by putting an end to birthright citizenship. **Now, the Department of Justice just put a freeze on _all_ ongoing and new civil rights cases: ** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101443099/526004207/-729519538?refcode=em-2.2.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTM3MDY5Ny1kMmUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImbcY8fNR2N0g1d5raxuihcDHYnsMmDorTsE5AoNwZs=) **Justice Department issues freeze for civil rights division**
---
As one civil rights attorney put it, they’re effectively trying to “eradicate civil rights” protections and abandon any progress for the next four years.
Donald Trump and his allies are sending a dangerous message that discrimination and injustice _will_ be tolerated, if not encouraged.
**There’s no doubt this decision will result in a flurry of lawsuits, and holding Trump and his administration accountable will play out in the courtroom.**
[**That’s why we’re asking you to make an urgent $3 donation to the DASS Legal Fund today. | Brace yourself: From pardoning the cop-beating January 6 insurrectionists to rolling back countless civil rights policies and smearing any Democrat who dares call him out, **Donald Trump’s revenge tour is in full swing — and we know the stakes are only going to get higher from here.** Kash Patel (yes, the self-appointed “Secretary of Retribution”) has even **_singled me out_** as one of Trump’s top enemies. Why? _Because I stood up to the MAGA chaos, corruption, and lies_. **This isn’t my first rodeo with MAGA attacks**. Back in 2017, Trump’s DOJ _spied on me_ — digging through my phone records, emails, and who knows what else. What did they find? _Absolutely nothing_. MAGA Republicans are more unhinged than ever — and this time, they want to dismantle democracy altogether. **_They’re already laying the groundwork_**. clean_body: Brace yourself: | | Brace yourself: From pardoning the cop-beating January 6 insurrectionists to rolling back countless civil rights policies and smearing any Democrat who dares call him out, Donald Trump’s revenge tour is in full swing — and we know the stakes are only going to get higher from here. Kash Patel (yes, the self-appointed “Secretary of Retribution”) has even singled me out as one of Trump’s top enemies. Why? Because I stood up to the MAGA chaos, corruption, and lies. This isn’t my first rodeo with MAGA attacks. Back in 2017, Trump’s DOJ spied on me — digging through my phone records, emails, and who knows what else. What did they find? Absolutely nothing. MAGA Republicans are more unhinged than ever — and this time, they want to dismantle democracy altogether. They’re already laying the groundwork. Here’s the deal: I’m not scared of these bullies. I won’t be intimidated, and I sure as hell won’t back down. But I do need your help to fight back. = = = = = = This isn’t about me. It’s about stopping a dangerous MAGA agenda that threatens our democracy. Standing strong together, \- Eric | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. ### Ken Martin is our new DNC Chair
Ken Martin is our new DNC Chair, as of Feb 1, 2025.
In his acceptance speech, Martin reminded us of the song made famous by Pete Seeger in the 1940s, "[Which Side Are You On](https://substack.com/redirect/3e4aa95e-28ff-4022-80c8-ada0c36ad038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?". That song became a pro-union rallying call for labor unions well into the 1970s.
### I remain hopeful that I will be the nominee for the NY-21 Special Election
If we haven't met, I'm Paula Collins, a Democrat from St. Lawrence County in upstate New York. I ran for Congress against Elise Stefanik in November 2024. I remain hopeful that the 15 county party chairs will give me the nod to be the nominee in the Special Election, which will be announced within 10 days of Stefanik's resignation from Congress. There is some speculation that the [NY legislature in Albany will make a slight change to elections law](https://substack.com/redirect/f0822efb-ce6b-4df9-9395-bfed6d51dd8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) regarding other aspects of the timing of the Special Election. We know that all of the action will start soon. I hope to be the Democrat on the ballot. Stay tuned.
### Why I am going to Congress
I'm going to Congress to fight for everyday Americans' ability to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof overhead.
There is a razor-thin margin in the House right now, and every vote counts. Republicans may have the majority, but they still have to have at least a few votes from Democrats to pass legislation.
Now here's where it gets really dicey. And here's where I really need to tell you which side I'm on.
### ICYMI there was a coup last weekend in Washington DC
While Democrats were convening their winter meeting in Maryland, the Trump administration moved aggressively to seize power and overstep the authority granted to the Executive Branch of government in the U.S. Constitution.
To put it bluntly, over the weekend, there was a coup in Washington DC.
Webster's Dictionary defines the word "coup" as ["a sudden, often violent, and illegal seizure of power by a small group of people."](https://substack.com/redirect/210bf182-df5d-4d07-922d-e9fd1df046c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) We did not see violence over the weekend of January 31 - February 2, 2025. Some have linked the violence on January 6, 2021 to the events of the past weekend. Others think of the families of passengers of the two plane crashes that occurred over the weekend. Lives were lost through direct or indirect action (or omission) by our government laying off vital FAA employees such as air traffic controllers.
### I'm not the only one calling it a "coup"
Note that I am not alone in calling the current situation a "coup". Robert Hubbell's Substack article, "[Call it by its name: a coup](https://substack.com/redirect/f063b2c7-6e97-42c1-984c-0585a4f65694?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)", on Feb 1, 2025 was the first mention that caught my eye. I admire Hubbell. Having him call it a coup gave me permission to say out loud that which I had been thinking.
Whatever you call it, the last few days have seen a dizzying number of headlines, none of which fit the norm of what we normally see at this time of year, which is usually news of snow, groundhogs, and Superbowl.
The "coup" that I'm talking about is the [takeover of the U.S. Treasury's payment systems by Elon Musk](https://substack.com/redirect/deffa0d4-094b-4969-87a3-73220eb2507c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Musk is not joining a group of federal employees who have been vetted and background-checked. Not at all. [He is bringing his own group of four very young, inexperienced tech wonks](https://substack.com/redirect/9249a898-c425-4937-b1c2-3d1ce2deaafb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who are not in any way accountable to the government or to the taxpayers.
By the way, Musk's work in financial services is not the only tech-driven coup. In a not-widely-mentioned deal with Open AI and U.S. Government nuclear security, Sam Altman is now tasked with "reducing the risk of nuclear war and securing nuclear materials and weapons worldwide." Source: [Victor Tangermann, Futurism, Jan 31, 2025.](https://substack.com/redirect/88c6b2f6-0a6f-46ca-9dbf-4000e87acbc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In case you missed that in all the news over the weekend, here is a little more:
> ...Altman has also fully embraced president Donald Trump, [gifting him $1 million](https://substack.com/redirect/ab062ee0-b9d4-441f-a816-39ec557ea4aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)for his inauguration and [claiming](https://substack.com/redirect/7a2c3aa8-7576-4b51-ba77-37e76f25b0b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that he had "really changed my perspective on him" after [trashing him in years past](https://substack.com/redirect/4cec762d-ff44-445f-b246-34d6b066b10f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...OpenAI also signed onto Trump's [$500 billion AI infrastructure deal](https://substack.com/redirect/df7c63ae-40c5-40b8-8226-a12dafe0c28a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), dubbed Stargate, with the plan of contributing tens of billions of dollars within the next year. Source: [Victor Tangermann, Futurism, Jan 31, 2025.](https://substack.com/redirect/88c6b2f6-0a6f-46ca-9dbf-4000e87acbc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
These bold moves are in the same headwind in which federal grants and payments to non-profits and systems such as Medicare were abruptly shut off ([some were restored by action filed in federal court by several states attorneys general](https://substack.com/redirect/0134112b-7762-4cb1-a0c9-0de0bdc010f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). DOJ prosecutors who worked on the January 6 [prosecutions were fired.](https://substack.com/redirect/dd0dbed5-620b-4bc5-b1c9-408e175f9fa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump ordered senior FBI officials whom he considered not loyal to [resign, retire, or be fired.](https://substack.com/redirect/9a627f0f-2bcf-4463-9759-f48ad3fa999b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Field offices in several major cities [were also emptied out](https://substack.com/redirect/c57ef44f-c44f-436d-bcc0-189ece079e7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Thousands of government websites were taken down](https://substack.com/redirect/3ac8bf95-0bcb-4c53-9037-e2005ce8eaed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), blocking access to information in the name of purging mention of diversity, equity and inclusion. And [mainstream media outlets will be "rotated out" of workstations at the Pentagon](https://substack.com/redirect/87daca2c-1972-4e0b-9a50-def5926db6c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
On Tuesday, our [trade war with allies Canada and Mexico will kick in](https://substack.com/redirect/65eeea5b-816a-4b20-94f9-4f0a8d6791cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in a move that will surely raise the price of everyday goods such as heating oil, electricity, and gas through tariffs imposed by the Trump government and then retaliatory tariffs imposed by Canada and Mexico.
### Which side am I on in this new administration?
### Very simple: I'm on the side of the Constitution.
When I campaigned in the General Election, the voters of NY-21 told me that they wanted an immigration bill to get through Congress to stop the illegal crossings in upstate New York. We had such a [bill with bipartisan support](https://substack.com/redirect/151e37d3-7063-47d3-8ae0-b3def8e62391?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that provided for a pathway for small businesses to provide work visas to newly-arriving immigrants, and have more judges to conduct asylum petition hearings, and more enforcement in the Swanton Sector. Instead, we now have [border crossings for only 12 hours - not 24 hours](https://substack.com/redirect/81bc80d0-625b-4209-9af5-3b90c6cc5fe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - at many stations, and the [threat of raids by ICE has many farm workers terrified to go to work](https://substack.com/redirect/69774015-78c4-4b68-88e0-d00d1c69b2d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I'm on the side of the some 274,000 Medicaid recipients right here in NY-21 who don't know if they get sick or need to go in for treatment whether they have healthcare coverage or not. They are lonely and they are afraid. I'm on their side.
I'm on the side of the [many confused federal employees who got a buyout plan](https://substack.com/redirect/6c4830a7-3623-49eb-812d-e34a875fe421?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the Trump government last week, offering them 8 months of pay and the directive to go find another job - regardless of the fact that they dearly love their federal job and they took an oath to protect and preserve the United States Constitution. Again, they are lonely and afraid. Suppose there is no job for them anywhere after their buyout money is gone?
I'm on the side of the voters who told me in November that they were worried about the cost of groceries. And ya know what - eggs have gotten a LOT more expensive lately, and that's if you can find them. I'm on the side of those families who agonize over the cost of groceries.
### As we head into the Special Election, and as we look beyond to the midterms, I can tell you that as a solidly middle class mom who raised her child alone, and who is a proud, card-carrying member of the teacher's union, I'm on the side of the people who, like me, just want to be able to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over my head.
I'm not on the side of the billionaires. I'm not in the group of politicians who have sworn loyalty to the policies and practices of President Donald Trump.
I'm on the side of everyday people who just want to see our country work - work together - and work for the good of the everyday people.
So I ask you today - which side are you on?

| | The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. And meanwhile? **You and your cash could be caught in the crossfire. ** But there’s a way to prepare. A move many people might not know exists. And you’ll be glad once you see it. Because when Elon Musk saw the national debt, he said "This amounts to over $106k per person in America." But then he nailed it: “Terrifying.” And it’s obvious, right? Unchecked government spending likely leads to consequences for everyone. [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd1af2j27ru9nn7gpi08sfd2f40frfjadvks4j0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sljm9pb4clh2bs) Here’s why: many might not realize how these decisions could ripple through their finances. The rising debt isn’t just numbers on a screen—it’s a slow erosion of buying power, savings, and future plans. But there’s a way to potentially step outside the chaos and regain control. Within the IRS code is an obscure provision... one that might not make sense unless you understood what it really means. But the important part? This IRS provision — [**a loophole, if you will**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo1h5rjsb317aafnivnqhu41fkio9hpe842i02eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sljm9pb4clh2bs) — could help you protect your wealth from inflation and market uncertainty. It’s straightforward, and might be a way to help build financial confidence for years to come. name: WiFi Spy Cam
subject: Unveiling The WiFi Spy Cam: The Pocket-Sized Surveillance Camera
body:
Gunner Gear is thrilled to present our latest addition...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20143/6374453/268c28a597c3ccba240b6273a8fa9bdaa1a93f56/044c6fe7154591bc4a34d005bc421aa9a1daa9e3)
---
| | |
---
_February 3rd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Hello Reader, Are you in search of a state-of-the-art camera that offers discreet surveillance, high-quality footage, and WiFi Compatibility? Look no further! Gunner Gear is thrilled to present our latest addition: **The WiFi Spy Cam**. **Pocket-Sized Powerhouse** : Gone are the days when surveillance cameras were bulky and noticeable. Our WiFi Spy Cam is designed to fit snugly in your pocket. It's WiFi-enabled and crafted for discretion, ensuring that you have the power of surveillance right at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere. **Crystal-Clear, Day & Night**: With full HD imaging, an expansive 170° field of view, and night vision capabilities, you can trust the Spy Cam to capture every detail with unmatched precision. Whether it's daytime or nighttime, you'll never miss a moment. Stay connected to your home from anywhere with the WiFi-enabled Spy Cam. Designed for seamless remote monitoring, this compact device lets you keep an eye on what matters most in real time. Whether you’re at work, on vacation, or just in another room, its WiFi capabilities ensure you’re always in control. **Special Launch Offer!** : Because we appreciate you, we're giving our loyal customers an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to own the Spy Cam. [Order now and get a whopping 50% off!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20143/6374453/1c99aa3629ac2915815834848472cc7a069785e6/044c6fe7154591bc4a34d005bc421aa9a1daa9e3) This offer won't last long, so don’t miss out. The WiFi Spy Cam is more than just a camera; it's a testament to the future of surveillance. Whether you’re safeguarding your home, capturing life's moments, or looking after your valuables, we've got you covered. Upgrade your surveillance game with the WiFi Spy Cam, and embrace the future of security, today. [Order the WiFi Spy Cam Now & Save 50%](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20143/6374453/1c99aa3629ac2915815834848472cc7a069785e6/044c6fe7154591bc4a34d005bc421aa9a1daa9e3) **Best regards,

~John, _GunnerGear.com_** _**Disclaimer:** Please use the WifI Spy Cam responsibly and ensure that you respect privacy laws and regulations in your region._
---

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: A Historic Crackdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friend, President Trump signed the Laken Riley Act into law. This is a historic step in the crackdown on illegal immigration and the crime and violence caused by Joe Biden’s open border policy.

| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1XRziNH1jvYwbHLEInGh)
---
| | | Friend,
President Trump signed the Laken Riley Act into law.
This is a historic step in the crackdown on illegal immigration and the crime and violence caused by Joe Biden’s open border policy.
---
[JOIN THE FIGHT →](https://nicolemalliotakis.emlnk9.com/lt.php?x=3DZy~GE6J3ea5HV._g5GWOdw16IkudAkj~ZkYnfEKaHOEKBAyEy.0OFs1XRziNH1jvYwbHLEInGi)

| | | Named after nursing student Laken Riley, who was killed by an illegal immigrant from Venezuela who was released under New York bail and sanctuary law, this federal law allows illegal immigrants charged with theft or violent crimes to be detained and deported before standing trial.
**This will be a powerful new tool for the Trump Administrations to use to apprehend and remove criminals from our country and keep our communities safe.**
**As your voice in Congress, I was proud to vote for the Laken Riley Act and I applaud President Trump for signing it into law.**

subject: MassGOP Blasts Healey-Driscoll Administration’s “Municipal Taxation Act” as a Backdoor Tax Hike on Massachusetts Families

---
|
### MassGOP Blasts Healey-Driscoll Administration's "Municipal Taxation Act" as a Backdoor Tax Hike on Massachusetts Families
---
---
| Boston, MA -The Massachusetts Republican Party strongly opposes the Healey-Driscoll Administration's refiled Municipal Empowerment Act, more accurately dubbed the Municipal Taxation Act, which would give cities and towns the power to impose additional taxes on meals, hotel stays, and car ownership. If passed, this legislation would allow municipalities to slap an excise tax surcharge of up to 5% on vehicle owners, directly targeting working families who rely on their cars for daily necessities.
"These tax increases are nothing more than a state level backdoor tax increase to extract even more money from hardworking Massachusetts families and small businesses," said MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale. "Parents need cars to pick up groceries, drive their kids to school, and get to work. Instead of finding real solutions to our state's financial issues, top Democrats are deliberately making car ownership more expensive to push people onto a failing public transit system. It's a blatant cash grab that will make life even harder for residents."
The proposed hikes on the meal and hotel taxes will devastate small businesses in municipalities that adopt these tax increases--particularly local restaurants and family-owned hotels that are already struggling with inflation and rising costs. These taxes will make the simple joy of a night out for dinner even more expensive for Massachusetts families and discourage tourism, further hurting businesses that rely on visitors for revenue.
"Raising the meal tax is an attack on the small restaurants and diners that are the backbone of our local economy," Carnevale said. "For many families, going out to eat is already becoming a luxury. This proposal will make it even harder for working-class residents to enjoy a night out while small business owners suffer from reduced customer traffic."
The added tax on hotel stays will also hurt Massachusetts' tourism and hospitality industry, "Instead of supporting our small businesses, Democrats are making it more expensive to attract customers. This will force many mom-and-pop establishments to either raise prices or shut their doors for good," Carnevale added.
Massachusetts already has one of the highest tax burdens in the nation, yet the Healey-Driscoll Administration continues to mismanage billions of taxpayer dollars--whether it's reckless spending on the ongoing migrant crisis or wasteful government initiatives. Instead of squeezing residents for more money, the state should reallocate existing funds to support municipalities directly, allowing local governments to make decisions based on their community's needs.
"Massachusetts residents are already overtaxed," Carnevale continued. "Before Democrats ask residents to fork over even more of their hard-earned money, they should take a hard look at their own out-of-control spending."
The Massachusetts Republican Party stands in full opposition to the Municipal Taxation Act and calls on the Healey-Driscoll Administration and Democratic supermajority to abandon this misguided proposal. Massachusetts families shouldn't have to pay the price for Beacon Hill's financial mismanagement.

### ###

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1913, the 16th Amendment to the Constitution was ratified, [creating a federal income tax](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn8NbEYXGwIMHrpkS9eO6LDP4Srji8glNP--onunb_rek97XdboiZy63T1zJa5LJgu0MWANuisj5PbV19InIkqvJn3o3dINtx7Fe_Ez9TAlD30bXdTNh30MkiuMAabTO1ewPGlhwp5NrO9vgAK6DgHOiMwSgqgWKrLI138JFF0r5LS_amiBrnf2ien9U7qOyl8pegpSHsj6VpQQqSlsj262ylznLMYvsZiezy7NE87ybnXUxaAoeB8yGS5CVjOJPvfl43zlnfpz7qoXbipz_nPpfg5e3vwEAAP__eKpg9w). It called for a 2% tax on incomes above $4,000, essentially a tax on the wealthiest 1% of that era. Sunday was Groundhog Day, and in case you missed it, Punxsutawney Phil [did indeed see his shadow](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGP4yAQRn-N3TkaD2CTguKadLn2SmuAweZEwMIk3vz7Vbbf8tMnPT29f_flTjHFvP6lB5sWyoKAagAcQCyeYnovsvcmMCOLns04C600yuu13wwE0sQ0uWC9pHmyAScAHUAph6OyfTQfGiCIcRRS4YU0CAWObOAJHHAngX1spV7-l5jbxiG9y4vrxZVHn8zW2n504k-Htw5vtGc-j8_1GbVFl7jD2_7MX8ez0Zn5PexbTMNayzP7razDGXPjOoRS2dHRBrLjyNrKWSrEOTBaHLVH59haSyT7avx-xpTiMc2dhPVBMf3ItN_ivAx-BwAA___PQ2fg), indicating six more weeks of winter. By all accounts, a record crowd watched happily amid the fireworks and partying, and that's really the goal. ## Canada, Mexico Punch Back at U.S. Tariffs
Canada and Mexico are implementing [retaliatory tariffs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn8NbI6OM2AYPHTJlq4d0WGfw1UGI2OS5t9X6d7x0yc9Pb2v23QjibLdP2llW0KaELBTgAr05Enia2prbwMzsq7ZNkYP3YDtONaLHaClviOADkZ0MDIxOJhDaAH7uelrsW8aIOim0W2HFxpAd-BoDtyDA65aYC8l5ct3kq0sHOIrPThfXFrraJdS9qPSHxVeK7zSvvHzeF_vkYu4yBVeSz7XXRXKEsKhHG3kSa38Iy6pzIWiUJG0qZJPz3SqY2HZZjpXZYChNzOMSJqCQYc8G0fa-E6jG5s6W78_JUY5elO1cF9J4p9a-S_Vw-JvAAAA__--HGtb) on the U.S. after President Donald Trump enacted tariffs on those two nations, as well as China, on Saturday. Canada will impose a 25% tariff on goods, including beverages, cosmetics, and paper products, beginning Feb. 4, with broader tariffs on the horizon. Mexico said it will retaliate also but didn't offer specifics. Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau spoke by phone Saturday, but it isn’t clear whether the two nations will make a coordinated response. Meanwhile, Trump acknowledged on Sunday that Americans could feel “[some pain](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDuO4zAQBU8jZTSazY-kgMEmzrzphkKTbFpcUB9QtD2-_cCTT_jwgEKh_t3mG-WSt_tfWtm1tM8IaASgADVHyuU96z66xIysenZyUKMZUU9TvzgFmLxXg_RKRpJRyiFZz5wSIvgp9tl9aICgpFTa4IVGUAYC-cQWAnCngWNue7383_PWFk7lvT-5XsK-9sUtrR1np_50eO3wSsfGr_NzfUZtORTu8NrqYz1Eo5pTOkWgjSKJlb9y2EVY8kaiVYoszkc9yuMUCiSwVXY02jBOg03sDQXrtWSDI_fVxeOVS8mnHToN95Vy-RFqvwV6OvwOAAD__9tqZ68)” as a result of the emerging trade wars.

The tariffs on Canada and Mexico are set to go into effect Tuesday morning just after midnight. Here are details on [what products could be affected. ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1jLggMuKP6GLn97pUXMknDCxsIklt_-5OuvmWk-zYzm6z7dfcppff73C9kWy4SAAwfkIKfgUz4n1QUbiZBkR1ZoaQaDahy7l9UGPRgzzgKUglmRwFFI-bgNcQhx1F2yVxogSCGkGrD3BuQAs39EusEMxBRQSK3U_ruktb0o5rN8qPZzWbpsX61tO5P_GDqG7jiO_r37VoI_L4Ch21upJ0O3lJUuv-oYOhAMnbyk1fey8eZrinHnR8qZbzXNtPNn4e-Nh3KsDJ02MCqNCkAzdF21YbvYtN80U_BcfMq_k9pfF30s_gQAAP__g9Vk_A)
## Super Bowl Ads Ready to View
Super Bowl LIX kicks off next Sunday in New Orleans, and as always, big-budget TV ads will be a major part of the show. Here's a collection of top commercials [you can preview ahead of the game.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQAL8GOiNjQ0IKF6-hy2uvRIu9hD0tNrI3Ifz9KddfPxqN5us-3YGY4uM_bOhkSZPRplfaKG2nAMTn1NXBLYgGbY2uvdqhH0x3u9Wray1AH7rW-jD4NkALfW8vONz8HHBBXZP72LTRtm1t15sGBm177WFe8KK9xqrTGEhSbr4TRVlx4TO9MDc-bTW7VWQvlf1XmbEy43EczZLe87NQxFI-TGXGJb1VxKMojIJZgOKGUSozzsR8Kp_PIsCqrBAJlBxAUe2piNqAU0RVBLLyyDhnklOV545Zzelg5dO2YfYEXOrswn4QM5XLter0YwPi30j5a9rLmZ8AAAD__7LldHU) The ads this year include a Billy Crystal-Meg Ryan reunion, Shania Twain in a coffee ad, Matthew McConaughey impersonating former Chicago Bears coach Mike Ditka, and much more. Super Bowl ads this year are running [about $8 million per spot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fy6yAQheGngQ7PsisMKihuo863TalBsLLIIKNIxB7n6TN2n_YU35z_4zJeQi75dv0fVvZtriMCGgWogMYUcnmOnUx-ZkYmyV5bcsZh1_dy8UQUIJIFMnyGiW1kbXsyOvRkkiaZ_UsDBNKaOoOn4IAMxDDNfIYILDrglFvdT58139rCc3nWO--nWFdZ_NLadgj6J3AQOHz9vGaBw_G98a6m-igqJBXr0dT7tXZGW4POObn7tD1yKfk4W9HBdQ25vNH2V-Td428AAAD__xKPUL4), up 88% in the last 10 years and 20,000% since the first Super Bowl in 1967. Between the ads, there’s also a football game scheduled to be played between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. [Here are some predictions on that](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLvSmzAQhZ8GumWEJLApVKShc9qUjC4r2FhGjLQx47fP4P5vTnXmXL4_j-VhKdG-_rYvNBzzIoUcQEgQagmW0mfRbTARUaJq0fQ3dR_uUk9Tuxndo3fBijF6N_Q3NYU4TkGPTgsfrHMtmStNSKH6XulBdvYu1CC8dRFH4QU2WmAgzqX7m2nnDWP65DeWzudXm8zGfNRG_Wrk3Mj5PM_Ou1qPXLhejkbOe0yX4lkbOdd_BxZw-UzwfeFyCnAUDOSZ8l4h0hthywxsn1jBVvAbYayQcn5CzAV4oxKgcrG0bgxMnBDsammvDGjXhFdRW0w4TkqJ6nhrtFhfltJ3M__E8G3k_wAAAP__vLN3iw).
## List: World Leaders’ Approval Ratings
A new study shows the approval ratings of 24 world leaders during the first month of the year, and most of the names topping the list won election or re-election in 2024. [Here's the ratings chart](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQRn-N2YwuZxNg8NCFLV07oot9Dlc5GBkXlH9fpXv3T997el-3-UaSZH180pNdjXlGwE4DajBzIEmv2TbBRWZk07C79GboBrTj2CzOQLjTNXZx9N0wmt7YsSfo_dDTHQJhI-79BgjmcjG2w5YGMB14uke-ggdWFjhIzaX9zrLWhWN65YNL6_OzSW6pdduV-VA4KZzO82wP2X8oedqkUpK9vocKJ79QqRw0bVvJByVdqMr62HWOGq0-c0lBJ6bAZdey6reWwqkpLmynpCT7tVcWHk-S9Meu_7U4HP4GAAD__6RKYcw). India’s Narendra Modi got the highest marks with a 75% approval rating, while Mexico’s Claudia Sheinbaum and Argentina’s Javier Milei nabbed the next two spots at 66% and 65%. President Donald Trump was fifth at 52% approval. Among the bottom 10—those with the highest disapproval ratings—were Britain's Keir Starmer, Canada's Justin Trudeau, Germany's Olaf Scholz, and France's Emmanuel Macron. The rankings are based on data collected by [Morning Consult](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7tuhDAQAL_GdKA9P8AULtLQXdqUaLHXnJMFI-MQ3d9Hlz79aEbzcZ_vmDjt6ztu5GrMswRpWpAtqDlg4uesm-AikSTVkLsNyhor9Tg2DzeGCOOwGIvR9ro3g19g1EH5OBiyg2qSe9lAgrrdlDayQwvKgMclUg8eSGigkGou3WdOe31Q5Ge-qHQ-bw27R63HKdSbkJOQ01Fyt-Wyp331eT-_ub4wIada0H9ROYWcVs4LcsuEgUqLx1HyhdwUF46fxJzOfhAa1g0T_zXqf8-Xk78BAAD__7e_Wls) between Jan. 21–27, 2025.

Canada will impose a 25% tariff on goods, including beverages, cosmetics, and paper products, beginning Feb. 4, with broader tariffs on the horizon. Mexico said it will retaliate also but didn't offer specifics. Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum and Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau spoke by phone Saturday, but it isn’t clear whether the two nations will make a coordinated response. India’s Narendra Modi got the highest marks with a 75% approval rating, while Mexico’s Claudia Sheinbaum and Argentina’s Javier Milei nabbed the next two spots at 66% and 65%. President Donald Trump was fifth at 52% approval. Among the bottom 10—those with the highest disapproval ratings—were Britain's Keir Starmer, Canada's Justin Trudeau, Germany's Olaf Scholz, and France's Emmanuel Macron. ## Abbott Outlines Priorities in State of the State Address
Gov. Greg Abbott delivered his biennial State of the State address last night, [outlining his priorities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2P2zAMQH-NvDGQJX8kg4Yu3q5rx4CWKJuAHBkS7cv9-8Lp3IUAgYf3QP75en4hJ34tv3EjJ--Yn0abHrQBbZ8BOf08uya4WYdH25BrR3vv72bohmZ1fvS677qH7dvBRt2O8xCjjzjQvR07fDTsLpk22ratHVt7s9pih0Po9Rh7HB6q0xRYcrnJSkJvrDH95JPKzeetSW4V2auyv5SZlJnqTl7KsaXsMb3ou16UMpO8lZnwqMIvZaY9Jxb2VZnpqiszaXMNe5FXAriCrARzOmgv_BKIuQBuVNgjVIiHHIUAYMknwFJoAZznLAKBEp9UKqxcoQoKQY4f178FQyhUa1Nc2L85Ja7DqDq9bMjpc5H898WnM38DAAD__46bf9g) for the current legislative session, designating seven as emergency items for immediate legislative action. [Those emergency issues](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbD2IZQuHgNXV67JRriAax14giPQvL3K9C2W46Ozuje-3UdrxRTfCz_6c5e3nMeEdBpQA1mDBTTZ7RV8BOEvqnYN525uAu2tq1WPzkE04fLDdxkOaBxDdPcMwXbIfRQRX88AwTTNKZrTG3AkKU2OOhmR22vLHCIkrdaVhZ-U5nTJ794q2_5XiW_ijyLMv8UDgqHfd_r7zc9DqhwePBeFA6ndlCS26qX_NLLxoumacoiRZ91ipCwzrOWlX8PCmHjcojV5sNzjynF0nbKwnKnmM4A8uciL48_AQAA__9h92Ma) include property tax reform and relief, a universal education savings account program, increased teacher pay, high school career training, water supply funding, improved cybersecurity, and bail reform. Abbott also called for investing in the state’s power grid, strengthening school security, prohibiting ownership of Texas land by those from hostile nations, and banning DEI policies at any entity that receives public funding. “Texas is the blueprint for the future of America,” [Abbott said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0ULuOqzAU_BrTGdnH5lW4SEOX294SHfCBWDE4sk0If78iW283o9E8NP_vwx2dd9vyD1cy-TOHAQRUXAAXarDo_DnowppR2E4WZGSj2qqFWtfFw0jd0ihaofXcCZBKdt1YAdkKxxloxsKZK0yAUFKqRqpSCYUaa1uJZq6w7pgWZF0OscwPyvTBNPszvCmWU1gLbx45vxJTNwY9g_44jnJN26Ux6Gnje2LQv4J32U0XXC7rttKWfwlfIi0cxzHkzPftTc4n3nBaKS60TSd3Ke2U-Bwi_7Zzj8eKT4qJ58AzTk9PDHqM_HaTp7M7FNHY1-G8d6lumBbLis5_1-Y_73sb-AkAAP__QXZ0kg). “Our task this session is to be guardians of freedom.”
## Mavericks Dump Doncic
In a stunning move, the Dallas Mavericks traded superstar Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers on Saturday night, eliciting [shocked reactions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72O8yAQAJ8Gd7aWXRuHguJr3OVrr7TW_CQoxETAxcnbn3L99aMZzdd5PXNMcb_857s37RXyioBTD9gDrY5jeq9j58wGTsvOGznTaTqhGlV3NXqT2-RIWSaNNsxBgwSnT55YE-PWRfORAQJJSbOkgYB4ZOUmmMPESosRvIstl6FdffMvriG989OXweZ7l8y1tUcV9E_gInA5jmMI-TXu_qgfQOBSH7m0KnBJ3zfuXd5ttH0r7HxfPNsW8177xDdfaleMexwxpVjVLEa43Dmm3077c_xp8CcAAP__j2tcBg) from players and fans around the NBA. Mavericks general manager Nico Harrison sent Doncic, Maxi Kleber, and Markieff Morris to the Los Angeles Lakers in exchange for Anthony Davis, Max Christie, and a 2029 first-round draft pick. Harrison [justified the trade](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAUAL8GNqwHD-xkYOjiLV07Ws-AY1RsIqCx8_dVunc_3em-btONYor7_ZO2YNu55EmBMgKUAJw8xfSaNPd2Bn-VPFg54MVcVK97vlpwJswoA7rZKKeNm4NBqRFmjZq849G-ZaAApcRBYoeApKn3BobFUH9lGoKPLZeuraGFk-qSXvkZSufyxpNdW3tUhh9MjUyNx3F0Sz71Ho76Bpga6yOXVpka0883CZ93F51ohXwQGz2ruG9ijy6LlUqJNe-8WP84Ykqx9gPTcN8opr9Y-_f-adVvAAAA__9uKF3B) by stating that the team wanted to avoid paying Doncic a hefty contract extension and that Davis is a good defensive player. Head coach Jason Kidd admitted he was shocked when informed about the deal. Mavericks legend Dirk Nowitzki simply reacted with a sad face emoji on social media, while future Hall of Famer Kevin Durant [expressed anger](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQRZ8Guon8hwmFi23osu2WaLBNsDA2sgeS7NOvsv3XXl0dHZ0_j-mBIYb0_I27N_Re8iSY6IAJYHJyGOJnUq0zM3MDb73hvbx3d6GVblez6Nk67TwfXG-tsoIvsuu1GhaFyvKuDeYLY4JJzmXP5U0yiQq161i_dKiHRjHvAuVyo9WTf2Nd4idfvtxs3ttoVqKjNvJXI8ZGjEhrzKkeuVD9HhoxphkbMW7-CgncWTARUAYXygYpvwL93cJ3qMdZKsRzQ3A52WCBCjoPxaOlkFOF4i-PESqdKXkHaUaIuPlS4QqWcoGX32dMH9yxLcYdrxBjqLpvFHvuGOJ_Yfqx4GXEvwAAAP__Pbt4gQ) about sports teams not being held to the same “standard of loyalty” as players. A _Dallas Morning News_ columnist [characterized the trade](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAURp_GbBf5BwwMHljY0rUjurUvYGFwZDshefsq3bt90icdHZ3v23xDH_y5fuFBpryWOEsuW-ASuJod-vCem8qZH-4GUZERnerbXupGV5vppMVhQd1pbJAEOnTCLnaQul-s7vvKmw-MS66EUJ1QteIKG9Su5d3Soh5Yw8n5ElNdNir0wryEd3xSqm08qmC2Uu6ZqZHJicnpuq76yOfnY3KiEx6ZySnfYyqfEctGicnp9OtWDkwE2dKJyUcIjx3BxdN6CxlKQkdQIgTcKWXIW3wEBwfuBAc-KXm7Z1jwzJC93ZmcMME4ivc6xqZKxt0vH4LPumMNXw_04U-3_NvvaeRvAAAA__-Jp3VV) as a “nightmare” for Mavericks fans and predicted the team is “headed for a breakdown of their own device” in the near future.
## Video of Police Doing Donuts Ignites Social Media
After a Houston police officer was caught on video doing donuts during the recent snowstorm, the local police union [responded by criticizing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GO8wDnqAFxTZ2s-2WhpHnQMKIQRxn_n7j9tvd5CbnJOfnNt1cTHF9fLsn2fpe8iRBdhwkBzV5F9NnwsbbO_hBNGSFUX3XS426CRbVgsbQHTXORiOh7vSAiyAaehSLa6K9YCBBCaGMUK0C5dBp34FZOqcHhkA-1lzaGqjS2-1L-uQXlXbOzybZUOu2M_XF5MjkeJ5nO4eS1-tlcpyPVI9CTI6u1Dina4V87DWvfMspzsT3NZ_c5_Wo_BU9ZS4Bhl53pt3C1hTrtzOmFHdtGMLj6WL6M9d_U7ys_A0AAP__o6ZgrQ) the driver who shared the incident on social media. "We are human. We like to have a good time just like they do,” said Police Union President Doug Griffith. “You can't do what he does in public and then go and call out others.” Meanwhile, [Brown defended himself](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOpDAURL_GZG75BaYDB5uQ9aYbogu-hqs1GNmmH38_YiaeqKQq6ah0_j3GB1CkffkLG7r6DmlUQrVcKC706IHiZzSNd5Pwd9mgk1b3ba860zWr0wGgt4g4G4PYTfpuWzmF1uiAGoVtyF0woYSWUlupb1poMND5VtjQQndnRqCnmvKtrljxDSXET3pivs1pa6Jbaz0K03-YGpgaYJqlvhamhiOVytSwprPUtPMjRZqRezwg1w33ylMINGMufIZzWSsv9dwr95metC_8gPz_ypgqD2eMvOzpxSEjn_DqPZWZjkg7-h8SQSy8wIepQba9UUZapoYmO3-8KEYqnWVGLBtQ_P5ef5X5dOorAAD__9anec0), saying, “I ain't did nothing wrong. If it’s important news inside TX state lines, we cover it. | | | | | | Monday, February 3, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1896, the began operations with funding from Adolphus Busch. Although it survived the hurricane of 1900 and Prohibition, the brewery closed in 1982 after years of declining sales under the management of St. Louis-based Falstaff Brewery. Dallas Mavericks fans were shocked to learn Luka Doncic was traded to the Lakers this weekend. Check out in today's Roundup , then shoot us a reply with your thoughts about the move! Later today, we’ll be sending you a special email featuring our partner, , offering free financial advice to help safeguard your retirement savings. We hope you find their offer valuable! Greg Abbott delivered his biennial State of the State address last night, for the current legislative session, designating seven as emergency items for immediate legislative action. include property tax reform and relief, a universal education savings account program, increased teacher pay, high school career training, water supply funding, improved cybersecurity, and bail reform. Abbott also called for investing in the state’s power grid, strengthening school security, prohibiting ownership of Texas land by those from hostile nations, and banning DEI policies at any entity that receives public funding. “Texas is the blueprint for the future of America,” . “Our task this session is to be guardians of freedom.” Mavericks Dump Doncic In a stunning move, the Dallas Mavericks traded superstar Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers on Saturday night, eliciting from players and fans around the NBA. Mavericks general manager Nico Harrison sent Doncic, Maxi Kleber, and Markieff Morris to the Los Angeles Lakers in exchange for Anthony Davis, Max Christie, and a 2029 first-round draft pick. Harrison by stating that the team wanted to avoid paying Doncic a hefty contract extension and that Davis is a good defensive player. Head coach Jason Kidd admitted he was shocked when informed about the deal. Mavericks legend Dirk Nowitzki simply reacted with a sad face emoji on social media, while future Hall of Famer Kevin Durant about sports teams not being held to the same “standard of loyalty” as players. A Dallas Morning News columnist as a “nightmare” for Mavericks fans and predicted the team is “headed for a breakdown of their own device” in the near future. Video of Police Doing Donuts Ignites Social Media After a Houston police officer was caught on video doing donuts during the recent snowstorm, the local police union the driver who shared the incident on social media. Hamon Brown on Jan. 21 with the comment, "Man look at HPD here, they out here doing doughnuts man, they got nothing else better to do.” The Houston Police Officers’ Union responded by saying Brown was “snitching” and pointing out his broken windshield. They asked for recommendations for local auto glass repair companies and showing Brown “ghost-riding” his own vehicle. "We are human. We like to have a good time just like they do,” said Police Union President Doug Griffith. “You can't do what he does in public and then go and call out others.” Meanwhile, , saying, “I ain't did nothing wrong. Y'all were in the wrong.” | Flying together with our sponsor The facts are staggering, aren’t they? $36 trillion in national debt. Inflation’s eroding the dollar. And meanwhile? You and your cash could be caught in the crossfire.. A move many people might not know exists. And you’ll be glad once you see it. Because when Elon Musk saw the national debt, he said "This amounts to over $106k per person in America." But then he nailed it: “Terrifying.” And it’s obvious, right? Unchecked government spending likely leads to consequences for everyone. But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call. . The rising debt isn’t just numbers on a screen—it’s a slow erosion of buying power, savings, and future plans. But there’s a way to potentially step outside the chaos and regain control. Greg Abbott issued an executive order Friday directing state agencies to eliminate active DEI programs, saying they “divide us rather than unite us and have no place in the state of Texas.” () ➤ Houston: A United Airlines flight was evacuated on Sunday following an aborted takeoff after one of the plane’s engines caught fire. No injuries were reported, and passengers exited the Airbus A319 on the runway using stairs and the plane’s emergency slides. () ➤ Fort Worth: An unnamed suspect was fatally shot by police after a standoff on Thursday. At one point, the suspect set off fireworks and threw several at responding officers. () ➤ Brownsville: The decommissioned USS John F. Kennedy (CV-67) pulled into port Sunday morning, where it will be dismantled. Thousands of spectators, including many who previously served aboard the aircraft carrier, were on hand to witness the event. () ➤ Houston: Saturday’s Monster Jam event drew a crowd of 50,000 people to NRG Stadium. The monster trucks will be back in action at the same venue this Saturday. () ➤ Pecos: The National Transportation Safety Board released a preliminary report on the December train derailment that killed two workers. According to the report, 9,000 gallons of locomotive diesel fuel spilled, and damages incurred by Union Pacific and the trucking company involved in the crash exceed $6 million. () ➤ Fritch: A wildfire burned 3,000 acres over the weekend before it was contained by first responders from multiple agencies. body:
The President can only pardon in federal cases.

The President can only pardon in federal cases.

After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.

name: History Facts
subject: The surprising drink French children were served in school
body:
Lest you doubt France’s commitment to wine, know this: Until 1956, French schoolchildren were served it during lunch. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dnuc2uqrgxjb5h1phj4u4ocncpngd40cddy8uksncx4w149awchi8x0upup2lzrkmxx87xgf5cy629ft4xxnq7t67apdey8skxmu5bgm7o3kse7i2n98ovj11u38ayk1xm4oxtef4vl9f93&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Until 1956, French children attending school were served wine with their lunch.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| L est you doubt France’s commitment to wine, know this: Until 1956, French schoolchildren were [served it](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) during lunch. Even the ban that came into effect that year applied only to _enfants_ under the age of 14, and alcohol wasn’t banned from schools entirely until 1981. [Photos](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [videos](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of the practice can still be found, most of which are remarkable for how casual they are — as though choosing between red and white was as normal for a second grader as deciding between plain and chocolate milk.
---
That’s probably because it was. Wine has been an integral part of French culture for more than 2,000 years, and you don’t have to be a sommelier to know that France is widely considered the best wine-producing country in the world. And though consumption has been consistently dropping in the country as younger generations across the globe have opted to drink less than their parents and grandparents, wine is still a staple of daily life.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The earliest known winery was in Armenia.
Though hardly synonymous with wine in the same way France is, Armenia has been producing it longer than any other country, as far as archaeologists know. The [oldest-known winery](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr3wax&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) was discovered in an Armenian cave in 2007, and dates back 6,100 years. A wine press, cups, withered grapes, and vessels used for fermentation and storage were all unearthed at the Areni-1 cave complex, as the site is known, which is also where the oldest known leather shoe was discovered. Today, the country’s best-known alcoholic export is brandy, which is produced by distilling wine and has a higher alcohol by volume (ABV) content.

Ever since Kash Patel was nominated by President Trump to lead the FBI, he’s faced a barrage of attacks.
Democrats want his nomination thrown in the trash because he’ll take an America-First sledgehammer to the DC swamp.
2 years ago - the Democrats controlled all the intelligence agencies and they’re determined to keep that control in 2025.
They want to **END** Trump’s closest ally for good, and this message is your last chance to stop that from happening.
If nothing is done right here, right **NOW** , President Trump’s most important ally will never see the light of day.
If you really stand with him and want to drain the swamp too, we’re hoping, begging, and pleading for you to stand with him **RIGHT NOW** before it’s too late.

name: AMAC Action
subject: Democrats and RINOs CAN’Ttank this nomination!
body:
Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmqksn4natf0ssjvi0p6n50g6dd7er0i0pkflsgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg64p72cjh2bs)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The Senate confirmation hearing for Pete Hegseth just concluded and the real work begins **now** to get him confirmed!Senate Democrats are going to try anything and everything to coerce and bully any Republican who shows weakness into tanking this critical appointment. We refuse to let that happen. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpld8u351fmrfo2vep8ohkhcrgv43nc6povqc6e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg64p72cjh2bs)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But we know what’s coming: Democrats will unite to block his confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment.If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats tank this nomination.We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8306f8uco186c86rtfnbngnl91p6r8o53nc23d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg64p72cjh2bs)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7n3c7rp2ntq23od3nvlib39c69f3untf8n44kbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg64p72cjh2bs)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfn5hmchedh2llmn7ige24tshfe0juvk6sb7m28g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg64p72cjh2bs)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks – maybe days –_**** _ to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs – _****_So please don’t delay!_****** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber****AMAC Action**
---
