name: House GOP [Trump Cabinet Alerts]
subject: RFK Jr. needs our help to Make America Healthy Again
body:
The Senate vote for HHS will be RAZOR THIN

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9VHg/?__vbtrk=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, as the next Secretary of Health & Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be one of the most transformative political appointees in American history.
He will **hold the government bureaucrats accountable**.
He will take action to **stop the chronic disease emergency** ravaging our country.
He will **restore integrity and transparency** to our nation’s health policies.
RFK Jr. will be President Trump’s fighter at the head of HHS to **demand the truth from government agencies** , hold public health officials to the highest standards, and put the well-being of the American people above all else.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9VHg/?__vbtrk=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9VHg/?__vbtrk=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
But none of these achievements are possible if let the Radical Left tarnish the reputation of President Trump’s cabinet nominees and apply pressure to obstruct their appointments.

We have already seen what the liberal media and special interests have done in their vicious attempts to derail the appointment of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense.__
_The final vote to confirm Hegseth ended in a 50-50 tie with Vice President J.D. Vance needed to break the tie in the Senate._****
**To confirm RFK Jr. and begin the work to Make America Healthy Again we cannot afford to lose a single vote.****__**
**_[That’s why we are calling on America First patriots to help us hold the line today by showing your support for RFK Jr. and contributing to the fight against the Swamp who are attempting to undermine the Trump administration](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9VHg/?__vbtrk=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**.
[SUPPORT RFK JR.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9VHg/?__vbtrk=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This is our chance to reject the corruption, the lies, and the unchecked power of special interests.

The Democrats in the United States Senate need to know, beyond any doubt, the American people demand that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be confirmed.

They need to know that the era of appointing those that promote the status quo to run our nation’s healthcare is over.

And with your support we can help get President Trump’s choice over the finish line to finally begin a new era of accountability in public health.**__**
**_[Please, if you are able, stand with us right now and help make sure that RFK Jr. becomes our nation’s next Secretary of Health& Human Services](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9VHg/?__vbtrk=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczMTEzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
_To Victory,_
**HOUSE GOP**

clean_body: The Senate vote for HHS will be RAZOR THIN | | | | Friend, as the next Secretary of Health & Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be one of the most transformative political appointees in American history. He will hold the government bureaucrats accountable. He will take action to stop the chronic disease emergency ravaging our country. He will restore integrity and transparency to our nation’s health policies. RFK Jr. will be President Trump’s fighter at the head of HHS to demand the truth from government agencies , hold public health officials to the highest standards, and put the well-being of the American people above all else. But none of these achievements are possible if let the Radical Left tarnish the reputation of President Trump’s cabinet nominees and apply pressure to obstruct their appointments. We have already seen what the liberal media and special interests have done in their vicious attempts to derail the appointment of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense. The final vote to confirm Hegseth ended in a 50-50 tie with Vice President J.D. Vance needed to break the tie in the Senate.** To confirm RFK Jr. and begin the work to Make America Healthy Again we cannot afford to lose a single vote.** . This is our chance to reject the corruption, the lies, and the unchecked power of special interests. The Democrats in the United States Senate need to know, beyond any doubt, the American people demand that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be confirmed. They need to know that the era of appointing those that promote the status quo to run our nation’s healthcare is over. And with your support we can help get President Trump’s choice over the finish line to finally begin a new era of accountability in public health. . To Victory, HOUSE GOP | | | | | | | | | | | | | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: America First Alerts
subject: This email is Kash Patel’s last chance.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JEFF CRANK FOR CONGRESS
body:
We only need 1,467 more signatures to save Kash Patel

| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0iaie8ld170314jcev3op1mlv592vub3sqfubp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg6co76chh2bs)
---
Ever since Kash Patel was nominated by President Trump to lead the FBI, he’s faced a barrage of attacks.
Democrats want his nomination thrown in the trash because he’ll take an America-First sledgehammer to the DC swamp.
2 years ago - the Democrats controlled all the intelligence agencies and they’re determined to keep that control in 2025.
They want to **END** Trump’s closest ally for good, and this message is your last chance to stop that from happening.
If nothing is done right here, right **NOW** , President Trump’s most important ally will never see the light of day.
If you really stand with him and want to drain the swamp too, we’re hoping, begging, and pleading for you to stand with him **RIGHT NOW** before it’s too late.

[PLEASE SIGN HERE>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqfk358qc74n2d271d1g6228ptv99nun6qrdkii0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg6co76chh2bs)

We only need 1,467 more signatures on our petition to advance Kash Patel’s nomination.
Please don’t be the reason that his nomination fails. We only have one shot at this and we can’t afford to lose.
Please take 2 minutes before the end of the day to sign this petition and make America great again.
Kash Patel is hanging on by a thread and you are his only hope.

body:
Sign the card and say “THANK YOU” to our new Border Czar!

|
---
| | | **" If you're in the country illegally, you got a problem" -Border Czar Tom Homan**
Border Czar Tom Homan hit the nail on the head, Friend.

The removal of criminal illegal aliens has already begun, and it's a beautiful sight to see.

No longer are illegals free to invade our country and commit crimes with impunity. **The buck stops here.**

_And we have Border Czar Tom Homan to thank for that_.

**[House GOP is sending a BIG thank you card to Tom Homan, and we want your name on it. Will you sign the card right now?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5vfh4kj1k8fbo0bm8nrsm2od0jbm5t2usmkbu2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg62pr6cph2bs "House GOP is sending a BIG thank you card to Tom Homan, and we want your name on it. name: Government Efficiency Audit
subject: Bureaucrats on notice - we’re WATCHING!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re shining a light on government WASTE

|
---

You imagine the looks on your friends' faces when you pull up to the beach or the ballpark with your sticker proudly on display. They'll know exactly where you stand:

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/tom-homan-snaps-at-abc-host-when?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[lost patience with an ABC reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/72a3e0f0-1ee7-47f1-a486-eecaa86f7f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense interview about deportations, after she tried to shame him for doing his job and enforcing immigration laws.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/72a3e0f0-1ee7-47f1-a486-eecaa86f7f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/72a3e0f0-1ee7-47f1-a486-eecaa86f7f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The reporter pressed Homan about why he was going into schools and places of care to target illegal migrants for deportation.
**["There's consequences for entering the country illegally,"](https://substack.com/redirect/72a3e0f0-1ee7-47f1-a486-eecaa86f7f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Homan explained. "If we don't show that there's consequences, you're never going to fix the border problem."
The reporter followed up asking how the U.S. could possibly afford to deport everyone in the U.S illegally when there are more than 11 million undocumented people here.
"Ithink this is the number one issue that the people have voted on and Congress has a mandate to give us the money we need," Homan answered. "What price do you put on all these young ladies who were murdered or burned alive?"
"What price do you put on Laken Riley's life?!" Homan continued, getting more fired up.
Watch the tense interview here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/72a3e0f0-1ee7-47f1-a486-eecaa86f7f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Tulsi Gabbard GOES OFF on entire deep state mafia, forces Democrats to sit there and TAKE IT
Trump's pick to lead the the Office of National Intelligence **[broke all the rules during her opening statement](https://substack.com/redirect/e76f8c24-497f-4754-bd0c-4822e613f279?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for her confirmation hearing last week, calling out Democrats and Republicans alike for lying to the American people for decades.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e76f8c24-497f-4754-bd0c-4822e613f279?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Just hours after I criticized Kamala Harris' nomination, I was put on a secret domestic terror watch list called 'Quiet Skies'" Gabbard told the Senate.
"President Trump's reelection is a clear mandate from the American people to break this cycle of failure, end the weaponization and politicization of the intelligence community and begin to restore trust in those who have been charged with the critical task of securing our nation," she continued.
Watch what must have been an extremely uncomfortable moment for most everyone in the room...
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/e76f8c24-497f-4754-bd0c-4822e613f279?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

We are proud of the values that our brand stands for because **[those values unite people across every walk of life.](https://substack.com/redirect/657e5a07-a36f-4303-b115-4dd2bc319815?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

clean_body: "What price do you put on Laken Riley's life?!!" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "What price do you put on Laken Riley's life?!!" Feb 3 | | | | | | | | | | | Trump Border Czar Tom Homan during a tense interview about deportations, after she tried to shame him for doing his job and enforcing immigration laws. The reporter pressed Homan about why he was going into schools and places of care to target illegal migrants for deportation. Homan explained. "If we don't show that there's consequences, you're never going to fix the border problem." The reporter followed up asking how the U.S. could possibly afford to deport everyone in the U.S illegally when there are more than 11 million undocumented people here. "Ithink this is the number one issue that the people have voted on and Congress has a mandate to give us the money we need," Homan answered. "What price do you put on all these young ladies who were murdered or burned alive?" "What price do you put on Laken Riley's life?!" Homan continued, getting more fired up. Watch the tense interview here: Tulsi Gabbard GOES OFF on entire deep state mafia, forces Democrats to sit there and TAKE IT Trump's pick to lead the the Office of National Intelligence for her confirmation hearing last week, calling out Democrats and Republicans alike for lying to the American people for decades. "Just hours after I criticized Kamala Harris' nomination, I was put on a secret domestic terror watch list called 'Quiet Skies'" Gabbard told the Senate. "President Trump's reelection is a clear mandate from the American people to break this cycle of failure, end the weaponization and politicization of the intelligence community and begin to restore trust in those who have been charged with the critical task of securing our nation," she continued. Watch what must have been an extremely uncomfortable moment for most everyone in the room... | | ---|---|--- WE THE PEOPLE is made for Americans by Americans. American exceptionalism, free markets, free people, free speech and limited government are what we stand for. We want to reflect what we see as the exceptionally diverse identity of Americans across the country - diversity of thought, diversity of experiences and diversity of everything that makes up our society. We are proud of the values that our brand stands for because WE THE PEOPLE takes things a step further - a portion of the profits from every sale goes directly to supporting causes that reflect the values our community stands for. Every sip is another step towards freedom. Drink up! * | | POLL Will they let Tulsi Gabbard be confirmed? | ? ? ? PolitiBrawl is a reader-supported publication. USO Supporter,
I know how much you care about supporting the brave service members who sacrifice so much for our country. That's why I'm inviting you to make an early USO birthday donation toward critical military support and receive a free USO hat to celebrate this milestone and show your military pride.
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[CLAIM YOUR USO HAT!](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/Dd9Kh-8rgGfE/N2dlT3BxV0k0NllpSnM5ZUlGa0FzRGtOTW5uYityZkJsMkVaaS9nOVFHVGxBblh2bmZyV0tRUFVuNk51QWxhN1FZSy84ZG1SN0lHMDY4WXhkSzAyaERNNkdIU29HeFEwR3lSWStuMEhBNjg9S0/dGsvNnU5TitUdEFpNkNYWHUwVGh0cW1aTGlMZEp6a25BdXpmSXlIdnpXV21zQno4WWhpQ2VIVmc1aWQwODFPZ2VpbFd6NzhSVm9FNDNoMHEwSUEwOEVaY3BLeXd3NjVsS0)

**In honor of the USO 's 84th birthday tomorrow, we've set a $100,000 goal to help ensure we can continue providing critical support and services to our military -- and when you donate $20 or more toward our goal, we'll send you a USO hat!**
We're counting on our most dedicated supporters -- including you, -- to take advantage of this offer before it's too late.

Sydney Jones, USO

name: Sen. Tom Cotton
subject: It’s as simple as this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
here’s what I need from you

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdhpmd67l18ihflg8s53502vc2flo4ntbaqi1i38_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg61pj2chh2bs)

It's as simple as this, friend.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

**[I've had _ENOUGH,_ friend. My message to these liberals is simple: We can do this the easy way, or the hard way -- and it looks like it's going to be the hard way.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpqtio93f0mrmg7mg947907o4l0k8j19vd1percg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg61pj2chh2bs)**

**[I'm asking every patriot in your area to help me reinforce the message and flood Senate Democrats with millions of signatures.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7b00sjn82sljs7skuuuo56chg1r6f2bs12qcjeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg61pj2chh2bs)**

Senate Democrats don't respect the will of the people, and they certainly don't want President Trump to have his team in place.

The only way to stop their games is to mount an unprecedented pressure campaign.

**[So, please, add your name to my petition calling for ALL of President Trump's nominees to be confirmed ASAP. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zn14qldq8kjbvfb0skpvtjk7bqk8dv34275pilh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sdg61pj2chh2bs)**

## How many Israelis support creation of a Palestinian state? New poll has answer * WorldNetDaily * by David Brummer
(Photo by Joe Kovacs) JERUSALEM – A newly released poll shows the level of support for the declaration of Jewish sovereignty in Judea and Samaria continuing to climb following the current pause in the fighting of the Swords of Iron war. The data, which the Sovereignty Movement and Pulse of Israel presented, examined the Israeli [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/1jeTGYPMK1mV79_iwwfQsDFviSznANPwVUJOSzq7I6Qz83srs99-ZjJipkIGxPaRJl5EYYC1ulSbb9rTjruvaxjVuA9-ZZIrvtbuQ8lbLZTG4MarJDt4RvaUcFn-tMh4K8YVqQMSfsw4WlGJt5xo5BX-Km3Bo5Ix_6oH7OAn1AL9NM7zPjWoGVsJTulS2MG39AmYNJ7stxHPHkM3SprpH3s45h9bvVnbosMVj7u3IeIRt7Q_K_TKv4cDXOwPwiERcaKKH7vJvIVld4b92M8zUN6kr7-p_jioppYqVXHU2QCFKENP7GH3zub0dJzpGEcXl3s7R87kLODK_6YwkaMDPXyEyaRVpdg0GlNjKuaJXcnYz9-jJ6b7rs9lAnqNxj_BLDf0gUI-MCVTFqQWASac6IBc4KBE/fm_mfMRr2YcFQkwHW1iYyJOo3DgP-AmT/5)

## Trump and Rubio Should Come Out Swining on International Religious Freedom
In the first week of February, Washington, D.C., will play host to the International Religious Freedom Summit, the largest annual non-profit-led gathering of religious freedom advocates globally. President Donald Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio should take the opportunity to quickly reorient religious freedom policy so that it is once again an American foreign [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/tmzT_9FIJGWErN78ZqOi8-bIsvx0L0e9nOMXtU8_X9QRSvfzij9wKf0wUd08idYLZFCd_nhOCQ8rjdTeV7w0HcFkAftfL1-DSznyg-XcYZz7eWFiwu9T_Mi9Cy5uJkW1GjhDBNL_r28zeX3debjUYhmIY1mu3idrDI-wcc4shwZt-4RmY8akiDOJBjQkDuLBcdcaCOYMz87UWLvTJ_eJqB_-kjR5EOuG9YFOJQ7vqRUr0S_mmd0oU_v34qj9-BDu_ZaoSO6pegVF5QiDNKvOj0lBwQzwhXvszCfK6JP5AXEfJcL7k503YjLPRvTjVg8DhW5FNdO6PGhsIeVu-eYyeo6p2Howzf-uWxmFXrmnQYplJMA/a0YWPl385LQPEsPvhl22cQLKjKJNkPJc/5)

## ‘We need a FEMA that looks like somebody designed it on purpose’ * WorldNetDaily * by WND Staff
Feb. 3, 2025 7:28 a.m. Louisiana Senator John Kennedy: ‘We need a FEMA that looks like somebody designed it on purpose’ Among the massive flood zone strategy of changes, Republican lawmakers are eager to see an overhaul of the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), especially lawmakers that have had recent disasters. “We need a FEMA [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/aux4IeuIWAzYQ7V-5xnLjV8gwFse_2DIzW8TQu6mfdAXm6BxdUQa6Fu_5lfNhbKHMf7GIe1vywxNF8NMaq7gLS6pKOf3ztzLrMG4BApMGJOjyx2AdKgSd2ZtIdnBuuW_kROAYlo9WNk-49IyEZV5pcEZ_Nmx6788h-2Oii9_2Jy48egIFbaN1EThU0p8jFNiH8GY-jOYA4BcjHVGCdsHeK-tHoJfTxZwoSfxSEwYNIgkltKYlfHG8dvohgnkOfjkTSZvklwLRAE4Lg4oWemyZVQbo9D_S3uXDHotIZiiJzUIL4sCJ-FsUKAN207-YyMC-eP8LIJqX29SKzbEfFxwEdxpprzaYFtE4iVz2Emi9BY2HDtp1Fr-L3eUM07crti793k/ruhCbEr0Kid8VsyOEs5Q936DIlvBaza9/5)

| |
## David Hogg – All Grown Up...Sort Of – RedState
A few short years ago, David Hogg resembled “Bewitched” character Darrin Stevens — who those of a certain age will recall — reincarnated, with his Brylcreemed hair, big ears, and propensity for manic behavior whenever it was time for his close-up. Clean-cut, sanctimonious, and leaking self-righteousness out of one ear, self-importance from the other, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/DMz2QsuzLq1TbJsI3pmfyEmaeuzzHVG8J3seJYAyJ90xfvJdPuiWfKliQBYiJ0xgtUU8_X48SELbGVcagyqYP4RIuMSAozKkqju8e7eOFTh9xq4-BL2lxeqRTptBgzaORxuBlXERhxfSvmRG97RcTb6lxZDtmezUWv-63Zi6uuCvREj8COjCJMfexMi1LeAoLHWJUotqnxxMjeJeqfXnKIal43QwKpnuVMNfGHiDOdBy0ihLrTBxtXoYH3XWTzAD8Z72Jyrob-xpRj5l-riElOySPzZqRdO-wZUkINC4eY8Sf2BHn0l8km5ntXqlqLQYfA/lWDp1h6aH4gGv0WzWP24y0F7WJA4p9xu/5)

| |
## Lee Zeldin Hits the Ground Running at EPA
Two years after a train derailment exposed residents of East Palestine, Ohio, to hazardous chemicals, the new leader of the Environmental Protection Agency is making the village his first official visit Monday. Lee Zeldin, a former New York congressman from Long Island, won his Senate confirmation vote Wednesday afternoon, spent Thursday and Friday meeting with [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/I3pcnaTCqEc18dpxWWet94gia-7SaxkmbGsYIZv8d0NTIcjx5iFfxkxFZIy-m96IM3Fb-izHXH360ouamJVyvNXjDL9qJzurXp2OMJKC-zMy4TnfW_71t78h1Bwq65D185G5Yd-ILja7V5hnGEkfzXD5O2ubG3ryd4C72Et8OmXa5F6iAZMHNXo_KNXeSIG0Watfs2JBnghVVZexiCiioyOESNe8CIa2wcbL4v6mtnuzj-4JG8ViwYwduYLjI8VchWbki2BAfVt2uSc2L7y0RHY53A07CztB3dtyPzKyEbIbOL-LZvrOdtEGJmXFvnh3ZCY/F1gE2dV3kMIH3m1dd27lVN-Pbs-ERcPn/5)

name: BREAKING
subject: Trump’s FIRST major defeat!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by HMP, # [#]
body:
Click here to unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4xBla9HqS06_watf7h3QaQ2?source=header_rfe]
– BREAKING –

Did you see what Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez just said?

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez: Trump's funding freeze reversal is his "first major loss" since he became president [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/91305/images/20250203_em_fr_b1_hmp_main.png]

AOC is SO right.

And now, it’s clear as ever that when grassroots supporters like you STEP UP and fight against Trump’s extremism – we WIN!

That’s why today, we’re asking you to make a small donation of 5 dollars before midnight.

No, that’s not a typo – just $5.

$5 to show Trump that we’re UNITED against him.

$5 to RUIN his first few weeks in office.

$5 to BEAT BACK against his $500 MILLION that he’ll use to protect his House Republicans.

$5 to send Trump and Johnson a RESOUNDING message that their days in power are numbered.

We know it doesn’t seem like $5 can do all these things.

But if we all give, it adds up – and we’ll be unstoppable.

So, please: Can we count on you to contribute just $5? If you – and everyone else reading this – chips in before midnight, we can hold Republicans ACCOUNTABLE for their attacks on our freedoms and our Democracy, rush resources to critical districts, and kick Republicans OUT of power in the midterms. Will you join 5,000 grassroots supporters and chip in to BUILD on our MOMENTUM? name: Democrats.org
subject: Millions of people voted against Trump and his allies’ agenda
body:
---
Derek, We are two weeks into Trump’s presidency, and we are already seeing the disastrous consequences. Trump and his billionaire allies are enacting plans that threaten our democracy and our freedoms. **But we are not powerless.** Millions of people voted against this agenda. There are millions of us — all across the country — who won’t stand idly by and let Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress do whatever they want. We can — and will — fight back. But to do that, we need your help. [**So we’re asking: Will you make your first contribution of 2025? We will put your contribution directly to work building the strong Democratic Party this moment demands.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-member-card?amount=3&refcode=em_20250203_2668_fr&refcode2=2668_22930333_Tndn2H&akid=2668%2E22930333%2ETndn2H) And when you contribute, you’ll receive your Official 2025 Democratic Member Card in the mail: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20250203_2668_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2668_22930333_Tndn2H&akid=2668%2E22930333%2ETndn2H) We know the last few months have not been easy, and that there is a lot of work ahead of us — to not only mobilize and organize against Trump and his allies’ plans, but to build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, in 2025, 2026, and beyond. **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025-member-card?refcode=em_20250203_2668_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2668_22930333_Tndn2H&akid=2668%2E22930333%2ETndn2H)** That’s why your help today is so important, and it’s why we’re so grateful to have you on this team. Thank you for everything, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 🚨Ohio's Leading Grassroots Brand Arrives!
body:
Don't miss out on Ohio's top grassroots communications brand. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=8e93e915bf&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=02e0a593d8&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**BIG NEWS: OHIO'S #1 GRASSROOTS
COMMUNICATION BRAND IS COMING!**

---
|
Greetings from **Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI)** —your home for truth, transparency, and real action in Ohio!

We’ve been hard at work behind the scenes, and we’re thrilled to **give you a first look** at our next big move: the launch of a **powerful social media and digital information network** under the GFI brand. 🚀

This isn't just an update—it’s a **revolution** in how Ohioans get the real story and take meaningful action!

### **🔹****What’s Coming?**
We’re building a **massive digital presence** , including a revamped website, expanded email & SMS (text) alerts, and non-stop, hard-hitting content across social media.

GFI will **deliver the truth** in four powerful ways:

🔹 **"Need to Know"** – Civic education through emails, texts, posts & videos.
🔹 **"Lies, Big Lies, Bigger Lies"** – Videos & post exposing corruption & rigging at all levels of Ohio government.
🔹 **"Ready, Aim, Fire"** – Simple, direct actions YOU can take to make a real impact.
🔹 **"Truth Bombs"** – Taking on media & establishment dishonesty **head-on**.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=cbf09e2e32&e=5c740fa3e2)

📢 **We've already started rolling out content!** If you haven’t seen our videos yet, check them out on our growing social platforms below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6ad2dc6d28&e=5c740fa3e2)

### **💥****Why This Matters**
We all know the **mainstream media is corrupt**. We know **both major political parties in Ohio mislead, lie, and withhold information** to maintain power.

**That ends now.**

Information is power, and **we’re taking it back.** The establishment thrives when voters stay in the dark—so we’re turning on the lights and putting YOU in control.

### **📲****Follow & Subscribe NOW!**
We’ve **revamped and rebranded** all of our platforms to make GFI Ohio’s **#1 grassroots communications hub**. Make sure to follow and share!

👉 **Instagram** : [@gfiohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=08ad07bf9a&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **Rumble** : [GFI Ohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=79e98f6e7b&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **TikTok** : [@gfiohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9878ab70b9&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **X (Twitter)** : [@gfiohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3cfe8a62ea&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **YouTube** : [GFI Ohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6e32262b60&e=5c740fa3e2)

**We’re also keeping these personal accounts active because of their large audiences:**

👉 **Facebook (Mark Pukita)** : [Follow Here](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7fd2503b2c&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **X (Mark Pukita)** : [Follow Here](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=528baffd5b&e=5c740fa3e2)

### **🔹****The Mission: 280,000 Ohioans Strong**
Why 280,000? Because **research shows** that just **3.5% of a population can create massive, peaceful change.** Ohio has **8 million registered voters** , and 3.5% of that is **280,000 voters**.

Our goal? **Regularly communicating with 280,000 Ohioans at the push of a button.**

But we need YOUR help. The faster we grow, the faster we **take back control of Ohio**.

### **👊****Join the Movement**
We’re not here to tell Ohioans **what** to think. We’re here to **empower them with the truth** —because we believe **informed voters make the best decisions** for their families, communities, and our great state.

✅ **Follow our platforms.**
✅ **Share this email.**
✅ **Help us reach 280,000 Ohioans!**

The **fight for truth in Ohio starts NOW.** Let’s do this—together.
**Thank you for being part of the movement!**

**– Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI)**

|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9124d87fbb&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|

---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1bec8e6c40&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fc1b2f0fd6&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=e751c42e74) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=e751c42e74).

body:
We’ve heard the way Trump and his coalition talk about women. Starting with phrases like...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101464896/526047491/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250203trump_N_EH_90DO_11_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkZDQ3NDhjLTNmZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rI8X9DmOi4jx3IVlDRUoo850Cy3GEUAUnH3mydsfix4=)
---
Hi Peter,

It has been two weeks since an open misogynist was inaugurated as the next President of the United States, and we are staying prepared to defend women throughout his term in office.

**In the days since he was sworn in, Trump became the only sitting president in history to attend the National March For Life in D.C. and countless _male_ GOP Senators in Congress have taken it upon themselves to draft and/or sponsor draconian legislation meant to severely limit women’s access to reproductive healthcare: Sen. Josh Hawley (MO), Sen. John Thune (SD), Sen. James Lankford (OK) and many more...**

**Not only that, we’ve heard the way Trump and his coalition talk about women.** Starting with phrases like “grab her by the pu**y” and, most recently, referring to any accomplished woman in power as a “DEI hire.”

[**Our best hope of protecting women and women’s rights, will be to elect more WOMEN to government nationwide – at all levels. At HER BOLD MOVE, we have a strong plan to make that happen, but we need your help. We are already laying the groundwork to ensure that NO qualified women candidates get left behind – especially those running for office in red/abortion-ban states. Too often, red states don’t have the infrastructure or support systems in place to help pro-choice women win, and we’ve seen how the laws in those states reflect that fact.

**Let’s stay focused:**

Women across the country **should not** be pleading with _male politicians_ to take the time to understand our healthcare needs or to allow us to make decisions about our bodies.

Women across the country **should not** be worried about our rights being taken away or needlessly dying due to pregnancy complications.

**We deserve better, and that is what we are fighting for.**

2025 will be a year that tests us, and we must show up to the fight. By electing pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women to positions across the nation, we can ensure the people making laws about our bodies are well-equipped to do so. Every seat – at every level – counts.

[**It will take ALL OF US to defend against the inevitable anti-women policies that we will see over the next four years. It’s essential that we get more women into the rooms where decisions about our rights and our bodies are being made, and we cannot do it without you. Join us by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101464918/526047590/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250203trump_N_EH_90DO_11_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkZDQ3NDhjLTNmZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rI8X9DmOi4jx3IVlDRUoo850Cy3GEUAUnH3mydsfix4=)

Together,

Erica Henry
Senior Political Advisor
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101464924/526047601/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250203trump_N_EH_90DO_11_NG_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkZDQ3NDhjLTNmZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rI8X9DmOi4jx3IVlDRUoo850Cy3GEUAUnH3mydsfix4=)

The first two weeks under the new regime have been chaotic and catastrophic. If you missed it, [I've published a detailed overview of the 7 main horrific policies the new regime is implementing](https://substack.com/redirect/6ec5844d-6040-4784-bee8-554f5317e383?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and just as importantly, included 7 action items each of us can take on how to demand justice and protect our human rights.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..YFDpl7JUdsV2HWTIZtZF879XyKZ8TrfnlwMi4_NnrOc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156326295)

**A reminder for paid subscribers** : You can send a gift subscription of _Let 's Address This_ to a friend or loved one. Why? Because, who doesn't enjoy discussing the _things_ that matter in their life with the _people_ who matter in their life?
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..YFDpl7JUdsV2HWTIZtZF879XyKZ8TrfnlwMi4_NnrOc?&gift=true)
**With that, let 's dive into our show this week!** On this week's episode of The Qasim Rashid Show I am joined by Claudia Yoli Ferla, Executive Director of MOVE Texas to discuss:
* Rise of anti-immigrant policy and the building of a migrant concentration camp
* My FOIA to the DOJ regarding the January 6 insurrectionists
* Trump's funding freeze hurts white Trump voters the most but they don't realize it

* * *
**A quick ask before you go! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join our movement of 108K+ activists.**

body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Monday, February 3rd, 2025. | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAL5rRHvbc_mf9F3-4nFxKvMzDMqzVyLq-3o0_DDG9y1j0p4Heb3X1JRMsKxHv-I6PvG6d-bKGr0zzyWjgtYqUGZow-pDmKpKE9vWXSemp3b5zwCIMKIikZGfxEQwwpt_q1B5GEjMCjqRx7c0BBepK4iNubuFmEW6B5obRrPZEPGyP_FtGL_SY2oLioF_cSvptRito3aPDtePAjCBGT8uRq9sl-bqYqRT-TriZgk6YXS5RMkyyUjwot2KmNVpGd4WlPAhaQSY2lDk7RbKqvUJVHaS0DyexJyDEbHV9-KaltecGVbCu6H4u-2vpUr1xP05OWn9TQ2UUn2J-yAQynfxQavSCOsYk7KFR29vACAbpQeNPI-2Kmwt416hETjwLqTk7QncQvPCKJk7Dux_BGQeUPw/4dp/6-1njUyRQ0abHZoK_z33HA/h0/h001.jpLFOyQ4oXnVME9uc6WszrTPyohfNb3fN6VAJwvwQg8)
---
1️⃣ **_Victory in Minnesota:_ Democrat wins majority-defining special election 🎉 **
Last week, Democrat Doron Clark won his special election for a seat in the incredibly competitive Minnesota Senate – one of the six state legislative chambers where control hinges only a _single_ seat. [This election was a must-win for keeping Democrats in control → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pCAJhl1Y5dz1OwrLn_es0-L-f76R0Nerfkn8N2ZMXe-YO05g1TQeNaeQ3-HNsy0hAudO-Xyk_3BvcMd0L5dVJC3m25Wpw-mRvAoMVGZ0EHk3cDFOm0h49qqJlijZyVSTCd0ZyIPNTyboKM-DByaVluRMc0fahxmuzbINygfOMENBv5-36gkVYZMGjk5gXLJCvQaMI5b6fcZ6IIfYbiU-4zUfVfcwf3g5EGOw4vi4mX7juFDIHxuOezUkAF52xHHThcv8MMQ3t2mU71LgJkttjaDROQgQBQOgQn1QnI2KHL2YyOADN9c_Vxh5dY2Gb0Mtwob-nALJs2eUUwei_kPmMxSgxgXR3x0lvZp21EmVsaeEhXd0qzWReZIyAZZmCs2QZuA2-m0k7q9SkkZgLhNbbyAalv_QpFoTqwjadg-agH2LkeJ-0pIa_EoemY0FTj4T46ECkGLDV9YxMFviep7RqJNqQjiLZGCom8sRVLn_hyIIkdOSpvhE4Rq8DQAEmby0EK7_bOA5Kq1UVc67yZZeQF-CXGYnaMctJqjb8TW8LfTq-DCoWRMpd0zahF9QmNahJQ/4dp/6-1njUyRQ0abHZoK_z33HA/h1/h001.66wfeqJp0K_C5vgMfWA14SrsSdKXq1i-2Em2URQP42Q)
2️⃣ **_Victory in Iowa:_ DLCC Spotlight candidate flips critical senate seat 🎉 **
DLCC Spotlight Candidate Mike Zimmer pulled off an upset victory in Iowa Senate District 35, marking the first state legislative flip of the cycle and a [significant victory for Democrats in the first month of the new year → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pDJgmBKyIiKNcEWino7tm_lq4uwhq1nIhD2MZ2G-OypPoi5g5BhxMebuUyARMBBglcNG93D9yu9KzxmJLyrGAVCrBW9Acm1Q7Vw5tGfAWvBHhr0GAVzKHu24H1SZz7nwkR9Qmn6HrXkJ7BB5YAca5x1a9NvUSUSCTSIrEA3nI5rNAxJ2Jmue5XXMHx21fxfEvUM00ePDDdxfP2H6uzUjNIiJ1iSCxUQLh_bIrivtzqgPZS8hyCVa75eN-1erQafft8yXlkrlOc_wTt2QBJCcrIQQm9jjnBR5CZVjgXD4oUPCvp95WEPiJOpI2EBE2a8IIfhoj7xyZEEMdJKnCnvEY95zQegIbuRiebRx_N1CdJySHSnPHdYY_3GrhTxsR0vNYfKUNy7nDPwV9tVvAZWgxMj_cQsz1bvTVoR4mqhuWq_oMVC_dtaFMz2rLfPlB8tc7p-hb21XjwP0MQQqhQG-nMfxtonhQ91lrkWnOEwqUFsrN8XiV5-FqFGcT9j7HEMeik7KUfmsBB9cZDUjSbFAXJoQe02CkDNrMUNdRlNhIKc4u80ioP4dwQgikq2N6HP7ShG0FQgo0j140UKi5rOzAB6I8A7j5FcW73HRC_wypJ7nNwOIUKNn0RhyfGbUGy4TQ4/4dp/6-1njUyRQ0abHZoK_z33HA/h2/h001.o3EMClDCTGWSgWit0R81ilrX-3D4G_BXGOyyAV9WMq4)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ DLCC announces Delaware Spotlight candidates **
The DLCC announced two Spotlight candidates in Delaware facing special elections on February 15th to defend Democratic power. These strong candidates are working to bolster the Democratic firewall in the states to block the GOP’s dangerous agenda. [**Read more about the candidates here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW8i7dgiWltPqMksHAqnq8gj9CZ52yVD4voPVXadANbECweH1XVrL_DAY1DAl84uS_4_Zsfj-rFd2xxL1WjUlXxVlreLzh9iX8z9y1jclunPiD8Zcnoz8TmVLX_NLMmHOJUmq5SZ4O_WJOFc3AMei7vf9JHu65Dh-aIWEpS4BMTk65EBryomm3MkjpLfhREMNnLTGYnd1l_zOwaFSD39Egb9NMGkRlZ0u2_Acb7WLfPp0ZYwpf4uXz2d6FYsLEnyJXrvhaUZAOp_S2MjGvBb0i8G11RyLzAwA_6dlyYYFLb--UOan2dxMkFtSkHG_tItX7a5Wfz2m7hnCOQseOsoXfYSFKyAZxWWHw0payBuoe5CeFCDfdBR08SKLmSHAMBqwDRyyUSzjj4HPqN7rhGfJamhwe_nyjRAKVllNizJBmDdHq4fpQ_V4zBXS1fKRAFaxIkJFUiii2u3w-MpcIN97Ne2VbEz9p1lM6DhgYb1-Bd7fYOMaUB6uYsSpSvT98NCXgRM6sfsib3_I1p6kCRapMQM/4dp/6-1njUyRQ0abHZoK_z33HA/h3/h001.YJx5aFi1NUIiofEqjmsoCmJu40dA4eBmEqFooVSpIrU)
🌎 **_Climate Crisis:_ State legislatures combat climate change **
Following Trump’s withdrawal from the Paris Climate Accord, state legislatures nationwide are taking up the fight against the climate crisis. In legislative sessions, Democrats have demonstrated they are ready for the challenge ahead and will fight to keep making progress. [**Check out how state Dems are fighting back here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pBUHGbI7bF-S47nlxnRTP05YVU0BbpUe1MiAwpecXrdrZzyCnCRXhLGOGFiLJY7GSS2iHjibc8M688wSeIkXa531ePgBWspvA4jBQHp1pCQmZnlmBMN9d7iz5ej0TKV3Ns5hhjmbERxraPQMRP_tcH22cJduS5IQTRYE2i_GHmpktzbLGhKhP7oZGhG32_nUHKKPCVUKrvSaj0GI8Qk-KZdaGbKrJParAC6qAxXKqBBPOcPIsOQgLrXMFywMOkIB9nWSnx89VVd9m3tG5wx1foItj6BBU6L6OZLIuLeYVUL4JgfN42qJdPrh9sHV8RyZqLAYepUyvfxSVLFxBqojNh-98HiBVqTJomUi6s6w0TlOQLvxJEyH5ub--6rNIAi60K5KzYZb607-A-GLDuHL-N7acjDUK1RO_8nn-46nfrdLTedt60UVr77abppMPbxGwoWFmdRNamgyBRsXn92Xhth5jhe4Xq83P5Ws7JWUdOepHhwrBbK4oxHRybe5Qb7RUu9ofpPWC7tj68aLkHArevH_21Vlh180DOPOLgJ6-r_fK4kjdM4SBwM1uQ_04ZkaR_XX0U90tftk-TsL9LATzP8KX5Gyr5o1haGLN-k3iSXoiwca6JIP-ucqgEWowFqvsw/4dp/6-1njUyRQ0abHZoK_z33HA/h4/h001.Hmf927WHYIF-AhXfRDit5smt7Ba8Qd6RX3Is4TZ1Ofk)
🫏 **_Join the fight:_ Become an Official DLCC Member **
If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDxrBNcNHXqACsGS7rvbl8ETU3DLibhXWMNddjYOXOVS_08E9Q5a9DCIoOzqDn2yRCq9TCvpsPz1Wqc2MQMJBFAeWsIXUo8kXjHzFq7cZbtmFqqLX9ihvh9M8_ltDYEK4-pATtIYFI6qtiXU7UfZRpKVfzjvMSnftZbYXRIRhO1-O-mdh722tN9KuuoEQOgJjTy05Fmrxf4pHdYC9PcR_MsebgwQcrjbnc9Z0Adyg3A2-w7hGQ8CD9r6uwNJd-VemBHfERcdiTmHbcnOwHkvpLp28nqFGuZdov16Gf2Kg6Mq-HPZlZ7CodhDg7mVaAadfXFWfhLSP_wLsSQJZp7Ppf1NV4HKjuAhRRm2N42a5iYf7bil-xBanUNnXO4N_MOUL--MRMriuVOlr2fGtFIMCiF6aEk3dNlU3-4V60KVolkNH4PWRoyy3fkHanxGyLu3dS-KjXclRpf4xhfROpdaATjOLDCxRAO0_Z8IdxwGKSaGLtwCq8G6nz-12bz5G_Vgu2hw1t4dm-fWEb6gXC1CtvuQ/4dp/6-1njUyRQ0abHZoK_z33HA/h5/h001.I5rwE0O3L_AGnEngJrA41pP_ImCNW3hGYwIdP8wQvKo)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Death Threats Don’t Phase Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
They mean I'm doing something right
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=35cbf39898f747459cfb9eee229767b0&_e=Bwgd8I_-mE4-up5L2Wvt7wxUdKVuFLak4qCHNNL8qqtC4rEcZyBMRqxgya8vg-51LcABM7ISuDc99ohflbGxEuth5HWKQle0LvmklTutPkiCavgPG-IJn6cDqLLcnXY43FRgqRUjXn7alK9ufnX2LizptG2DfbsxPrB1M0CJVn9UEpxF0Ti_PoxBPIlqoCPHCaFVg3rib7daPcqOhsgG2zd-d1aj7uAuI-UODhuphSGiv9hYSIkUtYQ0JD6tYaZ4CJsVUHH4x90DtsiH6dE3bk5KaFFm9hneYPdjk_oLEzQSsl2Qxw1jOW2A7ORe_Qb3NFcHyHZMVEjYOTikVhDfHA%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

**_I 'm no stranger to passionate SEC fans hurling insults and threats my way. After all, when you dominate the SEC for just under a decade, those fans are going to start lashing out._**

**It wasn 't until I became a United States Senator who supports President Trump and putting America First that those harmless insults escalated into death threats. **

Since last year, I've received well over a dozen threats on my life. I brushed them off at first, but once they tried to assassinate President Trump, I knew it was time to take them more seriously.

**Regardless, they don 't phase me. I'll never stop fighting for our America-First Principles. [But I need your support to keep me going.](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=35cbf39898f747459cfb9eee229767b0&_e=Bwgd8I_-mE4-up5L2Wvt7wxUdKVuFLak4qCHNNL8qqtC4rEcZyBMRqxgya8vg-51LcABM7ISuDc99ohflbGxEuth5HWKQle0LvmklTutPkiCavgPG-IJn6cDqLLcnXY43FRgqRUjXn7alK9ufnX2LizptG2DfbsxPrB1M0CJVn9UEpxF0Ti_PoxBPIlqoCPHn6zfTXdN6dcj6t_9I8HI3o-YTdlUs8dXTIC_h7D6to63j21nfbsJAeEAKLbKapt_okgBW7XREhTr0FcItrrS1oYPFY5ST1RpIioGWmMoBIP3nvtart0PHvNN-70CnC0Aj03u5D0yD6lzJgGGclMecw%3D%3D)**

The Radical Left Mob will never rest when it comes to doing anything they can to defeat President Trump and his MAGA Movement. They'll target anyone who aligns with Trump.

_Well, I realized that if they 're threatening me, it probably means I'm doing something right._

**Now that I 'm running for re-election in 2026, I have no doubt the threats will continue. I'm going to need every resource available to me so I can push through and win. That's why I'm emailing you.**

[**I 'm humbly asking you to chip in just $15 before midnight. **](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=35cbf39898f747459cfb9eee229767b0&_e=Bwgd8I_-mE4-up5L2Wvt7wxUdKVuFLak4qCHNNL8qqtC4rEcZyBMRqxgya8vg-51LcABM7ISuDc99ohflbGxEuth5HWKQle0LvmklTutPkiCavgPG-IJn6cDqLLcnXY43FRgqRUjXn7alK9ufnX2LizptG2DfbsxPrB1M0CJVn9UEpxF0Ti_PoxBPIlqoCPHB-Jdd2rE7oDBOfhLf4bIqICofX-J0YsyrX7VtN7nrjb_bdAJMaihdrWxRwYHne7dpTXgRO1KYRs9xCX-D9ko5vI31ltJDHaFbAbI-MR59QLQReVV1sGbIAsYWREqOtButbvup69xi50_AbN5qaHK5w%3D%3D)

Campaigns nowadays are a lot like College Football's recruitment. The schools with the most money often win and recruit the best players. In politics, the candidates with the most money often win, regardless of their politics. That's exactly why the Democrats are able to keep winning, despite Republicans' agenda, which better represents the vast majority of Americans' needs.

**I need to get a head start now so I can keep pace with the Radical Left millionaire donors.[Would you be willing to donate just $15 or anything you can spare today?](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=35cbf39898f747459cfb9eee229767b0&_e=Bwgd8I_-mE4-up5L2Wvt7wxUdKVuFLak4qCHNNL8qqtC4rEcZyBMRqxgya8vg-51LcABM7ISuDc99ohflbGxEuth5HWKQle0LvmklTutPkiCavgPG-IJn6cDqLLcnXY43FRgqRUjXn7alK9ufnX2LizptG2DfbsxPrB1M0CJVn9UEpxF0Ti_PoxBPIlqoCPH_2dynONNPT6ybMTLdI0GPimp6EaD9pPQLdF6i4GhH3Mq8-bE5tuzGSq4mlWucXDi2VzKLPp6GpDx3dmFAAM_qFcxgcKF4FkXCri-yBx2sDeWJhYvPUlUsry6xFbqb-48BWkiMPCJWeUgZFk7qoul8g%3D%3D)**

Thank you,
Coach Tuberville

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=35cbf39898f747459cfb9eee229767b0&_e=Bwgd8I_-mE4-up5L2Wvt7wxUdKVuFLak4qCHNNL8qqtC4rEcZyBMRqxgya8vg-51LcABM7ISuDc99ohflbGxEuth5HWKQle0LvmklTutPkiCavgPG-IJn6cDqLLcnXY43FRgqRUjXn7alK9ufnX2LizptG2DfbsxPrB1M0CJVn9UEpxF0Ti_PoxBPIlqoCPHUE4tPrscFBjSlTmEtQu3pCCE1vKhkB6e29xeOoFoyMxcSLaRrBOC5GfWsIWE1kf5Np8XPastLTtGH6InVLj38BLKJfFrRNxipP-EcMUopjhLIByB3Tvbguz3-UaEt-Jpw8l0R0kX8tJ-nQFpcGiLqg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: They mean I'm doing something right | Peter, I 'm no stranger to passionate SEC fans hurling insults and threats my way. After all, when you dominate the SEC for just under a decade, those fans are going to start lashing out. It wasn 't until I became a United States Senator who supports President Trump and putting America First that those harmless insults escalated into death threats. Since last year, I've received well over a dozen threats on my life. I brushed them off at first, but once they tried to assassinate President Trump, I knew it was time to take them more seriously. Regardless, they don 't phase me. I'll never stop fighting for our America-First Principles. The Radical Left Mob will never rest when it comes to doing anything they can to defeat President Trump and his MAGA Movement. They'll target anyone who aligns with Trump. Well, I realized that if they 're threatening me, it probably means I'm doing something right. Now that I 'm running for re-election in 2026, I have no doubt the threats will continue. I'm going to need every resource available to me so I can push through and win. That's why I'm emailing you. Campaigns nowadays are a lot like College Football's recruitment. The schools with the most money often win and recruit the best players. In politics, the candidates with the most money often win, regardless of their politics. That's exactly why the Democrats are able to keep winning, despite Republicans' agenda, which better represents the vast majority of Americans' needs. I need to get a head start now so I can keep pace with the Radical Left millionaire donors. Thank you, Coach Tuberville | Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. It’s Gay Valimont, FL-1 candidate for Congress and concerned citizen. **On February 2, 2025, thousands of protesters gathered in downtown Los Angeles to voice their opposition to the Trump administration's renewed deportation policies and were met with force.** Protesters carrying signs with messages such as "The real criminal is in the White House" and "Jesus said 'Love Thy Neighbor,' not deport them," were met with Law enforcement. Riot gear was used to deter protestors from continuing, **and I need your help before special elections roll around to ensure the people’s voices are heard.**
---

These events highlight the deep concerns many Americans have regarding the administration's immigration policies, which are seen as lacking compassion and fairness. _The heavy-handed response to peaceful protesters further underscores the need for accountability and justice in our nation's approach to immigration._ As your candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, I am committed to advocating for humane and just immigration policies that respect the dignity of all individuals. We must ensure that our nation's actions reflect our core values of**compassion, fairness, and respect for human rights.** We house shattered families in this country that are witnessing their friends and kin be targeted.

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Slams Senate President Spilka’s Opposition to Legislative Audit: A Call for Transparency in Massachusetts
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tf0WsxRAd7bmiLzg2rWWDbcdPR9Sp-h3W9f0L99BgSmcBi5wKHlg5WV2Tf7q7jsRmmEFU9XlOztSvB1xZScDsCGPqCmHc1vew2mxXEc2Gs5CVfJZhs1ikr1LzGG8K0ajCg-YVw5ufTC8BTOMchcPdw==&c=YkkfAqhE49bt40aJ1SPKD6Wi_p70wjrPu2FvWtPE9UjR22eCOC_OkQ==&ch=mcv_A_dBbrstTxlKVxw7NY7HqOaKYSuLsRD5lTrXyY6GehtRugkBog==)
---
| MassGOP Slams Senate President Spilka's Opposition to Legislative Audit: A Call for Transparency in Massachusetts
---
---
| Boston, MA - The Massachusetts Republican Party stands in strong support of Auditor Dianna DiZoglio's efforts and the 72% of Massachusetts voters who called for a full audit of the legislature. Over the weekend, Senate President Karen Spilka rebuked DiZoglio's calls to audit the legislature, a mandate set forth by a ballot question. The MassGOP condemns Spilka's remarks as she pushes against the audit while claiming that the legislature is already transparent.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a statement on Spilka's remarks, saying, "Massachusetts ranks among the lowest in the nation in terms of government transparency. It's absurd for the Senate President to attempt to spin this reality. The truth is, everyone in the Commonwealth knows that real debates and legislative deal-making happen in closed-door meetings and behind 'executive sessions.' These practices bar the press and public from knowing what is truly happening while bills are being debated, shielding the legislature from accountability."
Carnevale continued, "Invoking President Trump into the argument is nothing more than an attempt by the Senate President to deflect from the issue. This is not a partisan matter--it is a bipartisan issue. The people of Massachusetts deserve transparency, and they have spoken loud and clear. Voters across the state overwhelmingly support an audit, allowing the Auditor to open the books in both the House and Senate."
"The fact that Senate President Spilka and the Democratic supermajority are so resistant to this audit is a red flag," Carnevale added. "Their reluctance to let the Auditor hold the legislature accountable only further proves the need for this transparency. We stand firmly with Auditor DiZoglio's efforts and the people of Massachusetts in demanding the accountability they deserve."

### ###

name: Diane Sare
subject: Make These Calls Today
body:
President Trump is moving aggressively to rid our intelligence agencies of politically and financially motivated hacks who run operations directly contrary to our interests as Americans and human beings.

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gabbard_patel_mobe&n=1)
---
| Friend – President Trump is moving aggressively to rid our intelligence agencies of politically and financially motivated hacks who run operations directly contrary to our interests as Americans and human beings. Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel are an important part of his team, as is RFK, Jr., who has publicly stated that he believes the CIA had a role in the assassinations of his family members. The nominations for Tulsi Gabbard for DNI (Director, National Intelligence), and Kash Patel for FBI Director are likely to be voted on as early as this week! **Take six minutes to watch the video below and call ALL of the Senators named here, plus your own, if they are not on the list. Gabbard and Patel must be confirmed and you are demanding that your senators vote to confirm them.**
## **CALLS/EMAILS TO THE SENATE**
Priority Senators:
* Susan Collins (ME), 202-224-2523
* Todd Young (IN), 202-224-5623
* Mike Rounds (SD) 202-224-5642
* Thom Tillis (NC), 202-224-6342
* Lindsey Graham (SC). 202-224-5972.

Others, not on either committee but relevant to the floor vote: Mitch McConnell (KY), 202-224-2541; John Curtis (UT), 202-224-5251, and Lisa Murkowski (AK), 202-224-6665. It would be useful to call Sen. Jerry Moran (KS), 202-2246521, also. He’s listed in a Politico account as undecided. On the Democratic side, it would be important to get calls to Ron Wyden (OR), 202-224-5244. He was the only Democrat in the Gabbard hearing who seemed sympathetic to an agenda of confronting the surveillance state. Always try to reach a staffer if the office prompt gives you that choice. If no one answers, or the prompt doesn’t give you the choice, leave a message. The message is simple, some variant of what our banner says:**“End the Wars! Stop the Lies! Confirm Gabbard and Patel!”** Don’t wind up for the winning pitch: the staffers are basically keeping track of calls on a scratchpad, yea or nay. To reach other senators, the Senate switchboard: 202-224-3121. [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmNNapQ4bR1pTr_5MzvwuZx2&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=gabbard_patel_mobe&n=2 "Is Tulsi Gabbard a threat to the war establishment?")
* * *
Diane Sare President, The LaRouche Organization
* * *

subject: Team Sarah's Week in Review: Arkansas is leading the way ⬆️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter, welcome to Team Sarah's week in review! This week was a whirlwind with Governor Sanders and Arkansas leading the charge on the most pressing issues: from school choice to fighting for an extension of President Trump’s tax cuts. Catch up on all the latest ⬇️
---
|
---
| | 📚 **ARKANSAS LEADS:** Governor Sanders participates in White House roundtable on school choice
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/VZQ-zfccSBRycuYoXeThPLeBNZ5k5K4JDn1A41DVsvymxN6GX2a9jAgGBMcf8TzrA3UJV9zC0yrzUhKQOlK9MtHIsqk75aAp8JIn-fX21d8MpYhv52B4dqp4Ay3GVIbv3BLlaJ-KYPd3BEK7oMSB5mwOBeek2cOmyPHrc2ZAWF2_85a-_DQoQpWHVL7QP1wZ0AxelPzN4yZMG1Ftmw1Yr0BQWBwEKxiQft-GmoVe8bz-krFHZwFMAKOq514CIogM0X8sD_Fvitul2drjlo5-OGBmncM8hfXCsakZdMkzwnfP/0ym_xo_mfMMPyqZNK3wbHsSXr-nP84ji/5)
---
|
---
▶️ **HAND UP, NOT A HAND OUT:** Governor Sanders pushes for Medicaid work requirement
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/M4ZJ86IC6qpkVwEe6Jy-QPDZucX04KWHpu-FMk8BYug5OyfGdQDuK0DkBsaX3DjI4JnXnXXUTLwNPhfgdz1sx3UIGQcXlITXLRFyGUfES21BNb9ZMfwdhGh86lg6IwjfZ0NfsHGze4Mrj0dudQzCevTSVpDcQC88VpzGCvrY6BxRr64SFWiE8ifClGBAOTWJmddpOlIeVrYEd_S0Qt98IG8lQyNGT7mFt6eizU9UHeNN0g_JCCoT70_aAZoNCNtBlUWAdCY/7IvFk_Oax9U0MNnUZuu6QN87KIQkoFvO/5)
---
Arkansas just announced its plans for a Medicaid work requirement. If able-bodied, working age adults get free healthcare, they should be expected to work, go to school, volunteer, or take care of their kids.
---
[**WATCH SARAH’S ADDRESS**](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/senAnX-3SKTupWHFMrZ5SHgIx9YSI2MX-lG7SQwWkQw88sQ68oIn5rh85do4lWWofOBJ_4VESSSoOPEoW4tAJGBiQBbC3LDUUkig41tg7UjOwQmP-_isnf7Yvm3r8cwvIw7eRERas_H5dzHqPCXD6St2wz_3sHKz6DfAfgLPYFZ_MWJO_rta73ziFcdDCr_ze0jCFD2kxx7BZj0Uv7XgQaRrSR5ICvr_Ne37vhl6D0UVlnNeqni-kRRAvUpzBBbsC947-hI/EtO37J11K2WYEqiPvmjtbx8hOg9cgdvC/5)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The constitutional crisis we've been worried about is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020325_1&amount=25]
If you've been watching events unfold this weekend, folks, then you know what we're talking about. If not, here's an overview:
Elon Musk's team of private citizens gained access to the Treasury Department's classified payment system [https://apnews.com/article/donald-trump-elon-musk-doge-treasury-5e26cc80fcb766981cea56afd57ae759] . Musk's "DOGE" team -- filled with non-federal employees and not a department created by Congress or presidential commission created legally -- is now reportedly "turning off" payments Congress approved, line by line. Reportedly the "engineers" accessing these systems are former Musk company interns [https://www.wired.com/story/elon-musk-government-young-engineers/] .
Federal workers blockade the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) [https://dcmediagroup.us/2025/02/02/federal-workers-block-doors-of-admin-building-over-elon-musk-data-breach/] . These workers spent the weekend protesting outside OPM after Musk's team accessed potentially classified data there as well. They reportedly blocked more "data miners" from "DOGE" from getting in the building and taking more information on hard drives.
Now Musk and Trump are trying to illegally shut down USAID [https://apnews.com/article/trump-musk-usaid-c0c7799be0b2fa7cad4c806565985fe2] , the U.S. Agency for International Development. USAID was created by Congress in 1961 as a way for the United States to aid allies around the world. USAID employees were reportedly told to not come to work and USAID's grants around the world have apparently been turned off. Presidents can only be granted "reorganization authority" to close or consolidate agencies by act of Congress , which was last granted to Ronald Reagan decades ago.
None of these things directly impact voting rights. But we're terrified by the implications of these sweeping and illegal actions -- likely just the tip of the iceberg -- so we're putting aside our plans for today to ask you to act. We all need to demand that Congress do their jobs , find out what's going on, walk down to these departments and knock on the door and demand answers.
Please: Call your member of Congress via the switchboard at (202) 224-3121 or find their direct number for the House [https://www.house.gov/representatives/find-your-representative#:~:text=If%20you%20know%20who%20your,the%20U.S.%20House%20switchboard%20operator.] or Senate [https://www.senate.gov/senators/index.htm] . Call their state offices if you don't get an answer in DC. Ask them if they support the President taking these actions and if Congress has given up separations of powers. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020325_1&amount=25]
No one else can hold them accountable, so we must do the hard work of our democracy before too much harm is done.
Sincerely,
The Voter Action Project Team

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020325_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020325_1&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] If you've been watching events unfold this weekend, folks, then you know what we're talking about. If not, here's an overview: Elon Musk's team of private citizens gained access to the Treasury Department's classified payment system [] . Musk's "DOGE" team -- filled with non-federal employees and not a department created by Congress or presidential commission created legally -- is now reportedly "turning off" payments Congress approved, line by line. Reportedly the "engineers" accessing these systems are former Musk company interns [] . Federal workers blockade the Office of Personnel Management (OPM) [] . These workers spent the weekend protesting outside OPM after Musk's team accessed potentially classified data there as well. They reportedly blocked more "data miners" from "DOGE" from getting in the building and taking more information on hard drives. Now Musk and Trump are trying to illegally shut down USAID [] , the U.S. Agency for International Development. USAID was created by Congress in 1961 as a way for the United States to aid allies around the world. USAID employees were reportedly told to not come to work and USAID's grants around the world have apparently been turned off. Presidents can only be granted "reorganization authority" to close or consolidate agencies by act of Congress , which was last granted to Ronald Reagan decades ago. None of these things directly impact voting rights. But we're terrified by the implications of these sweeping and illegal actions -- likely just the tip of the iceberg -- so we're putting aside our plans for today to ask you to act. We all need to demand that Congress do their jobs , find out what's going on, walk down to these departments and knock on the door and demand answers. Please: Call your member of Congress via the switchboard at (202) 224-3121 or find their direct number for the House [.] or Senate [] . Call their state offices if you don't get an answer in DC. Ask them if they support the President taking these actions and if Congress has given up separations of powers. [] No one else can hold them accountable, so we must do the hard work of our democracy before too much harm is done. Sincerely, The Voter Action Project Team Interested in supporting our work defending our fundamental right to vote? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. # [Dear Canada: Sorry our President is an idiot](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3dfe4a32-ea99-48b4-b08d-d8222a72620c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4fdaf42-36c4-476f-bf19-787727d98f84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Canada: You've been a great neighbor for the last 150+ years, and we look forward to continuing that relationship into the future. [So please accept our apologies](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta96f10c4-4392-43a9-893e-50906b35557d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for electing an idiot who seems intent on coming up with a new way to insult you every day -- threatening to make you a state, calling your prime minister "governor", and now imposing massive tariffs. **Every country has idiots -- we just made the mistake of making our biggest one the president.** _**([Please add your name, tell Canada we're sorry, and get all your fellow Americans to do the same](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04233e72-fac4-4df4-ac00-4718ced1b0c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))**_

clean_body: The President can only pardon in federal cases. The President can only pardon in federal cases. | MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI ATTN: Friend, Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life. Unfortunately, because the charges are at the state level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me. After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag. If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly! And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case. But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side. Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia. And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

What do you think of when you hear the word “oligarchy,” team?
Do you see rich people sitting around a table laughing maniacally? Or Russians wrapped in furs and jewelry worth more than your house?
The reality is kind of boring and much closer to home. **Here’s how the American oligarchy works:**
According to a study by political scientists Martin Gilens and Benjamin Page, the wealthiest 10% of Americans have far more influence over our elected officials than the rest of us.
The ultra-rich pressure Congress to pass laws that favor their small circle instead of benefiting the majority of us.
**That cycle will keep repeating if we don’t do something about it.**
The corruption in our political system is caused by money influencing our elections, lawmakers, and special interest groups. Fortunately, we have a solution, and we want you to be part of it.

name: Senator Blackburn
subject: I'm starting to get nervous
body:
Things have really taken a turn since Election Day

| |
---
| | | _Well, Peter, I 'll admit it..._

Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn't be further from the truth!

Fundraising has _**PLUMMETED**_ , and now I'm starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our upcoming MAJOR goal.

I really hate that I'm having to bother you with this, but you've been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me.

I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I'm worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach this goal. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority.

So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before midnight.

_**[I'm personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my critical goal.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/F2cund--Fbrw0Yo79t64s04KXuOcd9t2hnSBr0x8onorFV1kxiao73uLu78nAtTIbZJomosQSB-OcoV7awFxpA8NLGvxzoweZ5b674SzP8xuRnN732FVay0s93b5ZMxfyuZYm3jkZN080sIiTlGUIgB9rcYhS2s7Izrfr2wf9gWu7lNA5QFrKcEtkogZJxc5O-28cOYEWyBg9i5jKc1mKDKhlr6DA-Zd5LUAroGVrJit3y9O5brrKujwVCJvZLPf9qZf0j7bMNQe8dtQXrH_zscmo16T4e85SXZ-qE2ESl6Qw-p2BEmrkGxfXxPNs4edDV1CXAUGeODDxG7J5L2R712J1VfBmUBd4cGh4RjrK1D0xuFN8yl_gs1lXfdRUeJCp1bvYHM6V2fWvcrtqd3fClxHJH0VnW4lmWqlHtFwM4efYOozFmyG5SSlJ6RBdr7lQmP5vg9qhNnVKw32zuaMqvv6WC5IX2Ps3xnRtG9xlDCMP5yu7DedYE6CL-xTHFEGhvLGziZc8ZItfhacn7WClhqEZJ6JicKKKZkwNuqE_EKxdy75/xCD9Ia-4byvNQ0udnun_fgJQKxY4bdGV/5 " I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my critical goal.")**_

I wish so badly I didn't have to ask you this. I promise you that.

It's the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this...

But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it's a no-brainer in my book.

_**[I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/yxpL1FORzM5wpMLrtfAkpnqF6pk4A7rrKfEvsNomYuEkcrxE3mNprLfg5YNBUZszCcGDHhVT6pcKfPP1qQ1iC58AgrNTyXgYBJ7clH8KNrod_zwN787lLgj9Yp9QyHjwKiUBl7j7wu6uXIWBxWn2x7APg_9aoZgy4l0Oampce8pAQAn0beOEaIwtMRgUlEK7iXaiJXFB9sbT-JjpYk_v9lxGK9Ox7V_NVYs_khRhbYD2ojrrbFuKDXM6yINZpLnUuiLzfdw41D3tFTV1ZQzNQE0uWA9bHhP6Djt2xAVCXM1nr4dwH6bpUkv0G2Bj8JzhEuQ0iNVkOZe2AOVJM_lvnryVs6Yl0K0DAU8li5VoqoFpJHjULGDYFvI4ZAwhXIolkHPBj1aQ3KrmtD-nrtIG19piaU9gUDTCxn0UW0V8RFEaXJed3JO9TX3s4_1Gj8df8keejKgPBinWClo3pCRDj7IV4HxM1F_4OrYFPhu8qPY1eH41Ulc-z6zoHOMPPpopA8mjUyZ8VlAm44jCoBIQ65qDq3mgwBFnEkaLaRhm8jUXpMG7/bY5s5RmMoES6CERIsApz7bmuRkU8XrVI/5 "I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference.")**_

Thank you and God bless you,

Marsha Blackburn

clean_body: Things have really taken a turn since Election Day | | | | | Well, Peter, I 'll admit it... Things have really taken a turn since Election Day. I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn't be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED , and now I'm starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our upcoming MAJOR goal. I really hate that I'm having to bother you with this, but you've been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I'm worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach this goal. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before midnight. " I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my critical goal." I wish so badly I didn't have to ask you this. I promise you that. It's the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this... But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it's a no-brainer in my book. "I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference." Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund PO Box 3750 Brentwood, TN 37024 This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community. |
