| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He's signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he's named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments. Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks - **Kash Patel as FBI Director**. _**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7c2af0f2d51341298bd3b7840545e314&_e=199-zWKq4YY472TathlKuEzZc0NH1RZlzvnIgfPm2RFaMaYmRfYgdr1ciPIogxljC3r7uQ7VjHV32YnYDMY8JU4syAhWOG9pN0bFPGnKk3OGrSh0mepvVb6owPSXfHgZ9l3uflymfAPxawCe8kfm_yLkFE8S6PHsyAa40fNG4aMtpzuuvUjEwlHz4OQlXEU1eDVOWM3ZdyfEihJPDUJLwlzWI76OTSUzAIZvB119zDeDkMN6umKNcv24e0aDjFpgBxh1qXvodCkr_l7vx8Xah-m7jgIDybizwNAQQSlh6vjuO3T4xynMu93KKkLD0uCi3TPlNY1cgbosd86JEEPO54s2c3QTxnE226Cm6biaoeM%3D)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He's proven that he won't back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray's leadership, the FBI's actions cast a dark shadow on our nation's federal law enforcement - it became a political tool used against the Biden administration's political opponents and innocent American citizens. Under Wray's watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential "Domestic Terrorists."**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he's nominated Kash Patel - someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI. But we know what's coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel's confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI... ... including bullying and coercing "Republican" Senators into voting "No." If we don't stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can't let that happen. We won't let them undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7c2af0f2d51341298bd3b7840545e314&_e=199-zWKq4YY472TathlKuEzZc0NH1RZlzvnIgfPm2RFaMaYmRfYgdr1ciPIogxljC3r7uQ7VjHV32YnYDMY8JU4syAhWOG9pN0bFPGnKk3OGrSh0mepvVb6owPSXfHgZ9l3uflymfAPxawCe8kfm_yLkFE8S6PHsyAa40fNG4aMtpzuuvUjEwlHz4OQlXEU1eDVOWM3ZdyfEihJPDUJLws9BpXyVeocGUB24lv1ymr2jN2VoOVZh8HNicPYUgynCNi1r7_WHAALHkkDupjFVUEjRe6asRbYgXePiKF3v-6Xo7voul8E83L6dPn66PVyHJiV2CT5gEtz6w0g6TgBZhmpWDwyD8qSrNTyTZ9dQSlQ%3D)**_ And my friend, this isn't just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump's America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans. Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we'll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump's vision for a stronger America. That can't happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign - [**but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7c2af0f2d51341298bd3b7840545e314&_e=199-zWKq4YY472TathlKuEzZc0NH1RZlzvnIgfPm2RFaMaYmRfYgdr1ciPIogxljC3r7uQ7VjHV32YnYDMY8JU4syAhWOG9pN0bFPGnKk3OGrSh0mepvVb6owPSXfHgZ9l3uflymfAPxawCe8kfm_yLkFE8S6PHsyAa40fNG4aMtpzuuvUjEwlHz4OQlXEU1eDVOWM3ZdyfEihJPDUJLwiEkVZQWq-CbR5LhejsyvXAVckvnbkQtshY9xP4pKm3BgOItuxEFJ33Pg1k5TPdhzGjlR39CIuoYvvjUIgvttMpYi968wk0hQbliPE9_Ymmzg_BBwJyS4f20XIwLkBjmVbeDC50wA6FevEsZMXakYAU%3D)

---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director.**

No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action - and with you by our side, we're an unstoppable force. **_But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination - _****_[So please don't delay!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7c2af0f2d51341298bd3b7840545e314&_e=199-zWKq4YY472TathlKuEzZc0NH1RZlzvnIgfPm2RFaMaYmRfYgdr1ciPIogxljC3r7uQ7VjHV32YnYDMY8JU4syAhWOG9pN0bFPGnKk3OGrSh0mepvVb6owPSXfHgZ9l3uflymfAPxawCe8kfm_yLkFE8S6PHsyAa40fNG4aMtpzuuvUjEwlHz4OQlXEU1eDVOWM3ZdyfEihJPDUJLwktsOdkDbeRcdzaezxvTd3gu4o618J8rRciAWxTYX25XPfB8IvM5CGeafYhHa6lxka-4wE-soFf6wruVqjRX88hNCWdKLaMYdERio9o-cZXPv0XWZlw5njtIyMVS-xEVP0y5oPaobYPtXZyzpLw9Jvo%3D)_** Let's make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1, Leesburg FL 34748 | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Senator Dick Anderson
subject: 2025 Legislative Session Kick-Off!
body:
Senator Anderson Legislative Newsletter

[ https://content.govdelivery.com/accounts/ORLEG/bulletins/3ce71fa ]

Senator Anderson
________________________________________________________________________

Welcome
________________________________________________________________________

Swearing in ceremony with Chief of Staff Bryan Iverson
________________________________________________________________________

The* 83rd Oregon Legislative Session* kicked off last week. The schedule has been filling up fast with committee hearings, meetings, dinners and events. My team and I have been working hard to read emails, check voicemails, and schedule meetings in the office.

There is a lot of exciting legislation coming out this session that will impact the constituents of our district, as well as the state of Oregon. In future newsletters, I will be touching on bills I am proposing and bills I think are really important to keep an eye on through the legislative process. Be sure to watch out for these updates!

Representative Gomberg and I are working on organizing a monthly virtual meeting focusing on legislative updates. Once we have these dates scheduled I will update the district on how you will be able to view these from *your own home.*

________________________________________________________________________

2025 Committees

________________________________________________________________________

Committee Assignments
________________________________________________________________________

what's been on the schedule?
________________________________________________________________________

Modular Home Workshop

*Western Governors Association*- I travelled to Bend to be a part of the* Western Governors Association*. I sat in on many workshops relating to housing, and I was honored to moderate the workshop on *Secular Modular Homes*.

________________________________________________________________________

*City Day at the Capitol- The League of City's Legislative Day *is a chance where Mayor's and elected officials from all over Oregon have a chance to meet with their legislators to discuss concerns in their local communities. The *League of City's* is *celebrating 100 years* this year- what a *great* *accomplishment*!

LOC Day

________________________________________________________________________

LOC Day

During the *LOC City Day at the Capitol *I had the pleasure of meeting with Mayors and city officials from *Yachats, Bay City, Newport, Florence, North Bend, Philomath and Lincoln City.* Each city shared a little bit about their vision and goals for the future of their cities.

________________________________________________________________________

I had the honor of meeting with the *Colville Tribes Chairman Jarre-Michael Erickson. *We discussed the Colville's work on the *Wallowa Dam* to restore salmon passage and the tribes' historical treaty rights in the *Wallowa Valley*.

Tribal Leaders of Colville

________________________________________________________________________

Pacific Seafood

My team had the pleasure of joining *Pacific Seafood* at their event in Salem. They got to learn about the processing industry, learn about the wastewater bacteria bill they are pursuing, and try some of the wonderful seafood products this company has to offer.

*Pacific Seafood* is a family owned and operated company that is dedicated to providing the healthiest proteins on the planet. They employee over 3,000 employees in many different locations all across the Pacific, some of which are in *our district*! Pacific Seafood participates in all parts of the supply chain as well, making sure they provide their customers with the freshest, highest-quality, and most sustainable products possible. If you get a chance, be sure to try some of their *crowd favorites* such as Dungeness Crab, Rockfish, Oysters, Salmon and Steelhead.

Learn more about Pacific Seafood Here! [ https://www.pacificseafood.com/ ]

________________________________________________________________________

*International Holocaust Remembrance Day*- *January 27th* was *International Holocaust Remembrance Day*, which marks the liberation of *Auschwitz-Birkenau* concentration camp in 1945. We observe *Holocaust Remembrance Day*, a solemn occasion to reflect on the unimaginable loss and suffering endured by six million Jews, along with millions of others, during the Holocaust. It is a day to honor survivors, remember the victims, and commit ourselves to ensuring such atrocities never happen again.

Day of Rememberance

________________________________________________________________________

Latest News
________________________________________________________________________

Bend

Western Governers Association Initiative Workshop- Scaling Modular Homes [ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xzMt1giUKwI ]- Click the link to watch the workshop on *Scaling Modular Homes*. The panel discusses modular homes as a cost-effective alternative to traditional housing.

________________________________________________________________________

Hooked on Oregon Podcast [ https://www.hookedonoregon.com/podcast-1/episode/7b193663/hooked-on-oregon-12325 ]- I joined hosts *Cam Parry* and *Mark Mattecheck* to discuss natural resources, specifically wildfire prevention. In this episode we discuss the *Rogue Siskiyou Wildfire Training Center* funding bill and what Oregon would do if wildfire underwriters and insurance companies pull out.

Hooked on Oregon

________________________________________________________________________

Yachats New Article

Yachats News [ https://yachatsnews.com/2025-legislative-outlook-from-lincoln-countys-two-lawmakers/ ]- *Yachats News* sat down with *Representative Gomberg* and me, in separate interviews, to discuss the challenges facing Oregon Legislature this session. I discussed the *"coastal caucus"* where members of both the House and Senate, from both parties, work together to be *"a big loud voice"* for *coastal communities*.

________________________________________________________________________

Community Updates
________________________________________________________________________

Earlier this month, outside of *Corvallis*, a 19-car train carrying fertilizer, derailed from a train bridge, with railcars falling into the Mary's River. My office was constantly in contact with the company relating to contamination, investigation in the cause or derailment, clean-up of the area, and best course of action to make sure railroad customers could continue to receive freight while the rail bridge is closed. We are happy to report that the water quality sampling came back negative for any contamination. The company is working with DEQ to monitor long-term issues. The cause for the derailment is still unknown at this time and is under investigation.

________________________________________________________________________

Meet my team

________________________________________________________________________

Bryan Iverson, Chief of Staff

*Bryan Iverson*

Chief of Staff

Bryan.Iverson@oregonlegislature.gov

________________________________________________________________________

*Michael Town II*

Legislative Director

Michael.Town@oregonlegislature.gov

Michael Town II

________________________________________________________________________

Sam

*Samantha Bebout*

Office Manager

Samantha.Bebout@oregonlegislature.gov

________________________________________________________________________

District Spotlight
________________________________________________________________________

In future issues of the newsletter we would like to highlight* members of the community* who go *above and beyond*. If you are in the district and would like to* nominate* someone, please send the nominations to my office manager Sam at *Samantha.Bebout@oregonlegislature.gov* to be considered!

________________________________________________________________________

How to Participate

________________________________________________________________________

The connection between *people* and their *government* is bolstered when the public has *substantial opportunity* to let their concerns be *heard* by their *elected officials*. Below are a few ways that *YOU* can join in on the legislative process.

* OLIS- Oregon Legislative Information System [ https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1 ]- This is where you can find extensive details about every bill as well as follow them through the legislative process. This is also where you can view committee hearings online.
* Legislative Session Participation Guide [ https://www.oregonlegislature.gov/marsh/Documents/Legislative_Session_Participation_Guide.pdf ]- This is a wonderful resource with everything you will need to know about how to participate in the Legislative Session. Links to find your legislatures, how to follow bills and watch meetings, how to testify and visiting the Capitol.

________________________________________________________________________

*Capitol Phone: *503-986-1705
*Capitol Address: *900 Court St NE, S-303, Salem, OR, 97301
*Email: *Sen.DickAnderson@oregonlegislature.gov
*Website: *http://www.oregonlegislature.gov/anderson [ https://www.oregonlegislature.gov/anderson ]

Replies to this message are sent to an unmonitored mailbox.
To contact me, please click here: Sen.DickAnderson@oregonlegislature.gov

________________________________________________________________________

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com using GovDelivery · 707 17th St, Suite 4000 · Denver, CO 80202 · 1-800-439-1420 GovDelivery logo [ https://subscriberhelp.granicus.com/ ]

name: Letitia James
subject: All we've accomplished together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
All this and more made possible with your support
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101477766/526075150/-1997846894?refcode=jtk1798-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM2YTdlOS00ZWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwycGG3gT79ICaFJviu8t0t8SKRX1tJ5-79pRw980nM=)
---
Peter, ever since I became New York's attorney general, I've fought _relentlessly_ to defend our values, stand up for justice, and hold the powerful and corrupt accountable.

**And in 2024, I stayed true to that fight, securing some major legal victories for the people of New York – wins that I owe to this incredible team of fearless fighters. Here are just a few of our major accomplishments we achieved together this past year:**
**Defending the Vulnerable and Voiceless**

In a monumental victory, my office put a predatory company in its place for exploiting _thousands_ of immigrant families and padding their pockets with their abusive and deceptive tactics. This judgement brought justice to the victims and sent an important message: My office will not hesitate to take action to protect the most vulnerable from malfeasance.
**Standing Up to Big Pharma**

It's no secret that many pharmaceutical companies have taken advantage of innocent consumers. But together, we're holding them accountable – securing **$700 million** from Johnson & Johnson for lying about its products causing cancer and taking on drug manufacturers for driving up prescription drug costs by nearly **1,000%**.
**Keeping Our Communities Safe**

With your support, my office has helped take more drugs and guns off the streets of New York. We helped break up **nine **drug and gun trafficking rings and seized **383 lethal firearms** – a step in the right direction for the health and public safety of all.
**Protecting Our Children**

In our fight against the vaping epidemic, we've secured a historic**$462 _million_ **settlement against Juul for targeting minors. We've also passed landmark legislation to protect children and teens from addictive social media algorithms.
**The Fight Ahead**

These victories are not just wins for justice – they're a testament to all we can accomplish when we come together and defend the rights and well-being of New Yorkers and all people.** And now, more than ever, I'm determined to keep fighting for the future this great state deserves.**
Thank you for standing by me.
– Letitia James
| | **HELP US SECURE MORE WINS**
I am incredibly proud of all we've achieved together in 2024.

But now in 2025, we have even more tough and crucial fights ahead. Your support has been truly instrumental in our fight for progress and defending our fundamental rights – and I hope you'll continue to stand by my side today.

[**_If you're able, please donate $5 or whatever you can today and help us secure even more victories for New York and beyond._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101477768/526075152/1395318919?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1798-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM2YTdlOS00ZWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwycGG3gT79ICaFJviu8t0t8SKRX1tJ5-79pRw980nM=)
---
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101477771/526075154/-2022258813?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1798-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM2YTdlOS00ZWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YwycGG3gT79ICaFJviu8t0t8SKRX1tJ5-79pRw980nM=)

Own a Piece of American History – Trump Knife Collection Awaits!...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/a2ad99673c4ef85d7721f3118d1653f33803ed43/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)
---
| | |
---
_February 3rd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
Dear Reader, Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history. The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/693f1d159a946a089e0f279a8ebe7eaa01c0efcc/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship. Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/a2ad99673c4ef85d7721f3118d1653f33803ed43/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)
---
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/693f1d159a946a089e0f279a8ebe7eaa01c0efcc/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/a2ad99673c4ef85d7721f3118d1653f33803ed43/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)
---
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/693f1d159a946a089e0f279a8ebe7eaa01c0efcc/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover. The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/a2ad99673c4ef85d7721f3118d1653f33803ed43/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)
---
**An Heirloom for Generations** This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience. Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations. **What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors** The **Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time. With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete. This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history. **[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/693f1d159a946a089e0f279a8ebe7eaa01c0efcc/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)** Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20152/6374453/a2ad99673c4ef85d7721f3118d1653f33803ed43/314e80d9272bb4a953c72695a2d845511e0ea0f1)
---

name: House GOP [Trump Cabinet Alerts]
subject: RFK Jr. needs our help to Make America Healthy Again
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/96WvZXAuO8_GYSWsVePDEgcYXh75ymBWE1nWILKQ5h44tMfHGnDPR9UAflroJRq9jnAV2d06ZBm5hZlOfY6x87VcLbHlxDTZad7Hl6amH_bgBKIW_C5GT1SMhcDKNAnTwJjwtvCwJVdWwifnMLfocEwxKAQr53aGiKrzxHgV5Rx-4QBUA3x__rvgpV26lOaT97RTinvs17bDW7GmFB1cCrPjhcQTJ6cRl-dMBwoZI2ijGB9774n7x7G3ANt_wXDo5-2sSqI5xg8FkJfOzYDf5rLZNlEC7TmPcAD3Qe7rEliexX5SkHuXfhW2xElTChVDT6TVttnIFqlRkxJvTT_j5PuZxUnFQASJPWBeNNNK69ISvW71cKh-nnEqkXgAzSdxt79MbBbKp6KZRy8xtUPbmhI0ltEnsftFx4ty5Qz7ktAt732_3ljmhnxP3esaAEXNDqCknPpdbusThnJJV8JryQ/2ghiWg_XQvcNlnGR8oFlP8R57vThDvzK/5)
---
Peter, as the next Secretary of Health & Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be one of the most transformative political appointees in American history.
He will **hold the government bureaucrats accountable**.
He will take action to **stop the chronic disease emergency** ravaging our country.
He will **restore integrity and transparency** to our nation’s health policies.
RFK Jr. will be President Trump’s fighter at the head of HHS to **demand the truth from government agencies** , hold public health officials to the highest standards, and put the well-being of the American people above all else.
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/CN1wrQPaiMW8oRL-1ByFTm2RAd822PCQsBMV6rIIpZDWV_frgCWazp76cm9z6DCQbkUULqY2NQCpMcceRV0_EIbRmc_T-JCbBAjfIgibwIju9jiFUllsbNq5XsVUuaWM7TQl7cpr3OFOvi5O2mLO380U0JUyGkJyQFFW6iWR00K2D5qzd3UFR-0fFoij-KaxA9YrgzwojZXxxPPSCy51fZ-4NBlQuTin3wZFYR7n3dh0JujDInOp6wHAP92KojXTfdc_d-Tf5zpvKtJOT4seSCK3H579Sw-luHWsPoHe8GDIOeDEIV15YsDAKzHtbV5pqxTK9-TZje130lc9a0A_RI3PB6E3QRpLZoNbbjCq_vnSCEc2uAV6O2cRTbxDF2sEGSRcWBEsWXMh0RRUTH2eIoidapU88it7_z9rtKx4OIVN2Z6IQVPQyVxRmST5bARxSBkS7NbwQTNBCL0fQuYtvA/vSEDKtu6U4oXl5H5B0Rt94Z_eZkzbBVZ/5)
[MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/x25vYHV5JTiN447X2-dME86tsCpCtF2QNcTeK1BNixqN9dydiXKxY4PpsbWlwVYvZrOfUPA5nBau5rCc_oPMCUgR9OiZ-QImrTGYhaO0b1Aa-IhvTaXmXcQoF7qSEHWxf5dkDegI_H11zGqwrJfArd_jPAUtbNudavqi56zkUoAxW57bWqKbzvMljBd2V2qyu7QPQaeq3wrz0bGG2qh1kWrXanYOVBBgFUkY_Sg5U-nZPQ4PO6homCwoUCfjXjVoBCDXveo91pdOHFCtIkcemeyoiatago5LfVVAtv8zUA3EejeGTDxrE-XaOa3t2wSG_epUPQQOpX4nAT_7_4Qy85OdxGASALMVAFPPUqrKDOD03iq7SPUOeasFGrRv5SSCXw4-720A-QPED-ujF5AQnQ6SjJhh1BHRTJ_my1EmW6cNwiSXyBVidcTG6bsm6-PRiqxXo6DbBDGa6uLVSBa3zg/sOPFmSlRKB32z-mRuGACP2YxA4N7QOe6/5)
But none of these achievements are possible if let the Radical Left tarnish the reputation of President Trump’s cabinet nominees and apply pressure to obstruct their appointments.

We have already seen what the liberal media and special interests have done in their vicious attempts to derail the appointment of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense.__
_The final vote to confirm Hegseth ended in a 50-50 tie with Vice President J.D. Vance needed to break the tie in the Senate._****
**To confirm RFK Jr. and begin the work to Make America Healthy Again we cannot afford to lose a single vote.****__**
**_[That’s why we are calling on America First patriots to help us hold the line today by showing your support for RFK Jr. and contributing to the fight against the Swamp who are attempting to undermine the Trump administration](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/JC5CyBXWxMHZ0p297BI8RO7SJGHyTgZJJW4Vj_H3LLDLtvBN5U75CceyZ1oE8JiJQ5PSznnZ_Wrey3luJ9RbUYDpqbZ1DUlMH6XZ_gGwDhs1jKygdr_xihezyQM4qPXITzM3aVzyQOSSFmvdedjZOS68pJe49beDvKHJWGhHO-CMY7dagae76VBHP97b8aYhDSjPLduJhLpnq6WL2OfdJ4urmBrBfx2HCwwLp6oNxrStuzUSFaB-uhKJgl8KW_fvYCewTKtl7Ykk1OZlZ9Y9OZ4Q_ZQ2e5efbqpnnB99IMt2wk3_LAVhrAOJQfX8bOpU6T_D_tGB5AXxOaxaIVtw23-G2I1HSDGaHDpCp6dkfUKL_XU23Vq6eizVTYUlqoivJQ6Rrn0IfahcBJT-w1Q_rvvf84IxL4yaFNXCg-2IT1hfPg1URiiiGGAPdcdQzPzrRMg3h7WeAK-uR9AqbWhgqw/GvXlSKyTtuPQxwZv7oMGwSiVLeyW2grO/5)_**.
[SUPPORT RFK JR.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/uAfI81KRmROhC9W6HQ395uqoSOb28l0PIhSqq0H4gJn9QCjbhVFrv8EgRVZqLbiuz0Texn-yqPffdpBTKnWRqoNHT3FdG21kWej1tMpNP9-61I_5BKBZ_wx_QkV2cUsOv0jWIFOcCkcRdY6jHD0L-1_dGitL2Ot4WRWaClPvHr9pas4ta1knBn6CIM2am1AWSsYYIOD2mU_ZFNHzDkaN3wi3OzyY3-1lsDPImffMMuNCOuB6984RrO-M7VgWIV4D9SmNHM8HBVWbZZSW54GQ9xJDRnbvAG8cBue7oKrD8zoL1IcPQpU822ZwwAQ4NvhXrbaxynspYJxErTA5Th9ON8IVYPDwkP3Wg97gDmKosIXVLuIo3_hfFkVatZy_wle05iWVYppvpM4Ien7c3wVZQAGexUXySw8pRegdX5Bfz4B8gOJbDbt-rTSAk6bQsSTWCKw9RV-Aec-Zq7XOUzgIyQ/uc1wyLW5NVOYmA8T40mFmk_gpIq2wdx6/5)
This is our chance to reject the corruption, the lies, and the unchecked power of special interests.

The Democrats in the United States Senate need to know, beyond any doubt, the American people demand that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be confirmed.

They need to know that the era of appointing those that promote the status quo to run our nation’s healthcare is over.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, as the next Secretary of Health & Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be one of the most transformative political appointees in American history. He will hold the government bureaucrats accountable. He will take action to stop the chronic disease emergency ravaging our country. He will restore integrity and transparency to our nation’s health policies. RFK Jr. will be President Trump’s fighter at the head of HHS to demand the truth from government agencies , hold public health officials to the highest standards, and put the well-being of the American people above all else. But none of these achievements are possible if let the Radical Left tarnish the reputation of President Trump’s cabinet nominees and apply pressure to obstruct their appointments. We have already seen what the liberal media and special interests have done in their vicious attempts to derail the appointment of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense. The final vote to confirm Hegseth ended in a 50-50 tie with Vice President J.D. Vance needed to break the tie in the Senate.** To confirm RFK Jr. and begin the work to Make America Healthy Again we cannot afford to lose a single vote.** . This is our chance to reject the corruption, the lies, and the unchecked power of special interests. The Democrats in the United States Senate need to know, beyond any doubt, the American people demand that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be confirmed. They need to know that the era of appointing those that promote the status quo to run our nation’s healthcare is over. And with your support we can help get President Trump’s choice over the finish line to finally begin a new era of accountability in public health. . To Victory, HOUSE GOP | | | | | | | | | | | | %unsubscribeurl% |

name: Attorney General Andrea Joy Campbell
subject: Black History Month feels different this year, and that's okay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Peter-
Happy Black History Month!
I’m proud to serve not only as your Attorney General, but also as the first Black woman elected to statewide office in Massachusetts history. It’s an honor I don’t take lightly, and I know every day, I stand on the shoulders of so many trailblazers and freedom fighters who came before us.
Massachusetts is home to the movements that pushed this country to live up to its promises of freedom and equality for all of its citizens. Frederick Douglass started the abolition movement here in Massachusetts, and let’s not forget Dr. King and Coretta Scott met as college students in Boston. While the work is far from over, I’m proud of the progress we’ve made. It’s now up to us to fight to defend and advance the wins of our civil rights heroes. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/AJC_Headshot_%283x4%29.jpg]
Black History Month feels different this year, and it’s okay for
us to acknowledge that. On MLK Day, when we could have
sworn in our first Black woman president, we instead watched Donald Trump take office. The very same man who
discriminated against Black renters in New York and took out a full page newspaper ad calling for the death penalty for the
Exonerated Five.
While he fights to sow chaos and confusion on the federal level, know that we are doing everything we can in Massachusetts to protect our residents’ rights and state economy. Massachusetts will continue to be a place that welcomes everyone and champions diversity for the strength we know it is.
As we go into Black History Month, let’s honor the struggles of the past by promising to keep up the fight of our ancestors in the present.
In solidarity,
Attorney General Andrea Joy Campbell
https://www.facebook.com/massdems [https://www.facebook.com/massdems] https://twitter.com/massdems [https://twitter.com/massdems] https://instagram.com/massdems [https://instagram.com/massdems] https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems [https://www.tiktok.com/@massdems]
Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

All because she dared to speak the truth about election integrity.

...When the Arizona election system continues to be a national embarrassment...When Democrats are constantly fighting to remove voter ID requirements...When an Arizona Election Official promised to “Make life hell” for her
---
That’s why it is such an incredible injustice that the Left is using courts packed with Liberal judges to prosecute Kari Lake simply for speaking up.The establishment Left is trying to send a message.If you speak out against us - we will ruin you.Your reputation...Your prosperity...Your **_family_** ...In order for us to preserve the America we love; we need to send a message in return. That’s why I am so grateful for the brave patriots at American Media Council who are stepping up.American Media Council established its Emergency First Amendment Fund to help Kari Lake fight this battle. For speaking the truth about election interference Kari is facing enormous legal fines, media hit pieces, and the constant threat of massive financial burden on her and her family. Your contribution to this First Amendment Fund will help defend Kari Lake and others like her threatened by Leftist Lawfare just for exercising their freedom of speech.That’s why I’m asking you today – **[will you help me to protect Kari Lake from retaliatory Leftist Lawfare?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=380e8ef7cc0e463f828190bc49620c27&_e=03JNnZsguNnR_Bi0Nae9209qaIT8d0NN-aApUfXZI6NkGvKiyfBj-6_9p_Fj7uk1rmsFUEC9cAxPPMgeoGhTVO-vwZhT_BPGr4WXl6Td68aflJ-YtXI5DnVtOnAXIB3wEMnzYDJa3hUKTKkNw14WT8fsG7Jvvsm_MCPvqp5qo6InPinCSGOsKmVtvdOPUCbooU4nwEoPBxnWNzeGkE42Jmxek1TiIdJ1v0j-rJ_YF2zvMrhzyK6lvZUb4A9fDzBaBKpwSedv8m4v9k3JNQzDTDoPDnz4W2AJ6u_xb6YAtWz43otLSKlpErdKs1znuyBbUGzmjX7ksnLHrNnd9z5aoYEKNdeVVLfzZurld9XRQfeZ0F9lZNcZn5W1wGk7MK9gpRhJIhk85N84bH4bfQZX_BU6X_cEBEDcW1TrvXpCSdY%3D)** The Left is never going to stop using underhanded tactics to go after their political enemies and they are going to attack Kari Lake harder than ever. | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=156386934&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2Mzg2OTM0LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg2MDM2ODgsImV4cCI6MTc0MTE5NTY4OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.RzrtHjeJg9viaDpkz_O4DZGxDaCouG6laG0PbAPLjqs)
---
| | [](https://substack..KuKQPUCZoerIXs2sQJk8Ir3N_seOqTkHT73I3hHajlA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/the-funding-freeze?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I've had some people ask me what it's like to become Attorney General.
I'm still new, but here's the best way I can describe it:
Imagine someone sets up 50 chess boards in front of you.
Each board represents a major case your office is involved in - water polluters, scammers, criminals, public corruption, antitrust, fentanyl, price gouging. Every board is a chess match against an opponent like that.
Some of these matches have been going on for years. Your first job is to study each board, understand how we got here, and then - most importantly - figure out how to prevail.
Fortunately, you're not alone. You have access to teams of experts who are highly experienced and will give you as much information as you want.
So your first few weeks? They're spent learning. Consulting with your teams, understanding the history, listening to strategic advice.
And then, one by one, you start making moves. Every move matters because every board represents real lives and real stakes.
I know that's pretty abstract, so I asked A.I. to create a visual aid. Here you go:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d0a65b4-bbb4-4342-ad36-1e4e531b47c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Not sure those chess boards look quite right, but otherwise not half bad...
Now substitute lower ceilings, fluorescent lights, more coffee cups and computer monitors, and you've got the idea.
### **The Sackler Family**
When I was in high school, the Sackler family's pharmaceutical company - Purdue Pharma - invented a new opioid pill.
They lied to doctors and said it wasn't addictive.
That was the start of the opioid crisis. Back then, we called it the prescription pill crisis.
It took us about ten years, but eventually, we cracked down.
But by then, loads of people were addicted, so they hit the streets looking for their fix - and found heroin.
So then we had a heroin crisis.
That lasted for a few years until _synthetic_ heroin arrived - and that's fentanyl.
The fentanyl crisis is really just the third wave of the opioid crisis the Sackler family helped create in the mid-1990s with their deceptive marketing of OxyContin.
Our state was one of the leaders of the mega-lawsuit against the Sacklers, and a few years ago, a big settlement was reached.
Then the Supreme Court blocked the settlement. They told the states to renegotiate the terms.
So we did. And last week, we got it resolved in a way I'm pretty sure will be upheld by the court.
The bottom line? A lot more money for North Carolina. And, by the terms of the agreement, that money will go almost entirely to anti-addiction programs run by individual cities and counties. It's being channeled directly into the communities that have been hit hardest, with strict rules that it be used to treat addiction or prevent the next generation from falling into this epidemic.
That news was a huge deal for our office, and when the additional funding starts to flow later this year, it will be a huge deal for the state as well.
### **Federal Funding Freeze**
One time, many years ago, President Nixon announced that he wasn't going to spend the money Congress had appropriated for some clean water programs.
And the Supreme Court unanimously said he couldn't do that. If Congress passes a law that says, "Spend $100 on this," the president can't decide, "I'd rather spend $50." The Constitution gives spending power to Congress - there's no getting around that simply by declining to spend what they've appropriated.
Clinton tried something similar, though on a smaller scale, and the Supreme Court blocked him, too. He used a line-item veto - which Congress had explicitly given him! - to strike certain spending provisions from the budget. The Court ruled that violated the Constitution. Why? Because not even Congress can delegate its power to the president without amending the Constitution. Congress has certain power reserved to it, whether it likes it or not.
So when a president says, "Hey, freeze hundreds of billions that Congress appropriated," it's not a close constitutional call. It goes much further than Nixon and Clinton went, and it's obviously not going to hold up in court.
_And it didn 't._
On Sunday night, just as I was sitting down to dinner with my family, I got a text about the president's order to freeze a massive chunk of federal funding. I read the order - just a page and a half long - and it was immediately clear that it was unlawful.
First thing the next morning, I spoke with my team and we all agreed: Based on clear precedent, this violated the Constitution. So we joined the lawsuit to challenge it, and the court quickly put the freeze on hold, pending a full hearing.
Now the order has been withdrawn entirely. The administration said it "didn't go through the proper approval process."
Now we're waiting to see if funding freeze version 2.0 appears. If it does, I assume they'll take a more tailored approach in the hope of surviving a court challenge.
**Here 's what I take from all of this:** The rule of law still holds. When power is overstepped, there are mechanisms to pull it back. And it's important to hold the line, not for politics, but to defend the constitutional order on which civil society depends.
I'll keep you posted.
Best,
Jeff Jackson

subject: This email is Kash Patel’s last chance.

body:
We only need 1,467 more signatures to save Kash Patel

| | | | [](https://secure.winred.com/jeff-crank-for-congress/cra-prsp-email-kashpatel-v2-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=pop&utm_tc=FMN-20250203&utm_campaign=20250131_JeffCrank_cra-prsp-email-kashpatel-v2-pop&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)
---
Ever since Kash Patel was nominated by President Trump to lead the FBI, he’s faced a barrage of attacks.
Democrats want his nomination thrown in the trash because he’ll take an America-First sledgehammer to the DC swamp.
2 years ago - the Democrats controlled all the intelligence agencies and they’re determined to keep that control in 2025.
They want to **END** Trump’s closest ally for good, and this message is your last chance to stop that from happening.
If nothing is done right here, right **NOW** , President Trump’s most important ally will never see the light of day.
If you really stand with him and want to drain the swamp too, we’re hoping, begging, and pleading for you to stand with him **RIGHT NOW** before it’s too late.

[PLEASE SIGN HERE>>](https://secure.winred.com/jeff-crank-for-congress/cra-prsp-email-kashpatel-v2-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=pop&utm_tc=FMN-20250203&utm_campaign=20250131_JeffCrank_cra-prsp-email-kashpatel-v2-pop&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)

We only need 1,467 more signatures on our petition to advance Kash Patel’s nomination.
Please don’t be the reason that his nomination fails. We only have one shot at this and we can’t afford to lose.
Please take 2 minutes before the end of the day to sign this petition and make America great again.
Kash Patel is hanging on by a thread and you are his only hope.

[PLEASE SIGN HERE>>](https://secure.winred.com/jeff-crank-for-congress/cra-prsp-email-kashpatel-v2-pop?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=pop&utm_tc=FMN-20250203&utm_campaign=20250131_JeffCrank_cra-prsp-email-kashpatel-v2-pop&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: ICE made over 5,000 arrests in Trump’s first week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Donald Trump is
aggressively waging his cruel, anti-immigrant agenda across the country as
we speak.

Already, we’re seeing ICE conducting raids without warrants in cities
across the country after Trump lifted the ban on raids in sensitive places
that were previously off-limits like schools, courthouses, and places of
worship.

In just the first week of Trump’s second presidency, ICE arrested more
than 5,000 people, with over 1,200 arrests in a single day. On multiple
occasions, they detained U.S. citizens and members of Native tribal
nations as a result of racial profiling.

At the same time, Trump is threatening mass deportations and proposing
shipping tens of thousands of immigrants to Guantanamo Bay where they may
be indefinitely detained.

In the face of these attacks, everyone should stay informed and know their
rights. We wanted to share these resources with you from Justice Democrat
Delia Ramirez’s office:

[2]A graphic reading: KNOW YOUR RIGHTS! 1. If you are detained, you have
the right to remain silent and contact a lawyer. 2. You have the right to
a legal process and have your case presented before an immigration judge.
CONOZCA SUS DERECHOS. 1. Si es detenido, tiene el derecho de permanecer
callado y contactar un abogado. 2. Tiene derecho a un proceso legal y que
su caso sea presentado ante un juez de imigracion.[3]A graphic reading: IF
ICE CONTACTS YOU. If ICE visits your home or work, do not open the door
until they present a court order. Do not volunteer ANY information. You do
not need to provide your immigration status or place of birth. Do not
present false documents or information, including a fake name. You are not
required to sign documents in English, Spanish, or other languages without
an attorney present. SI ICE LO CONTACTA. En caso de que ICE visite su casa
o trabajo, no abra la puerta hasta que le presenten una orden judicial. No
ofrezca NINGUNA informacion de forma voluntaria. No tiene que onfirmar su
estatus migratorio o lugar nacimiento. No presente documentacion o
informacion falsa, incluyendo un nombre falso. No esta obligado a firmar
documentos en ingles, espanol, u otro idioma sin un abogado presente.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250203-36389-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36389_1203867_wDPqgF&akid=36389%2E1203867%2EwDPqgF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36389%2E1203867%2EwDPqgF

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Peter
subject: Did you miss this?

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=0c23b72807f6b37e9da6dd01374f4bc92ac91327d63ba1f2facd3710cc384ff3789ec1caaa5711ca87ad57fbcf10cbac6a5820346b10595326c4e2b44c8869bb So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=0c23b72807f6b37e9da6dd01374f4bc92ac91327d63ba1f2facd3710cc384ff3789ec1caaa5711ca87ad57fbcf10cbac6a5820346b10595326c4e2b44c8869bb X_________________ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=0c23b72807f6b37e9da6dd01374f4bc92ac91327d63ba1f2facd3710cc384ff3789ec1caaa5711ca87ad57fbcf10cbac6a5820346b10595326c4e2b44c8869bb >" alias="SIGN THE LETTER >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">SIGN THE LETTER >> Thank you, Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: AMAC Action
subject: DEMAND Kash Patel Confirmation
body:
Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration.

| |
---
| | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government.
---
| |
---
[](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – [**but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)
---
[ **CONFIRM KASH**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Kash Patel will take time, money, and resources.**[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM KASH emergency contribution today.](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination –_**** _[So please don’t delay!](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyUkMFqrDAYhZ8m7iIxvybjIgsvjrdQLMWW6TL8xjiT1qjEOKVvX6Z0HqDbj8PhO-et1S26yc3nJ_RWBa_DpvtBo0dDB-s3Gty8bDTi_KE54wVlnDLQkAxKlFwessSqTMJBMFkUPLmocuQyt4UscOiFlZiXYPOeM3mwUggUiVO3HsYZZDIrc0hHMZrSiHxEHKWVguQs2HXvJ2dw9vi-BBe_0tnGZFKXGNeNQEV4Q3hzs0QT3TKnwV6vqVkIb1YsOQg7AmNFnxUEmj16vS17MJZA_a_-T7vjiXBxw94ObvcE6mP7Swz6Fd15JlD_eGaQ6aqtXvVj9fKgu-NJP1e0u6ejIVB3Lb1PSoIa1k83TW4TkuTs7NFNqVl8Ev9y7lXx7wAAAP__8Gh-fg)_** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.Thank you, friend!
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. | | | | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. | | | | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – Kash Patel as FBI Director. Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch: The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story. They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.” And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools. My friend, America deserves better. President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again! And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of We the People.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor-thin margins , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Kash Patel will take time, money, and resources. Let’s send a clear message: The American people will not be denied. Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement. And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director. No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination – Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.Thank you, friend! | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: My take on how Democrats lost touch with young voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
In Congress, 60 is considered young.
So in my 30s, I’m basically a preteen! My age gives me a relatively unique perspective among my Congressional peers – and not just in my understanding of social media.
I know where the Democratic Party is missing the mark with young people – and what we need to do to fix it.
Here’s the deal. People in my generation (and younger) don’t really trust those in power or our institutions. And we have good reason for that. I was in 7th grade when the September 11th attacks happened, and then I watched the U.S. spend billions of dollars – and deploy millions of servicemembers – to fight endless wars in Afghanistan and Iraq. I was getting ready to graduate college during the Great Recession, when it was nearly impossible for so many young people to find jobs, or even places to live. And then came the COVID-19 pandemic, when our country’s young people missed out on so many parts of growing up, big and small – getting first jobs, learning in their classrooms, attending school dances.
Put simply, young people don’t trust that our leaders know how to get us out of the messes they got us into.
And all the while, we’re told that our opinions don’t matter as young people – to wait our turn; that we’re lazy, entitled, and ungrateful.
Here’s a hard truth for some: Democrats aren’t entitled to young people’s votes.
Despite the incredible strides we made under the recent Democratic trifecta – capping prescription drug costs, investing more than a trillion dollars in infrastructure, major action on climate, the first gun safety law in 30 years – we didn’t meaningfully improve young people’s ability to make ends meet.
Why? We failed to address the two biggest costs for young people, costs that are still outpacing inflation and making it harder for young people to get by: housing and child care .
I wrote an op-ed in Teen Vogue on this exact topic – where Democrats have fallen short when it comes to young people, and how we can fix this problem – and I hope you’ll take a couple minutes to read it. [https://www.teenvogue.com/story/sara-jacobs-democrats-young-voters-housing-childcare]
Young people don’t just want change, they need it. Because the problem isn’t that millennials and Gen Z'ers can’t budget, or don’t work hard enough, or that we’re eating too much avocado toast. The problem is that the status quo simply isn’t working for millions of people. And when I talk to my friends and peers, they see the Democratic Party as the party of the status quo — as the institutionalists who are fighting to protect systems that don’t work to begin with.
I want to be really clear about something – it’s not a bad thing that there are baby boomers and Gen X'ers in Congress. We need their experience and institutional knowledge!
But we also need to listen to the young people of this country who are begging for their concerns to finally be respected and addressed. Unless and until we do that, we won’t win back the support – or the votes – of young people in America.
You can read my full op-ed here. [https://www.teenvogue.com/story/sara-jacobs-democrats-young-voters-housing-childcare]
If you have feedback or reactions to share on this topic, I’d like to hear them. Reply to this email and let me know what you think.
Thanks for your time.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Eric Teetsel
subject: January Update From CRA’s new CEO
body:
I believe God, Family, and Community are at the heart of American renewal. Right now those affected by the plane collision in Washington D.C. despe... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/americarenewing.com/were-on-the-offensive-10707666?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

I believe God, Family, and Community are at the heart of American renewal. Right now those affected by the plane collision in Washington D.C. desperately need all three. Please join us in praying for the victims and their families.

The start of the second Trump administration has been eventful. We’re watching closely as the President’s appointees, including our former CRA colleagues Russ Vought and Kash Patel, continue to go through the confirmation process. Kash was nominated by President Trump to be FBI Director. He would bring badly needed reforms to the Bureau and we wish him all the best.

I wanted to share a few quick updates which highlight the importance and scope of the work we’re doing at the Center.
---
| **A Moral Imperative: Centering Technology Around the American Family**
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2bc80fc1bf&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Recently, I [co-signed a statement of principles published](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7281eba9e7&e=17913c7d6d) in _First Things_ titled _“A Future for the Family: A New Technology Agenda for the Right."_

The statement of principles are particularly salient as they address how technology affects the American family and our well being. Big Tech has undermined parents, cheapened human relationships through the commodification of sexuality and socialization, and disregarded the privacy of the American people. Our current relationship with technology is broken, and action must be taken to rectify this before more damage is done.

This portion of the letter sums it up nicely:

_“We must discern prudent ways to govern technology in order to keep the human person, human dignity, and the common good as the central goals of our politics. We must ensure that new technologies serve human life and the human family, not the other way around.”_

A reorientation is necessary, and this document provides ten guiding principles for how technology can be reformed to empower families. I was proud to stand alongside the five authors and 28 other signatories to this [statement](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=02f736cdac&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| **NY Times Highlights Influence of CRA Founder Russ Vought**
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=2322505829&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Last week, the _New York Times_ published an op-ed on the Center’s founder and former president Russ Vought, titled _“[Who Is Russell Vought? Probably the Most Important Person in Trump 2.0.](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=214ebf95c4&e=17913c7d6d)”_ The op-ed makes a compelling case for why our old colleague is going to play a pivotal role as OMB Director in the new Trump Administration.

Notably, the piece spotlights Russ’ view that the country is in a post-Constitutional moment, and his plans on using OMB to rein in the unelected federal bureaucracy. It discusses in detail his views on issues like regulatory reform, curbing the growth of the administrative state, the presidential power of impoundment, and rolling out Schedule F to fire uncooperative government bureaucrats.

Of course, the author makes it clear that he disagrees with Russ’ ideas and policy prescriptions for dismantling the federal bureaucracy. Yet, he can’t help but concede that Russ has a point about the problematic growth of the administrative state.

Liberal bias aside, the profile piece is a testament to both Russ and the influence of the policy ideas we’ve worked so hard on here at the Center.

The Times op-ed was one of several writeups about Russ’ nomination that were recently published by the liberal media.

_The Washington Post_ wrote an [extensive profile](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=cf935cb088&e=17913c7d6d) of Russ’ plans for OMB and lamented how disgruntled federal bureaucrats are leaving the agency in advance of his nomination. _Government Executive_ , a mouthpiece for the federal bureaucracy, wrote a [lengthy article](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=fae995829c&e=17913c7d6d) that extensively quoted negative comments from Senate Democrats decrying Russ’ views on federal spending.

The media’s reaction shows the regime is terrified of Russ. In many ways, you can’t ask for a better endorsement than that.
---
| **WATCH: CRA Senior Fellow Ken Cuccinelli Discusses Trump’s Deportations on _CNN_**
---
| [ ](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d6dd830357&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| Last week CRA Senior Fellow Ken Cuccinelli appeared on _CNN_ to discuss Trump’s deportation efforts. In the leadup to the deportations, some local officials made comments about not complying with immigration authorities.

In response, Trump has threatened legal action against any official who interferes with the deportation process. Cuccinelli explained that while it takes an affirmative action like impeding with immigration officials to actually violate federal law, Trump’s message is a warning.

_“I think it‘s to make it very clear to state and local officials across the country that even if you‘re not going to cooperate, if you actually get in the way, you will subject yourself to criminal prosecution,”_ he commented.

We posted the video clip on X, and you can [watch it here](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d918a54031&e=17913c7d6d).
---
| **A Look Ahead**
---
| As you can tell, things are moving fast in Washington. Change is on the horizon and we’re proud to be in the fight.
American renewal is coming.

Sincerely,

Eric Teetsel
_CEO_
**Center for Renewing America**
---
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=847b61dbc2&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=d15fe388d1&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=803294187f&e=17913c7d6d)
---

We’re watching closely as the President’s appointees, including our former CRA colleagues Russ Vought and Kash Patel, continue to go through the confirmation process. Kash was nominated by President Trump to be FBI Director. He would bring badly needed reforms to the Bureau and we wish him all the best. I wanted to share a few quick updates which highlight the importance and scope of the work we’re doing at the Center. | A Moral Imperative: Centering Technology Around the American Family | | Recently, I in First Things titled “A Future for the Family: A New Technology Agenda for the Right." The statement of principles are particularly salient as they address how technology affects the American family and our well being. Big Tech has undermined parents, cheapened human relationships through the commodification of sexuality and socialization, and disregarded the privacy of the American people. Our current relationship with technology is broken, and action must be taken to rectify this before more damage is done. This portion of the letter sums it up nicely: “We must discern prudent ways to govern technology in order to keep the human person, human dignity, and the common good as the central goals of our politics. We must ensure that new technologies serve human life and the human family, not the other way around.” A reorientation is necessary, and this document provides ten guiding principles for how technology can be reformed to empower families. I was proud to stand alongside the five authors and 28 other signatories to this . | NY Times Highlights Influence of CRA Founder Russ Vought | | Last week, the New York Times published an op-ed on the Center’s founder and former president Russ Vought, titled “” The op-ed makes a compelling case for why our old colleague is going to play a pivotal role as OMB Director in the new Trump Administration. Notably, the piece spotlights Russ’ view that the country is in a post-Constitutional moment, and his plans on using OMB to rein in the unelected federal bureaucracy. It discusses in detail his views on issues like regulatory reform, curbing the growth of the administrative state, the presidential power of impoundment, and rolling out Schedule F to fire uncooperative government bureaucrats. Of course, the author makes it clear that he disagrees with Russ’ ideas and policy prescriptions for dismantling the federal bureaucracy. Yet, he can’t help but concede that Russ has a point about the problematic growth of the administrative state. Liberal bias aside, the profile piece is a testament to both Russ and the influence of the policy ideas we’ve worked so hard on here at the Center. The Times op-ed was one of several writeups about Russ’ nomination that were recently published by the liberal media. The Washington Post wrote an of Russ’ plans for OMB and lamented how disgruntled federal bureaucrats are leaving the agency in advance of his nomination. Government Executive , a mouthpiece for the federal bureaucracy, wrote a that extensively quoted negative comments from Senate Democrats decrying Russ’ views on federal spending. The media’s reaction shows the regime is terrified of Russ. In many ways, you can’t ask for a better endorsement than that. | WATCH: CRA Senior Fellow Ken Cuccinelli Discusses Trump’s Deportations on CNN | | Last week CRA Senior Fellow Ken Cuccinelli appeared on CNN to discuss Trump’s deportation efforts. In the leadup to the deportations, some local officials made comments about not complying with immigration authorities. In response, Trump has threatened legal action against any official who interferes with the deportation process. Cuccinelli explained that while it takes an affirmative action like impeding with immigration officials to actually violate federal law, Trump’s message is a warning. “I think it‘s to make it very clear to state and local officials across the country that even if you‘re not going to cooperate, if you actually get in the way, you will subject yourself to criminal prosecution,” he commented. We posted the video clip on X, and you can . | A Look Ahead | As you can tell, things are moving fast in Washington. Change is on the horizon and we’re proud to be in the fight. American renewal is coming. Sincerely, Eric Teetsel CEO Center for Renewing America | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright ©2025 Center for Renewing America, All Rights Reserved. Our mailing address is: 300 Independence Ave. SE Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

They want to END Trump’s closest ally for good, and this message is your last chance to stop that from happening. If nothing is done right here, right NOW , President Trump’s most important ally will never see the light of day. If you really stand with him and want to drain the swamp too, we’re hoping, begging, and pleading for you to stand with him RIGHT NOW before it’s too late. % We only need 1,467 more signatures on our petition to advance Kash Patel’s nomination. Please don’t be the reason that his nomination fails. We only have one shot at this and we can’t afford to lose. Please take 2 minutes before the end of the day to sign this petition and make America great again. Kash Patel is hanging on by a thread and you are his only hope. % | | PAID FOR BY JEFF CRANK FOR CONGRESS | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/8iKLhyiEOM7FFe0-ab6HHQ0yYfptQxbwzPtWrOb9R_R0t15s09MFmFhanrk6UZg75Vztq3bd13R9AGHw87sInG6CcAiOXERHZE9QMEqK91e4KqwZs84bV-cy52QrGxr6YLT2MqLJlpHLcxVFUduJA2kQUnkW67iwXtnXX18PVmd-16Hsv-oz12igm11GzorOf_tLSShSz4oc7KMtMzc8UwJrYrf1LKzkpZcyVhI2NIXf8O-7uYL0-7BwTZmOshzw-vXtv2k4BLbn31iLRPpYca_y1SMMeStA557f9LeVGft95SW806XN06zCFfkFyoxbENKtMXzgDZsMfhfBMXsyfL4eWGpGwxCtkPPifcGBq19ot-cQQfJnFhhUGSBIxJwyQtf9MJJE4F7ViD2Ae9kfOFgCHjF2Uw/8ANbYA-hs9JnavHPo72cdDFiwb_q731j/5)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
