Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/10sZMvKlRv9TToVJUromrKpNtM0mFjSP5SS4ukpFnPKKKL9aHEmU0Hp_f1mtj_9a5Kbk-spMrB8UWlAp3iMHxDbfSheIGvOUYmT68da1AK3gWS8ufr7Wm8pkL3Rub4kLrG3SPljSQia00qGa-slNXbsa7hy5DypA1WH-_v_t1POg4llo-YYq9cF4LTY9l49UJABscPGEuA4z8D7_2hYRyV_3t-uLumVd63ZWY_FsmAUAU_x9AnfCJQKXxRiN2lFBHxhnR3fCjD9x1eiva1kAXboBbbynfy8eMci6EGdrainE-llOLx0OpBN0ZiKbShecl7tAuH5P7JYzCe_JqGe3D6JE7VVuXkIVEB25stdgnn-icKKxWidXb6sjgoK85WvBkmG8WsMvP5re3tKaxcaG_XEIK0jwrg/VaSXBLtuZYC7ioh2L4P2Gklbz2xXHPOG/5)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. * **TOP NEWS**

"**EXCLUSIVE: Texas National Guard granted authority to make immigration arrests,** " Breitbart's **Randy Clark** -- "A memorandum of understanding between Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and the State of Texas, reviewed by Breitbart Texas will immediately grant Texas National Guard soldiers the authority to make immigration arrests within the Lone Star state.**Pete R Flores** , CBP Acting Commissioner, authored the memorandum of understanding (MOU).

The memorandum, which has not yet been disseminated to all Texas border sectors, will allow the soldiers to perform roving patrols and exercise all the duties of an immigration agent so long as a U.S. immigration officer or Border Patrol agent accompanies them. According to the MOU, the ratio of soldiers to immigration officers is preliminarily listed as one officer to four soldiers.

Title 8 United States Code arrest authority was granted to multiple federal law enforcement agencies just days after President Trump's inauguration. On January 23, the Department of Homeland Security authorized federal law enforcement agents to investigate, determine the location of, and apprehend migrants in an illegal status. The details of that memorandum, obtained and released in a recent news [report](https://substack.com/redirect/b2dfe7db-249a-4800-b988-660c61242201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by CBS News, are similar to the memorandum of understanding reviewed by Breitbart Texas.

The duties of the Texas National Guard soldiers are law enforcement-related, generally reserved for agents assigned to specific agencies under the Department of Homeland Security.

The latest granting of immigration arrest authority adds at least 3,000 Texas Army National Guard soldiers to the number of ATF, FBI, and United States Deputy Marshals who are now assisting the Department of Homeland Security in enforcing federal immigration law." With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . Read today's FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS "EXCLUSIVE: Texas National Guard granted authority to make immigration arrests, " Breitbart's Randy Clark -- "A memorandum of understanding between Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and the State of Texas, reviewed by Breitbart Texas will immediately grant Texas National Guard soldiers the authority to make immigration arrests within the Lone Star state.Pete R Flores , CBP Acting Commissioner, authored the memorandum of understanding (MOU). The memorandum, which has not yet been disseminated to all Texas border sectors, will allow the soldiers to perform roving patrols and exercise all the duties of an immigration agent so long as a U.S. immigration officer or Border Patrol agent accompanies them. According to the MOU, the ratio of soldiers to immigration officers is preliminarily listed as one officer to four soldiers. Title 8 United States Code arrest authority was granted to multiple federal law enforcement agencies just days after President Trump's inauguration. On January 23, the Department of Homeland Security authorized federal law enforcement agents to investigate, determine the location of, and apprehend migrants in an illegal status. The details of that memorandum, obtained and released in a recent news by CBS News, are similar to the memorandum of understanding reviewed by Breitbart Texas. The duties of the Texas National Guard soldiers are law enforcement-related, generally reserved for agents assigned to specific agencies under the Department of Homeland Security. The latest granting of immigration arrest authority adds at least 3,000 Texas Army National Guard soldiers to the number of ATF, FBI, and United States Deputy Marshals who are now assisting the Department of Homeland Security in enforcing federal immigration law." “**EXCLUSIVE: Texas National Guard granted authority to make immigration arrests,** ” Breitbart's **Randy Clark** — “A memorandum of understanding between Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and the State of Texas, reviewed by Breitbart Texas will immediately grant Texas National Guard soldiers the authority to make immigration arrests within the Lone Star state.**Pete R Flores** , CBP Acting Commissioner, authored the memorandum of understanding (MOU).

The memorandum, which has not yet been disseminated to all Texas border sectors, will allow the soldiers to perform roving patrols and exercise all the duties of an immigration agent so long as a U.S. immigration officer or Border Patrol agent accompanies them. According to the MOU, the ratio of soldiers to immigration officers is preliminarily listed as one officer to four soldiers.

Title 8 United States Code arrest authority was granted to multiple federal law enforcement agencies just days after President Trump’s inauguration. On January 23, the Department of Homeland Security authorized federal law enforcement agents to investigate, determine the location of, and apprehend migrants in an illegal status. The memorandum, which has not yet been disseminated to all Texas border sectors, will allow the soldiers to perform roving patrols and exercise all the duties of an immigration agent so long as a U.S. immigration officer or Border Patrol agent accompanies them. According to the MOU, the ratio of soldiers to immigration officers is preliminarily listed as one officer to four soldiers. Title 8 United States Code arrest authority was granted to multiple federal law enforcement agencies just days after President Trump’s inauguration. On January 23, the Department of Homeland Security authorized federal law enforcement agents to investigate, determine the location of, and apprehend migrants in an illegal status. The details of that memorandum, obtained and released in a recent news by CBS News, are similar to the memorandum of understanding reviewed by Breitbart Texas. » » The duties of the Texas National Guard soldiers are law enforcement-related, generally reserved for agents assigned to specific agencies under the Department of Homeland Security. * **TOP NEWS**

"**EXCLUSIVE: Texas National Guard granted authority to make immigration arrests,** " Breitbart's **Randy Clark** -- "A memorandum of understanding between Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and the State of Texas, reviewed by Breitbart Texas will immediately grant Texas National Guard soldiers the authority to make immigration arrests within the Lone Star state.**Pete R Flores** , CBP Acting Commissioner, authored the memorandum of understanding (MOU).

The memorandum, which has not yet been disseminated to all Texas border sectors, will allow the soldiers to perform roving patrols and exercise all the duties of an immigration agent so long as a U.S. immigration officer or Border Patrol agent accompanies them. According to the MOU, the ratio of soldiers to immigration officers is preliminarily listed as one officer to four soldiers.

Title 8 United States Code arrest authority was granted to multiple federal law enforcement agencies just days after President Trump's inauguration. On January 23, the Department of Homeland Security authorized federal law enforcement agents to investigate, determine the location of, and apprehend migrants in an illegal status. The details of that memorandum, obtained and released in a recent news [report](https://substack.com/redirect/ecafea67-8e98-490d-b612-31bb110347ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by CBS News, are similar to the memorandum of understanding reviewed by Breitbart Texas.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/79b0da03-af49-49fa-9980-4d25d8e0e297?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/79b0da03-af49-49fa-9980-4d25d8e0e297?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The duties of the Texas National Guard soldiers are law enforcement-related, generally reserved for agents assigned to specific agencies under the Department of Homeland Security.

The latest granting of immigration arrest authority adds at least 3,000 Texas Army National Guard soldiers to the number of ATF, FBI, and United States Deputy Marshals who are now assisting the Department of Homeland Security in enforcing federal immigration law." [Breitbart](https://substack.com/redirect/f0bf6ee2-78a7-47eb-bb7a-d0b1730b2db2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Read today's FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS "EXCLUSIVE: Texas National Guard granted authority to make immigration arrests, " Breitbart's Randy Clark -- "A memorandum of understanding between Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and the State of Texas, reviewed by Breitbart Texas will immediately grant Texas National Guard soldiers the authority to make immigration arrests within the Lone Star state.Pete R Flores , CBP Acting Commissioner, authored the memorandum of understanding (MOU). The memorandum, which has not yet been disseminated to all Texas border sectors, will allow the soldiers to perform roving patrols and exercise all the duties of an immigration agent so long as a U.S. immigration officer or Border Patrol agent accompanies them. According to the MOU, the ratio of soldiers to immigration officers is preliminarily listed as one officer to four soldiers. Title 8 United States Code arrest authority was granted to multiple federal law enforcement agencies just days after President Trump's inauguration. On January 23, the Department of Homeland Security authorized federal law enforcement agents to investigate, determine the location of, and apprehend migrants in an illegal status. The details of that memorandum, obtained and released in a recent news by CBS News, are similar to the memorandum of understanding reviewed by Breitbart Texas. The duties of the Texas National Guard soldiers are law enforcement-related, generally reserved for agents assigned to specific agencies under the Department of Homeland Security. The latest granting of immigration arrest authority adds at least 3,000 Texas Army National Guard soldiers to the number of ATF, FBI, and United States Deputy Marshals who are now assisting the Department of Homeland Security in enforcing federal immigration law." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: February 2025 e-newsletter
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d6d777ea869c/february-2025-e-newsletter?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter

## FEB '25
---
|
* **$750,000 grant to support youth programming at Daly City Partnership**
* **I’m honored to serve as San Mateo County President for 2025**
* **Chamber fireside chat focuses on future of affordable housing**
* **County prepares for federal policy changes**
* **Ferry service clears hurdle to operate at Port of Redwood City**
* **Students get grand tour of County Center**
* **Interns wanted to join our team**

---
| | |
---
|
# **“** The Redwood City Port and waterfront is a jewel and electric ferry service connecting the Peninsula to San Francisco and Oakland will expand economic growth and opportunity along this vital corridor in Silicon Valley in an environmentally friendly way**”**
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | ******I’m honored to serve as San Mateo County President for 2025** Dear friends, I was unanimously chosen by the Board of Supervisors Jan. 7 to serve as President for 2025 and am thankful to Vice President Noelia Corzo, Supervisor Ray Mueller and our new members Lisa Gauthier and Jackie Speier for having the faith in me to lead the Board as a new administration leads the White House. I shared my vision during my acceptance speech for a county grounded in collaboration and common-sense governance to guide decision-making about, among other priorities, affordable housing, the environment, health, the economy and equity. I also compared the fear and unknowns about the new federal administration to those the county faced with innovation and compassion during the Covid-19 pandemic. I said the county will not quietly accept changes and actions that harm our community. We will navigate these potentially choppy waters ahead to ensure everyone who lives and works here is treated with human decency and respect.” I was proud to be sworn into office by California State Controller Malia Cohen as I was accompanied by my wife Ana and son Piero.

**Chamber fireside chat focuses on future of affordable housing**

Thank you to the Burlingame/SFO Chamber of Commerce for inviting me to discuss San Mateo County’s commitment to address the housing crisis at its annual meeting and luncheon Thursday, Jan. 23.

As the President of the Board of Supervisors for 2025, I’m proud to say the county has committed more than $300 million since 2012 to combat the crisis by financing nearly 5,000 affordable homes which include projects such as Eucalyptus Grove in Burlingame, Middlefield Junction in North Fair Oaks and the transformative Midway Village in Daly City.

The high cost of living in San Mateo County places enormous strain on families, individuals, and our workforce. We are the wealthiest county in the state and third wealthiest in the entire nation with median home prices of $2.4 million. I told the packed audience at the Hyatt Regency in Burlingame that I am also definitely interested in expanding investments in workforce housing and do think there will be opportunities to build on public lands.

A big thank you to Burlingame City Manager Lisa Goldman, Mayor Peter Stevenson, the city council, David Burruto with Assemblymember Diane Papan’s office and Chamber President Susan Baker for your unwavering leadership and for hosting a very lively and engaging event.

**County prepares for federal policy changes**
I joined civic leaders from across San Mateo County Thursday Jan. 16 to prepare for expected sweeping changes to state and federal policies and priorities. Uncertainty surrounds the future of health care funding and eligibility, immigration policy, infrastructure investment and more and it has potential significant impacts for the county, our cites and nonprofit partners. The day-long conference at the San Mateo County Event Center was attended by about 150 representatives from cities, nonprofit organizations and other groups was a listening session by the county to understand concerns and how changes to federal policy might influence critical services provided to county residents. Participants such as Shareen Leland with StarVista, Rita Mancera with Puente de las Costa Sur, Heather Cleary with Peninsula Family Service and Laura Bent with Samaritan House (pictured above with conference moderator Rosanne Foust with SAMCEDA) said they were concerned that changes to the eligibility for a host of programs funded by the federal government could create a chilling effect, stopping families from applying for or receiving certain benefits. Discussions focused on ways local governments and community groups can come together to support a wide array of safety-net services, regardless of who delivers those services.

**Ferry service clears hurdle to operate at Port of Redwood City**

The Redwood City Ferry Project got a boost from the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, which I serve on, when the full MTC Board of Commissioners voted Wednesday Jan. 22 to add the project to Plan Bay Area 50+, which makes the project eligible for federal funding.

This game-changing project will connect the Port of Redwood City to Oakland and San Francisco, driving economic growth and opportunity along the Peninsula in an environmentally friendly way. As a certified federal staging area, it also strengthens our region’s emergency preparedness for natural disasters.

The San Mateo County Transportation Authority has pitched in $15 million for the project and the state has provided an additional $5 million

Thank you to Kristine Zortman, the Executive Director of the Port of Redwood City, fellow MTC Commissioner Gina Papan, Michael Quigley, Executive Director of the California Alliance for Jobs and so many others for your advocacy on a project that will create lots of good jobs and boost the regional economy.

**$750,000 grant to support youth programming at Daly City Partnership** The Daly City Partnership was awarded a $750,000 by the Board of Supervisors Jan. 28 to support youth after school programming and community mental health services in Northern San Mateo County through January 2028. This agreement support essential services for youth and families, as well as mental health programs that have been significantly impacted by funding reductions. Specifically, the funding will enable the continuation of afterschool, summer, and school holiday programs at Our Second Home on the JFK Elementary School campus. These programs provide daily homework assistance, tutoring and weekly STEAM enrichment activities. Additionally, the funding will support a range of mental health services, including group, family, couple and individual therapy.

**Students get grand tour of County Center** I had the opportunity to host a tour for more than 100 awesome 5th graders from Woodrow Wilson, Westlake and George Washington elementary schools around the county government campus in downtown Redwood City Wednesday, Jan. 29, including our new Board Chambers located at 555 County Center, the nation’s greenest civic building. The students spent the morning learning about the Fred Korematsu Day of Civil Liberties presented by the San Mateo County Office of Education’s Department of Expanded Learning and Community Partnerships. The annual Fred Korematsu Day of Civil Liberties and the Constitution, established in California in 2010, honors his legacy and promotes education about civil liberties. Fred Korematsu was a Japanese American civil rights activist who played a significant role in challenging the internment of Japanese Americans during World War II. If you or your school are interested in a tour, please contact our staff at (650) 363-4572. **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=83ce81760d&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=213def5dbc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=213def5dbc).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5)

name: OPEN SEAT [via Senate GOP]
subject: Democrat to leave Senate…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: we can’t let powerful railroads kill safety legislation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101482998/526090400/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODhhYWFhYy01NmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2g0A0FpxOHhOs2hULBQ3mORnTd5UnyxWisIkFpHTvVU=&emci=bb9882a6-56e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=d88aaaac-56e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=13185894) Derek,

Today marks two years since the East Palestine train derailment, and I joined CNN this morning to share updates on my fight for rail safety.

It's been two years since my Beaver County constituents saw that fireball in the sky. 5,000 people evacuated and cleanup costs topped $800 million. That didn’t have to happen. And we can’t let powerful railroads get away with Congress doing absolutely nothing to change our laws around rail safety.

We can’t trust the railroads to regulate themselves. That’s why we need common-sense safety improvements: better requirements to protect wheel bearing failures like the one in East Palestine, increased fines for wrongdoing, enhanced safety procedures for trains carrying hazardous materials, and requirements for railroads to operate with at least two-person crews. **[We have to make rail safer and protect communities like ours. If you’re with me, please sign your name below →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101482999/526090401/-804518398?refcode=email_020325_rail&source=email_020325_rail&utm_campaign=email_020325_rail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODhhYWFhYy01NmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2g0A0FpxOHhOs2hULBQ3mORnTd5UnyxWisIkFpHTvVU=&emci=bb9882a6-56e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=d88aaaac-56e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=13185894)** | | [Sign your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101483000/526090402/-804518398?refcode=email_020325_rail&source=email_020325_rail&utm_campaign=email_020325_rail&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODhhYWFhYy01NmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2g0A0FpxOHhOs2hULBQ3mORnTd5UnyxWisIkFpHTvVU=&emci=bb9882a6-56e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=d88aaaac-56e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=13185894)
---
It’s no surprise that the same big-money interests that have been lobbying against this bill fund a shady, dark-money PAC. The Koch network has spent millions trying to stop this legislation while funding groups like Americans for Prosperity, which funded efforts to beat me in 2024. But I’m not backing down.

This should not be a partisan fight. I will continue pushing my colleagues, Democrats and Republicans alike, to get this done.

I'm not willing to roll the dice on my community's safety on the generosity of the railroads.

Instead, I’m fighting to pass rail safety laws and hold them accountable. I hope you’re with me in this fight,

Chris

clean_body: Derek, Today marks two years since the East Palestine train derailment, and I joined CNN this morning to share updates on my fight for rail safety. It's been two years since my Beaver County constituents saw that fireball in the sky. 5,000 people evacuated and cleanup costs topped $800 million. That didn’t have to happen. And we can’t let powerful railroads get away with Congress doing absolutely nothing to change our laws around rail safety. We can’t trust the railroads to regulate themselves. That’s why we need common-sense safety improvements: better requirements to protect wheel bearing failures like the one in East Palestine, increased fines for wrongdoing, enhanced safety procedures for trains carrying hazardous materials, and requirements for railroads to operate with at least two-person crews. | | It’s no surprise that the same big-money interests that have been lobbying against this bill fund a shady, dark-money PAC. The Koch network has spent millions trying to stop this legislation while funding groups like Americans for Prosperity, which funded efforts to beat me in 2024. But I’m not backing down. This should not be a partisan fight. I will continue pushing my colleagues, Democrats and Republicans alike, to get this done. I'm not willing to roll the dice on my community's safety on the generosity of the railroads. Instead, I’m fighting to pass rail safety laws and hold them accountable. I hope you’re with me in this fight, Chris P.S. Forward this email to three family members, friends, or coworkers and | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Hi there, it's Lisa Blunt Rochester. This Black History Month, I have been reflecting on so many of the Black leaders and visionaries from the past and who are living among us today. Throughout history, Black Americans have made invaluable contributions to this country despite facing barriers, adversity, and injustice every step of the way. One of the barriers that we, as Black Americans, have faced is overcoming obstacles to restrict our already limited representation in our government. Even today, as I join a small group of **_only five_** Black women to ever serve in the Senate, we have a long way to go. [**I'm going to tell you a little bit more about why representation matters, but first, can I ask you to make a small contribution to help improve representation in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101483892/526093571/-1359317236?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.03_BHM_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODY5YTZhZi01OGUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-tfg-CPltn8q9-di6BVtxobMiuSaJfGYB2wmKCOlnWM=) | | ****[CHIP IN NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101483894/526093573/-1694324749?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.03_BHM_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODY5YTZhZi01OGUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-tfg-CPltn8q9-di6BVtxobMiuSaJfGYB2wmKCOlnWM=)****

In its 235 year history, the United States Senate has had over 2,000 Senators – but only _**FIVE**_ of them have been Black women. Let me be blunt and say: that is not enough.
Representation in our government is so important. When we see ourselves reflected in positions of leadership and influence, it sends a powerful message that our voices are valued. And it also ensures that our government is working for everyone, not just a select few.
The historical nature of my election is not lost on me, but I'm not in this fight just to make history. I am in this fight to make sure that every Delawareans’ voice is heard and every perspective is represented.
[**This Black History Month, I'm asking you to help increase representation in the government by electing more Black Democrats. I can't do this without your support, so can you chip in any amount right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101483896/526093575/-1359317236?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.03_BHM_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODY5YTZhZi01OGUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-tfg-CPltn8q9-di6BVtxobMiuSaJfGYB2wmKCOlnWM=)

Friend, Here in Maryland, we’re facing two storms:
1. The worst budget crisis in at least 20 years.
2. A new Trump administration and an unpredictable Republican-controlled government.

While we did not create these challenges, we will work through them together. It’s our responsibility to weather the storm and set us on the path to a sunny future. body:
We’re shining a light on government WASTE

|
---
| | | _**UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT AUDIT ENCLOSED**_
Friend,

**You have just 24 hours to demand transparency from the federal government. We're launching a comprehensive audit to uncover the truth about your tax dollars, but we need your approval.**

---

body:
Sign the card and say “THANK YOU” to our new Border Czar!

|
---
| | | **" If you're in the country illegally, you got a problem" -Border Czar Tom Homan**
Border Czar Tom Homan hit the nail on the head, Friend.

The removal of criminal illegal aliens has already begun, and it's a beautiful sight to see.

No longer are illegals free to invade our country and commit crimes with impunity. **The buck stops here.**

_And we have Border Czar Tom Homan to thank for that_.

**[House GOP is sending a BIG thank you card to Tom Homan, and we want your name on it. Will you sign the card right now?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/6Fd40zjXTgzTwv90WpZWONOrLMnlKfKSU3PcNdKgDabbag3IbKVg_XI3cFdVyEidMadOLA2-1LfnFrlqenXvLf6629GlXanKFy1WcHSBkXV33yB7oTBxiSsYB3aCEqBqYU5NHIqLpVttOLFues8V6DFR_msU3rfPx9o776eKPpgjmZt1K20hB9jicCc9-LxPEGd2NaQBFzDDuzH92wtZj7NCUw_KDJH5ndMfj6mfavOKzwErbcULrpBmdtHv7iZwyQRxtFyKxueaNk9Z6FhJy911FHuOL5x2NOPr_lE1e8DDbWZLJigSNwJ4YaT6s2Xz_NH-tPXLtvr5vEu7az5wDhgYRpnoCzvIEZB00wEAzzj0bqtaknjAM7Iw1_A9-2IZRck6bCjGr74xfVGZCHlppjUAK3gnSYVmYc48so_luILfI8BO9h-pts9kAJ2INqjBP-2p6jVztwZ-avzhbE1ccH-Sl4GEUH8VGsvlljiqtcbKRZZu89xLhqavgWVCzMWx7CRO669s4ZXlbw/JQjp-6amKpzff9qpOxgK0nGFIJZQ7CgF/5 "House GOP is sending a BIG thank you card to Tom Homan, and we want your name on it. subject: We need Tulsi Gabbard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
If John Brennan doesn't like her... We want her.
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=339403b7d8764226824d965fb3580c4f&_e=ZiAD93TF7mumPC0oMvmb7c2kWbDNQpG2R8TCAJ7cbyPXQQ8tpgzMk8oVvgm7uqNMyfm-rOVZGJf9KbFKhE4EFVvl3h9STVs94J3pOhyKSBDNwROruo0ObSkEJvBCMFBSBZ9Cc5dvl3TReUolLGgFjg0R9vCJHkoQmv-nPRFKYus6w1Yt4KdeHa13OgeoyGXeBtJFreeV0hGUEeSctmudhE52Adv6hM4r8bYN3wT8Hjmyrh5H6MSMXsmAyHPB_6VVwaRwFlUETD6pngSsZ5dqotUjU3G2bMM_PEZ5rrWbwuq5zcKFEqmB4-h1gmfqlh7TTXqXbm0BUk5aHFY1x-37WQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

_If John Brennan doesn't like her..._ **We want her.**

Tulsi Gabbard is good for the intelligence community; she knows the cost of Forever Wars.

**These are the days when the establishment will reveal itself to us all. Take note of the purveyors of the status quo.**

| [ **CONFIRM TULSI GABBARD** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=339403b7d8764226824d965fb3580c4f&_e=ZiAD93TF7mumPC0oMvmb7c2kWbDNQpG2R8TCAJ7cbyPXQQ8tpgzMk8oVvgm7uqNMyfm-rOVZGJf9KbFKhE4EFVvl3h9STVs94J3pOhyKSBDNwROruo0ObSkEJvBCMFBSBZ9Cc5dvl3TReUolLGgFjg0R9vCJHkoQmv-nPRFKYus6w1Yt4KdeHa13OgeoyGXeYaRqjBR_QHHA0QrmMzDlw02r7kDucT4kdJ5_-7Rtu-z6t1IeYJbxVmjADea-62tbWNdQXvbxXm_dKXsKDAMi-wsRYIR1vh3m4Z8rPOJ-Esn73P9F_eRkIv6S4uH9AtPeX2OBVcRIb396DvSoXkB-pg%3D%3D)
---

The American people deserve better.

When I become the next Senator from Minnesota, I will stand with the American people. Unlike Tina Smith, and the Radical Left, who are disregarding the America First mandate given to politicians on November 5th, 2024, I will fight to honor the will of the people.

**Fulfilling the America First mandate starts with confirming Tulsi. She is determined to expose the truth and drain the swamp.**

[ **CONFIRM TULSI GABBARD** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=339403b7d8764226824d965fb3580c4f&_e=ZiAD93TF7mumPC0oMvmb7c2kWbDNQpG2R8TCAJ7cbyPXQQ8tpgzMk8oVvgm7uqNMyfm-rOVZGJf9KbFKhE4EFVvl3h9STVs94J3pOhyKSBDNwROruo0ObSkEJvBCMFBSBZ9Cc5dvl3TReUolLGgFjg0R9vCJHkoQmv-nPRFKYus6w1Yt4KdeHa13OgeoyGXeB91nkC3w6XouSCF2NeVqSbpyfWkc-K5vfIS0f0UIeXNCe-d4usZF76c-er79q_16L9PGS5woZoFBnhiu4DG5Xq1GQWSVySPPpO9PlkYx0-_idUqbZTcVJJdWRcik4145jgNEOJvpDPSyW22epFSGmg%3D%3D)
---

[**Peter, if we want to save America, we have to start right now. Will you rush a donation right now to fuel my fight to return America to the people and get Tulsi Gabbard confirmed?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=339403b7d8764226824d965fb3580c4f&_e=ZiAD93TF7mumPC0oMvmb7c2kWbDNQpG2R8TCAJ7cbyPXQQ8tpgzMk8oVvgm7uqNMyfm-rOVZGJf9KbFKhE4EFVvl3h9STVs94J3pOhyKSBDNwROruo0ObSkEJvBCMFBSBZ9Cc5dvl3TReUolLGgFjg0R9vCJHkoQmv-nPRFKYus6w1Yt4KdeHa13OgeoyGXeIY1-txosiTcXiThkYmwEEheWLBuAQCN01xSqVnBxNFuvaWb_PyehnLsPYTkNioRLGcXC5RGNAIhxtXMyzlX-sO9dGFGhP6BAm9NBPQg0tSY0gRZWZjPF2TUe01dSj0s08-h8D54IUyYAIjTepX7xiA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
_Royce White_

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=339403b7d8764226824d965fb3580c4f&_e=ZiAD93TF7mumPC0oMvmb7c2kWbDNQpG2R8TCAJ7cbyPXQQ8tpgzMk8oVvgm7uqNMyfm-rOVZGJf9KbFKhE4EFVvl3h9STVs94J3pOhyKSBDNwROruo0ObSkEJvBCMFBSBZ9Cc5dvl3TReUolLGgFjg0R9vCJHkoQmv-nPRFKYus6w1Yt4KdeHa13OgeoyGXeBGbgcaKQVrFKzUCywMg3H5DHZf5PqsdF0tyCeaFqKzGf1t3Rv3PulU6AbCU6oBr1kCdkEc7xk-FKdf37Dq8--8BFi9pwJwEK1kyo9Ei1m99aButbsXwrA6018KKyYdQaYjAoVLU82n296lA-oE4GEg%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=339403b7d8764226824d965fb3580c4f&_e=ZiAD93TF7mumPC0oMvmb7c2kWbDNQpG2R8TCAJ7cbyPXQQ8tpgzMk8oVvgm7uqNMyfm-rOVZGJf9KbFKhE4EFVvl3h9STVs94J3pOhyKSBDNwROruo0ObSkEJvBCMFBSBZ9Cc5dvl3TReUolLGgFjg0R9vCJHkoQmv-nPRFKYus6w1Yt4KdeHa13OgeoyGXexaTaBO4-PHZTB49kMeTUyJlrfn6Y41fqDnkNrw-sLhd6Flp1OLDSEJoO9kgrJmQm3h8YB8JdTDGlSJqBLah2qQYChYXx2DnEq8TEKjXTDGupijnuvBybi9DqR5GD4VZFx_19QKMLeKG8crLxJj6XkA%3D%3D)

---

P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

An unstable Elon Musk has infiltrated the U.S. Treasury Office to cut off funding for projects, prompting the abrupt retirement of the Treasury official responsible for overseeing the government’s vast payment system.
Such actions are not just unethical; they are a direct assault on our sovereignty and national security.

clean_body: | | | We are living through an unprecedented moment in history, and our democracy is in grave danger. While Trump is golfing, his puppetmaster and the richest man in the world, Elon Musk has reportedly gained illegal access to our treasury system (the same system that pays Social Security and Medicare benefits. This breach endangers our financial stability and raises severe concerns about the security of our nation's most sensitive economic infrastructures. Donald Trump and his allies have repeatedly demonstrated a blatant disregard for the Constitution, engaging in actions that undermine the rule of law and threaten our democratic institutions. Friend, we are witnessing a coup in plain sight. It is imperative that we take immediate action to preserve the integrity of our nation's governing principles. | An unstable Elon Musk has infiltrated the U.S. Treasury Office to cut off funding for projects, prompting the abrupt retirement of the Treasury official responsible for overseeing the government’s vast payment system. Such actions are not just unethical; they are a direct assault on our sovereignty and national security. We have reached a critical juncture where we must demand accountability and action from our elected officials. ** Together, we can make a difference. Let your voice be heard today. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. ---
Terror is the Goal & the Future of the DNC
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 2
| Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid dive into the latest political headlines, from**immigration raids** and policy shifts to the battle for Latino support in upcoming elections. They analyze how **recent actions by the Trump administration continues to shock America** while also previewing **the 2025 DNC leadership race**. With humor, sharp insights, and a few unexpected stories (including Chuck’s back-alley egg deal), they explore what’s at stake for Latino communities and how both parties are positioning themselves for the future.
---
|

| | | |

¡Bienvenidos Todos!
The Latino Vote Podcast brings together the most sophisticated Latino voices in the country to provide you with insightful, accurate, unbiased, and timely information relating to the voting patterns and inclinations of the Nation’s Hispanics.
[**CLICK HERE FOR THE LATEST EPISODE**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=76c935ae89&e=5bd167f239)

THE LATINO CENTURY**](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1c06c500ee&e=5bd167f239)
[](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=72f9da185c&e=5bd167f239)

An insightful investigation of how and why the two major political parties have failed to appeal to the Latino vote—the second largest ethnic voting group in the country—and the impact it will have on American democracy and politics for decades to come.

name: AMAC Action
subject: Democrats and RINOs want to tank this nomination!
body:
Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration.

| |
---
| | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government.
---
| |
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)
---
| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – [**but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)
---
[ **CONFIRM KASH**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Kash Patel will take time, money, and resources.**[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM KASH emergency contribution today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination –_**** _[So please don’t delay!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B5m15Fnr6LX3AQTCkL8tmw~~/AARclBA~/nRzKjaX45T-y71UC_7mitkIbDTCa36QwjNOZZPhR55JFLL5QMrUgTsKlVXVoTBhAkTH9E9zrIazCLxF6upRBMgZ-TUqa1W7GV_KywM3aOMImpOZlfgugMWxy2ztLYRveY1aM6et_9ekVvoiD8YiecugT1ORI6xcLswX-WXwFvgKTIDNVozsxWPrPLH442EDFd_wBXLiVv0k1xfxIbSDRk0kMXxOk-74wzRhjhr-HZTnn2IArqrypZeuDPUXN-rSz0Kg1yzG3dp2qowxNN5NrjQ~~)_** Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.Thank you, friend!
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. | | | | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. | | ~~ | | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – Kash Patel as FBI Director.~~ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch: The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story. They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.” And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools. My friend, America deserves better. President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!~~ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of We the People.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – ~~ ~~ Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor-thin margins , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Kash Patel will take time, money, and resources.~~ Let’s send a clear message: The American people will not be denied. Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement. And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director. No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination – ~~ Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.Thank you, friend! | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | ~~ | | ~~ | | ~~ ~~ AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | ~~ 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

body:
“You’ve accomplished more for our country in a few days than the Democrats did in four years!"

| |
---
| | | President Trump has had an absolutely MONUMENTAL first two weeks in office and our entire House Majority is prepared to keep this momentum going.

_BUT - we've run into a major issue._

The Democrats have activated their cronies in the media to run hit piece after hit piece on President Trump:
* **" Trump's Cabinet picks are 'grotesquely unqualified'"**_- MSNBC_
* **" Donald Trump's 'Anti-Constitutional' Funding Freeze Is Headed For A Blockbuster Showdown In Court"**_- The Huffington Post_
* **" California Democrats reach $50M deal to Trump-proof the state"**_- Politico_

_This is not just a disgrace to our President, but to our entire country!_

And if you remember President Trump's first term, these baseless attacks will get worse. The Democrats will use any means necessary to attack President Trump both personally and politically - _which means he will need all the support he can get in these coming weeks. _

That's why we're calling YOU to help us show President Trump that we have his back. _**[Will you step up and join us by signing our letter of support?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/QNjrXs7NAqWtXu-qI_mFxMocN1hKtSTxYqQAk02myutFJEJhtPUr0szQ5SUyfeiyK_2h9-18NLyzpvICJO7ZTLaoVaTiqc3MfHt6GbcPyVas2nsSIe6Vsg241DtrAWgUu0tWdE58Rly5uO1Mq0I3Earnqe09qp1-EBi63qGKhQ3Oo-TLvJ3xpaueQA9gOa4fdiEBKuHzkxTG38FfCW4B0A5ynZVPKbuIryB25x7fjAw5McNKBWeuWZ5g6TSv8XyBz50XPs54ahp_Vpg2Wyxs3LCwcFCbalby0trJmexoCgl2GtYbN1rjDaZiSZnAyuUHsyeRhHK2Z_fw5WfusXWTU6WItJvsKZLofMpEgWzC6aij6alOVvktk26hA5E1ZerUxF5xe2wzPW9ZB7d1VjkqNC5JI6Sy8lbOVZ0Pi-qZ-NG7ONJKR-vZrKgAsXZQig85JPo3t_5uPocip46Mp3Ekv2PyoUPcgKzPGeZTE0qKyq_wAd-3lOvljld9hZg0R-ISEHYlRA0L5EfaqZpspUUq65wI9TVuZi-kLIgzoTyY6nPYk9cjcA/-Tu73yQS6fXlSZzKYiv68AwJt9AOs4BE/5 "Will you step up and join us by signing our letter of support?")**_

To: **President Donald J. Trump**
From: **Peter**
* * *
You've accomplished more for our country in a few days than the Democrats did in four years!
* Border crossings are DOWN
* Wasteful DEI programs were CUT
* Violent illegals are finally getting DEPORTED
* America is FINALLY being respected again on the world stage

You've remained strong through every battle and stopped at nothing
to put America first.

And you've done all of it for the good of the American People both right now and for the next generations to come.

I strongly believe in your mission to usher in a Golden Age for America..

With every phony Liberal attack that comes your way, I want you to know that I have your back 100%.

I couldn't be more excited to see what the next four years hold.

Thank you, Mr. President - _MAGA!_

name: Wesley Bell
subject: We've got a long road ahead, but for now, I'll just say this:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Thank you, Peter. I just wanted to take a moment to say **thank you,** Peter.

Thanks to your support, we were able to meet our critical end-of-month fundraising goal and will be able to hit the ground running as we head into February.

Look: This campaign has never been about me – it’s always been about all of us who believe in common-sense leadership, protecting our rights, and fighting for a government that _actually_ works for the people.

**But since taking office, Trump has made it clear he's working overtime to enact his dangerous Project 2025 agenda.** He's hell-bent on rolling back progress, attacking our fundamental rights, and putting special interests ahead of everyday Americans every chance he gets.

We simply can't let him and his MAGA allies go unchecked. That's why every single dollar we raise is so important – your continued support helps me fight back against extremists trying to roll back progress and ensures my team has the resources needed to get real results in Congress, _no matter who's in the Oval Office._

I’m proud to have you in this fight with me, and while we’ve got a long road ahead, I know we have what it takes to keep pushing forward.

With gratitude

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101486367/526101656/541679611?refcode=em25_250203_eomty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250203_eomty_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cbaef1dd-5ce2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2JhZWYxZGQtNWNlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KSk710GMyVNMeKQfByiovRqosAnWKqIct8YfAy9oOCM=)

clean_body: Thank you, Peter. I just wanted to take a moment to say thank you, Peter. Thanks to your support, we were able to meet our critical end-of-month fundraising goal and will be able to hit the ground running as we head into February. Look: This campaign has never been about me – it’s always been about all of us who believe in common-sense leadership, protecting our rights, and fighting for a government that actually works for the people. But since taking office, Trump has made it clear he's working overtime to enact his dangerous Project 2025 agenda. He's hell-bent on rolling back progress, attacking our fundamental rights, and putting special interests ahead of everyday Americans every chance he gets. We simply can't let him and his MAGA allies go unchecked. That's why every single dollar we raise is so important – your continued support helps me fight back against extremists trying to roll back progress and ensures my team has the resources needed to get real results in Congress, no matter who's in the Oval Office. I’m proud to have you in this fight with me, and while we’ve got a long road ahead, I know we have what it takes to keep pushing forward. With gratitude Wesley | = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

That means I will be a top target for the GOP establishment and one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country next election. I refuse to take corporate PAC money, so I need your help to start building our coffers for the next cycle to keep this seat in good hands. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Fair Shot PAC and Jared Golden will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Look, Peter: Maine’s second district re-elected me because they know I am someone who will work across the aisle and put working families first. But the GOP establishment sees that as a vulnerability and I expect they will spend millions of dollars to defeat me — even more than they did last year! = I can’t thank you enough for your continued support, \- Jared Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

body:
You’ve got to be kidding... | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101486600/526102052/1113648782?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViMGI0NzI0LTVkZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=I5S_3gD4xMyNRtuYs1xYtwzPkHv5FgLc0Pt0ZHGys1U=&emci=7987a201-50df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=5b0b4724-5de2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=16951753)
---
**In case you missed it:** 👉 MAGA Republicans introduced a resolution that would amend the Constitution to allow a president to serve **THREE terms**

👉 Trump directly asked House Speaker Mike Johnson if he’d allow a **THIRD presidential term**

| | **Fellow Patriot,** Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – **Kash Patel as FBI Director**._**[_**Today I need your help to DEMAND Kash Patel CONFIRMATION!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GeJcAxfMtPTDuFdjXcq9sg~~/AARclBA~/nh4yB6Jx33V1jvyrlBo2USeQiL_kFTGZsh-5qeJ72PCAAC7aXKcwwgSxkd-Af0FF8wZ-DAbjJiiUgNDZfOhcGt4uLS44GCeHaeqtcvXYiM7aN4vz47nA6zeea8CHIS7lCQh44g_YShAFppTtzCdp2GYmb3Q0LkcCrnwulNiIgM9AaBZc0u1zZgC9CuwnUqvOvKpsDKV1CnUI33pvA_UkE9Yk5GptLE3EZlqGG-A72ufS3Ni64beFikheqWPZqgRK)**_ Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch:
---
* **The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story.**
* **They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.”**
* **And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools.**

---
My friend, **America deserves better.** President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again!_**[_**If you agree that Kash Patel MUST BE CONFIRMED as FBI Director, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM KASH Response Form right away!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GeJcAxfMtPTDuFdjXcq9sg~~/AARclBA~/nh4yB6Jx33V1jvyrlBo2USeQiL_kFTGZsh-5qeJ72PCAAC7aXKcwwgSxkd-Af0FF8wZ-DAbjJiiUgNDZfOhcGt4uLS44GCeHaeqtcvXYiM7aN4vz47nA6zeea8CHIS7lCQh44g_YShAFppTtzCdp2GYmb3Q0LkcCrnwulNiIgM9AaBZc0u1zZgC9CuwnUqvOvKpsDKV1CnUI33pvA_UkE9Yk5GptLE3EZlqGG-A72ufS3Ni64beFikheqWPZqgRK)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. ---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**

clean_body: Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. | | | | Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. | | | | Fellow Patriot, Donald Trump hit the ground running after his inauguration. He’s signed hundreds of executive orders to undo much of the damage caused by the Biden administration, and he’s named a stellar lineup of cabinet appointments.Some have already been confirmed by the Senate. But the Left-wing media, radical Democrats, and even weak-kneed RINOs are working overtime to sabotage one of his most important picks – Kash Patel as FBI Director. Kash Patel is a true patriot who has spent his career defending the American people, exposing the deep state, and fighting to restore integrity to our government. He’s proven that he won’t back down, especially in the fight to hold the FBI accountable for its weaponization under Christopher Wray. Under Wray’s leadership, the FBI’s actions cast a dark shadow on our nation’s federal law enforcement – it became a political tool used against the Biden administration’s political opponents and innocent American citizens.Under Wray’s watch: The FBI coordinated with Big Tech outlets to censor and lie about the Hunter Biden laptop story. They targeted Traditional Catholics and labeled them as potential “Domestic Terrorists.” And they investigated parent groups to punish and malign Americans who opposed Critical Race Theory and gender madness in schools. My friend, America deserves better. President Trump understands that, which is why he’s nominated Kash Patel – someone who will restore honor, transparency, and fairness to the FBI.But we know what’s coming: just like they tried to do with Pete Hegseth, the Democrats will unite to block Kash Patel’s confirmation, and it will only take a handful of weak Republican Senators to sink this critical appointment. Make no mistake; the radical Democrats and deep state actors will do anything to stop Kash from cleaning house at the FBI...... including bullying and coercing “Republican” Senators into voting “No.”If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak RINOs could help the Democrats tank this nomination. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let them undermine President Trump again! And my friend, this isn’t just about Kash Patel. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of We the People.If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen! AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor-thin margins , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second.It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen.And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Kash Patel will take time, money, and resources. Let’s send a clear message: The American people will not be denied. Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement. And Kash Patel will be confirmed as FBI Director. No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to rally support for this critical nomination – Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.Thank you, friend! | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

body:
I need you to take a survey

| |

| | | | | |
We stand at a pivotal moment in American politics, where the decisions we make RIGHT NOW will shape our nation for generations to come.

Hi Friend, it is former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo.

As we look toward the future, our Republican Party is preparing to face the toughest challenges of our time to save America from the wrongs of the Radical Left - but we can't do it alone. Your input is critical to our success, so I want to hear from you.

**[What should be our top priority? Which path do you think will ensure a stronger, safer, and more prosperous America? Please take a moment to share your thoughts by clicking the button below to weigh in:" | | | | Together, we'll build a future that is stronger, safer, and more prosperous for all Americans. Every action, every voice, drives us closer to victory. Thank you for being a trusted ally in this crucial moment. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Biden Homeland Security Refuses to ‘Confirm or Deny’ it Placed Tulsi Gabbard on Terrorist Watch List
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it received in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit responses from the Department of Homeland Security, the Transportation Security Administration, and the Office of Intelligence and Analysis of Homeland Security, showing the Biden administration refused to “confirm or deny” that former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard was targeted for surveillance under the Transportation Security Administration Quiet Skies terrorist watch program.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A word on President Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Before I get too far, I want to underscore the stakes of this position. It was created in the years following September 11th, when it became clear that someone needed the authority to analyze, synthesize, and operationalize all of the intelligence gathered from our 18 intelligence agencies
#

Friend — it's Mark.
We heard from President Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence, Tulsi Gabbard, last week.
And before I get too far, I want to underscore the stakes of this position. It was created in the years following September 11th, when it became clear that someone needed the authority to analyze, synthesize, and operationalize the intelligence gathered from our 18 intelligence agencies — from the CIA to the NSA. The Director of National Intelligence has to use everything at their disposal to advise the president and keep our nation safe.
It’s a position of tremendous responsibility, and requires impeccable judgement.
I’m worried Tulsi Gabbard does not meet the standard. From her publicly disputing U.S. intelligence about now-deposed Syrian dictator Assad using chemical weapons against his own people, to her hostility towards some of the most important tools we have to gather intelligence, these are serious concerns for the person tasked with overseeing our intelligence agencies and safeguarding our most closely guarded secrets.
Before this nomination heads to the floor, I’m hoping you’ll add your voice.
[**Please, if you share my concerns about Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence, sign on here and let me know. There’s still time to make your voice heard.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gabbard_em_feb25/?source=em250203-1-f&akid=5956%2E6688874%2EDYAQkQ)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/gabbard_em_feb25/?source=em250203-1-f&akid=5956%2E6688874%2EDYAQkQ)**
Thank you.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5956%2E6688874%2EDYAQkQ).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Derek Marshall, Local Democracy Project
subject: This Is How We Win—And We Have to Move Fast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
Dear Peter,
A lot of people have been asking how we move forward—and this is it.
We built something powerful in our congressional race.
We knocked on over 30,000 doors, engaged thousands of voters, and proved that when we show up, we can change the political landscape. But the reality is, the far right has been playing the long game for decades, quietly stacking local seats while Democrats stayed focused on top-of-the-ticket races. That ends now.
**We're launching the Local Democracy Project, an initiative built to flip the script.**
Starting in the 1960's Barry Goldwater and the conservative movement spent years organizing at the local level, winning school boards, city councils, and county commissions before taking over state and federal government.
That strategy worked.
_And now, we’re using it against them._
**Our focus is simple: empower local progressives with resources and field training to win their races who will fight for working people, a livable planet, protect public education, and push back against the far right’s creeping influence in our communities.**
While national elections grab headlines, it’s local officials who decide what gets built, how resources are spent, and whether democracy itself holds.
If we don’t step up now, we risk losing more than just elections—we risk losing the future.
**[The work starts now. Can you chip in today to help us hit the ground running?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsCgbBF5rm9TF3OCm2PlAzc830mH0SaEU79yenHkofnNxmYVU0KaNelsGDLQBgZYnw_TLU4ud3LTKaTO7PuapHWBtSwDuHOU_1PJDmfavtIPopD0JjBPdvDGIerwVFnHLWfo5J_yBJT12p0UDuDxJT9iwv78NTj4qlyqpYQUAs2AaokAvMqP2zq0slIY3lv8bDfgqLYr17otshu6SLfp3AeMGWMWgQnj036MThvarwNhhSVDvReEJT34mXXgdmYVYvFk4pykhSm-meIknUVwYRB3k0-SVPPn4DodhxfdWcRIqfVHyJ3V8hPCTkLsRGuDxeEAz2xjLyZPEpucU_rcJw-/4dp/LND0d0DOQFSFHMGdbqkexg/h0/h001.ngDVyR5gO8gwVzxMuwyn93WwHKJOch5rrMtZWCLHu1g)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10
