clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, A lot of people have been asking how we move forward—and this is it. We built something powerful in our congressional race. We knocked on over 30,000 doors, engaged thousands of voters, and proved that when we show up, we can change the political landscape. But the reality is, the far right has been playing the long game for decades, quietly stacking local seats while Democrats stayed focused on top-of-the-ticket races. That ends now. We're launching the Local Democracy Project, an initiative built to flip the script. Starting in the 1960's Barry Goldwater and the conservative movement spent years organizing at the local level, winning school boards, city councils, and county commissions before taking over state and federal government. That strategy worked. And now, we’re using it against them. Our focus is simple: empower local progressives with resources and field training to win their races who will fight for working people, a livable planet, protect public education, and push back against the far right’s creeping influence in our communities. While national elections grab headlines, it’s local officials who decide what gets built, how resources are spent, and whether democracy itself holds. If we don’t step up now, we risk losing more than just elections—we risk losing the future. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. We have the blueprint. We have the momentum. Now, we need the resources to make it happen. Let’s get to work. In solidarity, Derek Marshall supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . The 2025 General Assembly Session
| | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT
---
| 2025 SESSION Tuesday What can you expect today?
---
|
### No Tuesday Senate Committee Meetings
---
|
# SESSION BEGINS AT 10:30AM
---
|
# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello Tomorrow is crossover and is usually the longest day of session. All Senate bills must be dealt with before midnight or they automatically fail.
We won't have any bills coming before committees on Tuesday.
In anticipation of it being a long day, and to get through all of the bills, session will begin at 10:30am instead of noon.
After midnight Tuesday and beginning Wednesday, the Senate will focus on House bills that passed the House. All of the left leaning bills that passed the House will now head to the Democrat controlled Senate.
As of 7pm, tomorrow's Senate calendar is not available. Please check [this link](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rZUIg6qSBJfcO0hdyu8lVVtL31iNBZdRT-ioRF2hqti2TyJxSgcZcM0MWMT9vrAwhAWEZyZtt-fnO2lkDRs_eBg3GbLjw65Y2tgLWuS-sLP1Be9xrPeslAX83atCxA5RJULi70rT_fTwlVwJZiqY9dCtVjKKJV2iqxqdEeKGQbqC7XAnz14a1qMpS87tDirWU8NVZHAHbaI=&c=xNACtWvwxYWg_7Slbo7TK7eh2jhVLIxSy4EST-42cKKRMs_-0ubYhQ==&ch=DUSnCEJWPEu7nfNww2_2k1Lt9VOBQzSNqw_L_YUQ7SbO3sU4IK866w==) later tonight for the February 4 agenda.

|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| I've been called many things, but one of my favorite nicknames is "honey badger," given to me by my long time friend Chuck Smith, Marine and former Republican candidates for U.S Senate and Attorney General.
I'll be honest. I didn't know what a honey badger was until I looked up a video on honey badgers. I laughed out loud and had to concur with my good friend.
During my 8 year service in the Virginia Senate, I was not afraid to stand up for what I thought was right, whether it was politically expedient or not. I took many hits for speaking truth to power, to include an illegal censure by the Democrat controlled Virginia Senate for being their on January 6 and not backing down in stating the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen.
During the Covid mandates I did not wear a mask or get the Covid jab. The Senate Clerk's office built a plexiglass wall around my desk, which I called my "Freedom Wall."
Despite all of the attempts to take me out, I kept getting back up, just like the honey badger.
To read more about my story, please click [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rZUIg6qSBJfcO0hdyu8lVVtL31iNBZdRT-ioRF2hqti2TyJxSgcZcGg_JI6ZpXsSWVl7xcSTwSOqJAph-DSyMCNHBRCLcfLzvBQA8x_3XgFTFUUrNU7g6O1OBso7l0fSk9hqS9eB7moQLUHXM0mG9UxoK1T1NNyDV2RmLGEd35_zno0vCSsnMPF0xUckz03AslMaU8n9u0xUamArYt5EaHFsWvi1MreJRMAekgAuCvqeYpoZBeIkanVGbO0hN5Kmm8TFk64LBfs=&c=xNACtWvwxYWg_7Slbo7TK7eh2jhVLIxSy4EST-42cKKRMs_-0ubYhQ==&ch=DUSnCEJWPEu7nfNww2_2k1Lt9VOBQzSNqw_L_YUQ7SbO3sU4IK866w==).

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | 2025 SESSION Tuesday What can you expect today? | No Tuesday Senate Committee Meetings | SESSION BEGINS AT 10:30AM | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello Tomorrow is crossover and is usually the longest day of session. All Senate bills must be dealt with before midnight or they automatically fail. We won't have any bills coming before committees on Tuesday. In anticipation of it being a long day, and to get through all of the bills, session will begin at 10:30am instead of noon. After midnight Tuesday and beginning Wednesday, the Senate will focus on House bills that passed the House. All of the left leaning bills that passed the House will now head to the Democrat controlled Senate. As of 7pm, tomorrow's Senate calendar is not available. Please check == later tonight for the February 4 agenda. | | | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. Thank you in advance. We must now save Virginia. Let's do this. | | == | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | I've been called many things, but one of my favorite nicknames is "honey badger," given to me by my long time friend Chuck Smith, Marine and former Republican candidates for U.S Senate and Attorney General. I'll be honest. I didn't know what a honey badger was until I looked up a video on honey badgers. I laughed out loud and had to concur with my good friend. During my 8 year service in the Virginia Senate, I was not afraid to stand up for what I thought was right, whether it was politically expedient or not. I took many hits for speaking truth to power, to include an illegal censure by the Democrat controlled Virginia Senate for being their on January 6 and not backing down in stating the 2020 Presidential Election was stolen. During the Covid mandates I did not wear a mask or get the Covid jab. The Senate Clerk's office built a plexiglass wall around my desk, which I called my "Freedom Wall." Despite all of the attempts to take me out, I kept getting back up, just like the honey badger. To read more about my story, please click ==. | == == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 250 | Appomattox, VA 24522 US | | | | | | |

body:
| | |
---
Friend, this is Gay Valimont, running for FL-1. **The recent announcement by Elon Musk that President Trump has agreed to shut down the United States Agency for International Development (USAID) is deeply troubling.** USAID has been a cornerstone of our nation's humanitarian efforts, promoting global stability and goodwill through development assistance. **I need your help to reposition America as a global leader, not a neglectful power, through this special election. Your support before April 1st can change the lives of thousands that need the U.S. government’s help.**
---
---
This abrupt move not only undermines decades of progress but also damages our international standing and moral leadership. The lack of transparency and accountability in this decision is alarming, as it **bypasses congressional oversight** and disregards the dedicated service of countless professionals committed to making the world a better place.
---
**[We must make a stand today to ensure our Constitution is not ignored. Flipping this Congressional seat is key in putting up a fight against these far-right policies, and return American attention to real issues. Can I count on you to rush $8 to my campaign to make this happen?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101488170/526105300/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjJmMjBmNjYtNjBlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=01tJr4KPeRijt6fRFMexvkUOiciOPo2oAF36XBCNZFY=)**

subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/iTK0j7cqAaie9WdMadYf_iVYox8ptb1kOsa3OzYHHh7A42SXdy--7IECYWWUnLk5EULCuwSjIMYDXtbeNd3N-24LPn-1Vuw9cfzNa_97xx57tyN87uL0WobrkSfIw8MTT3XQA5RQn5W0eDmK3uZ-pcCGKH7RaqJIurhB9tF4qtU0MxeK3snLvU1eJDTRCBLiAC-lf9jwLuhWwtxQehvJ2MHX-Yijrj30O2uWu4ZJuglt7Oa9eh61_ha7naW-fgNFw0uqITnVKHyHzQxbqqn-tE6pAq3xwmcEBteGyQM4FEVLWzMq5uhNq-NeB23V-ZmEg5WnPdSzm5-M0sgdjXhAdi2zq832EIW8oXxh0vV7ji9TIh37YMEtJp-RCUpoSJww3V79SZQIKZOWPplBKRcTUTPPgfqXRAK7FRSB84VSUnc3nvytIfTAJ1mEyFUial-zVvmTTMvZ1rP1Bb0L4kJXmWhVFc0WCjm7DqwtKsB9uBYD3hUcfiZGky5t10OMHVSi/HFZFowmeE2ULsrfOXZ0XGSsUHDiF9WMU/5 "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst

name: COURIER
subject: Trump’s tariffs will destroy the economy. How did we get here?
body:
How did American voters pick a President with economic policies that would worsen the very issue that they said was the most important?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101489855/526110483/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU0ZjkzY2YtNjJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7sAbwWY8_9fE_tGzGaCoAvRKQIbRUwUorzsFdfm6Buw=&emci=5a4f93cf-62e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=5e4f93cf-62e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=14016711)

Trump’s tariffs are about to take effect and experts are predicting historic economic pain:
* **The Tax Foundation** warns inflation could surge back to 9.3% by 2028.
* **The Peterson Institute** says these tariffs will cost families an extra $2,600 per year.
* The stock market plunged today as investors braced for the fallout.

**All of this was very, very predictable. So how did this happen? How did American voters pick a President with economic policies that would worsen the very issue that they said was the most important in the election?**
[**We’ll explain why in a moment, but first can you chip in $25 to help COURIER expose Donald Trump’s dangerous policies?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101489856/526110484/2081197767?refcode=20250203-tariff-gaslighting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU0ZjkzY2YtNjJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7sAbwWY8_9fE_tGzGaCoAvRKQIbRUwUorzsFdfm6Buw=)

Trump and right-wing media spent the election selling a lie. They blamed Biden and Harris for inflation while ignoring economic recovery. They hyped Trump’s tough-guy talk on tariffs and immigration as the fix while ignoring every economist warning his policies would make things worse.
**And corporate media let it happen with weak “both sides” coverage that focused on polls and photo ops like Trump’s McDonald’s stunt:**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101489858/526110486/2081197767?refcode=20250203-tariff-gaslighting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU0ZjkzY2YtNjJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7sAbwWY8_9fE_tGzGaCoAvRKQIbRUwUorzsFdfm6Buw=)**
Now, Trump’s tariffs are here—and they’re already backfiring.
The stock market tanked as expected, and predictably, Trump delayed tariffs on Mexico for a month.
**But just like they did during the election, right-wing media is scrambling to spin Trump’s latest move as a stroke of genius.**
* **Fox & Friends’ Brian Kilmeade** justified Trump’s tariffs, claiming he’s “rebalancing trade to get the deficit down and get our economy rolling.”
* **Former Trump adviser Steve Moore** appeared on Fox News Live, defending the tariffs as necessary “even as a free trade guy.”
* **Trump surrogates on Meet the Press** dismissed concerns, doubling down on Trump’s bogus claim that the tariffs were necessary to stop fentanyl and migrant crime.

With Mexico sending 10,000 troops to the border, right-wing media will inevitably spin this as a win for Trump.
**But that’s all smoke and mirrors too, Peter. **
Trump claimed Mexico wasn’t doing enough to stop fentanyl, but the data shows otherwise—Canada plays no real role in fentanyl smuggling, Mexico had already increased enforcement, and overdose deaths were already dropping nationwide.
The same media that failed to call out Trump’s lies before the election now has a choice: Will they finally hold him accountable, or will they let him get away with it again?

The Democrats just made their move.
With Minnesota’s own Ken Martin taking over as DNC Chair, the radical Left and the House Majority PAC are gearing up for an all-out battle to flip Minnesota's red seats blue, starting with ours right here in southern Minnesota.
Make no mistake, this seat is a top priority for national Democrats and the Democrat’s House Majority PAC. You see, now that Ken Martin is head of the DNC, he will be able to use his new position to flip this district as a consolation prize to his buddy, Tim Walz, after his embarrassing national defeat as VP.
We won this seat because of supporters like YOU who believe in common-sense conservative values: securing the border, standing up for law enforcement, and stopping reckless government spending.
But if we don’t act fast to fight back, the Left will drown us out.

name: Joni Ernst - iPhone
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb9u3DAMh59G3mRIlI92Bg1BAy9FiqJLR0En8Rz1bNmgZCePX_iATF2amb-PH__8fnWvPs0pTz_8QvYe2HFx9XDEuVTJVLY1F5Ix3W4OFFykAqmMM0208Smgx4as7s2AukMcmjcbCWGgro_Dha4Y4NqZAQcFvtc0XAfTJHv2UaCMfgKtdOt73QejA-rbzXRIolN-Jq7tnWgLa56YSmHa9uucgs9tWJdmtm-1bkWYZwGjgLFQ2Jna95SZ4pkQMP5Zc5KPPQSMcZ1IbpxWTjVROSkz8klxypMwL5V3EoB7XVzwy-bTlIV5-RzV_XyW37_9glZrg512VaNSCBd5ARSA9OFqiv-ff1jWXCnXU33Ie2D5yQrAjz0f_xYatnF7T_OcCvaiU9Pi0_w4R_3K5w4LfwMAAP__X9aawQ "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

---
| |

---

---
* * *
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bdb476ece7a48a6ad99b602f18a4a9f&_e=yOO40tBswBpvsuZdTy6uRvkTZyon5OTCz3xwX3tL_r9J1JWAMqqANQnHBERULqPpEkTQVmxM4XMsbVNUUuMLSKIUU-rlEVpeAnsePEEXdZhQhGjcQvT1oQ0Ij_1THeiCTG3riLe2GVmpopcerAer2onugbAsr5JfbX8ipkDVMx5Wjkww6KLs1gbDzw1JIvCRdiUWx9YfO6V0qOcDPEjI4sKMRNwmr8GLVTsW3kuSIK3-vU44nEbhpIgB2D3UQMzeu9S19ZqK9Dhp10KaxK_FVsQANQpZ1KqoG8QmWjtEEeZQ1_bR6_zNk-79UNH1NdXFjqWr2UP8x-ycSBe_yylA9B3PwYNCugsx024oAHOlR4uUO4HErPhA0H1YmsaazdIg)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bdb476ece7a48a6ad99b602f18a4a9f&_e=yOO40tBswBpvsuZdTy6uRvkTZyon5OTCz3xwX3tL_r9J1JWAMqqANQnHBERULqPpEkTQVmxM4XMsbVNUUuMLSKIUU-rlEVpeAnsePEEXdZhQhGjcQvT1oQ0Ij_1THeiCTG3riLe2GVmpopcerAer2onugbAsr5JfbX8ipkDVMx5Wjkww6KLs1gbDzw1JIvCRdiUWx9YfO6V0qOcDPEjI4sKMRNwmr8GLVTsW3kuSIK03ohmtxi07LN3Db7SJzLlHyfuT1iiJgSxjn4j5cZNOT_KRBlnLjOHcFFr-LrB1vdTkTCqmxRTEs-XHp86GVDZhsfUbG2jtGxE9FFqcx0EJWfi8ditWAIPn7Dh_qEHaTJ-mb8VQOqnEXh6ZQn3x2zFP)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.

Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bdb476ece7a48a6ad99b602f18a4a9f&_e=yOO40tBswBpvsuZdTy6uRvkTZyon5OTCz3xwX3tL_r9J1JWAMqqANQnHBERULqPpEkTQVmxM4XMsbVNUUuMLSKIUU-rlEVpeAnsePEEXdZhQhGjcQvT1oQ0Ij_1THeiCTG3riLe2GVmpopcerAer2onugbAsr5JfbX8ipkDVMx5Wjkww6KLs1gbDzw1JIvCRdiUWx9YfO6V0qOcDPEjI4sKMRNwmr8GLVTsW3kuSIK2q0VFRNkP1aIxUi1QV87tBfUIQUU7QqLNBAnkX30kDDe9ZX0eDbet5Pi1Etq_Gnq9is3WReUtG94ypA9ej_oHgq1YmXpwbAsvQDgy90RbZ_BaYBWrUnohbUqA0eqRNRxYYko0T263QU_il4RsEdRyN) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bdb476ece7a48a6ad99b602f18a4a9f&_e=yOO40tBswBpvsuZdTy6uRvkTZyon5OTCz3xwX3tL_r9J1JWAMqqANQnHBERULqPpEkTQVmxM4XMsbVNUUuMLSKIUU-rlEVpeAnsePEEXdZhQhGjcQvT1oQ0Ij_1THeiCTG3riLe2GVmpopcerAer2onugbAsr5JfbX8ipkDVMx5Wjkww6KLs1gbDzw1JIvCRdiUWx9YfO6V0qOcDPEjI4sKMRNwmr8GLVTsW3kuSIK2UNdTqlHjkVeuKYLXROkzU_WHZbGc5Gpbd2ws_7v6YKYYRYvRGIrZGQEcRhGtV5STfiHJVdS2NU9N8vJ0WLdVRmnFlAzIpp5sQ9anN8TNH2nlj9jYGXCeHzP1cm7E1qG0jRMKcXc5gASg__iL91lTJ)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=2bdb476ece7a48a6ad99b602f18a4a9f&_e=yOO40tBswBpvsuZdTy6uRvkTZyon5OTCz3xwX3tL_r9J1JWAMqqANQnHBERULqPpEkTQVmxM4XMsbVNUUuMLSKIUU-rlEVpeAnsePEEXdZhQhGjcQvT1oQ0Ij_1THeiCTG3riLe2GVmpopcerAer2onugbAsr5JfbX8ipkDVMx5Wjkww6KLs1gbDzw1JIvCRdiUWx9YfO6V0qOcDPEjI4sKMRNwmr8GLVTsW3kuSIK1EbEvX6WWgCPUPIY1InUx6RpwfL1Xzmx2EeJ4Y0gIH36xJiCggQGcE-cC6gIMhBHL1rKjID3fmGOLK-VmhiDeG8nKGdKelQD3GjnP6caZmTsG9BYLXDCg7trKoqU5Xbrh86IX9Wtp8kJy9qye0JWpU)** There's no time to waste. subject: This is a message for everyone who understands that Trump’s first two weeks in office makes it clear that we need a strong Democratic Party that is able to fight back.
body:
Kamala Harris is humbly asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=337%2E2563979%2EUg6MRR)

This is a message for everyone who understands that Trump’s first two weeks in office makes it clear that we need a strong Democratic Party that is able to fight back.
That’s why Kamala Harris is humbly asking you to make a contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.
Here's why:
For the cost of a monthly streaming service, your donation will ensure the DNC is able to organize and fight back against the worst of the Trump administration while ensuring we have the resources to take back the House and Senate in the next elections.
Look at what Trump is doing: chaotic executive orders that threaten Medicaid and support for veterans programs, tariffs that will raise prices on American families, giving Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire donor, keys to government payment systems and other sensitive financial information about American citizens ... and that is just the beginning.
This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for Democrats everywhere. Republicans will not provide a check on Trump, so we must.
[**Please contribute $5, $50 or whatever you can afford to the Democratic National Committee today. They will put your donation right to work organizing to stop Trump and take back Congress in the next election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250203c&refcode2=337_2563979_Ug6MRR&akid=337%2E2563979%2EUg6MRR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

body:
here’s what I need from you

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n0TnofiViZMTdxPc09a3nw~~/AARclBA~/ZVxF5WjQOkj-hbq8mrWtl_t7qPXBre_5UA2eb0ACTeZsVG3JyQi4SVAR1L9E8UysHOxX6xvZQtr2qI-mq6lK7z8HydKOSi7aXmoRSQOXXRg_9wnvrdynwIl2HTQQ9RWWHOt3qOgUKpWIRpjBNtRaK_5CbdbCnIgiiWuACis58GKKjTKl-M_Mxysvraf7VRNnGuAQUrW-apizsrXBUCkNYVzr6MvCtdyez4yDNJ55dLfd_fkfltxKbRrbmCSGgxFhxIK6gcZfswRCzP6oPGY4JjOkttyKnZEmCboxJmkAi2oKEpkV1j5PkJQmj-3p2zutSPmj65y8ZKP06c0JwG1RzG4bQ3ipZtPz-SfeokzL4OU~)

It's as simple as this, friend.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

name: Ami Bera
subject: Because of you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Hi Peter,

When we sent our urgent call to action last week, we knew the stakes couldn’t be higher. Donald Trump wasted no time launching an all-out war on congressional power—firing Department of Justice officials, undermining constitutional citizenship laws, freezing federal financial assistance, and trampling the checks and balances that hold our democracy together.

Peter, because of your support, we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal—giving us the resources to hold Trump and his allies accountable, push back against his abuse of power, and mobilize the grassroots resistance we need to fight back.

Your support is not only appreciated—it’s necessary. The work ahead won’t be easy, but because of you, we’re stronger and more prepared to take it on.

So from the bottom of my heart: thank you.

Be well,

Ami Bera

P.S. Last week marked the beginning of a new Lunar New Year! As we enter the Year of the Snake, I hope our politics can shed some of the intense toxicity that has become all too standard. Wishing you peace and happiness this new year!
---
* * *

name: OKGOP
subject: Gov. Stitt just delivered his 7th State of the Stateaddress…here’s what you need to know!
body:
| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_response_to_gov_stitt_7th_st&n=1)
---
Peter -- Today, Governor Stitt delivered his State of the State address before distinguished guests and the body of the 60th Oklahoma Legislature. His speech offered a retrospective look at the challenges facing Oklahoma over the last six years, and his forward thinking commitment to a top ten Oklahoma for everyone. Highlighting some of the greatest accomplishments over his tenure, Governor Stitt drew upon the words of Winston Churchill, “The price of greatness is responsibility.” We must sacrifice some good ideas to achieve great success. Sacrifice is never easy, we must endure some pain and discomfort in order to remain disciplined in our endeavors for greatness. We have made great strides in our efforts to provide quality public education for every student in Oklahoma. • Passing open transfer in Oklahoma to ensure no child is confined to a failing neighborhood school. • Passed a tax credit allowing the money to follow the student. • We’ve paved the way for the first religious charter school in the nation. It’s a challenge for most students to find success without being in the classroom. Virtual learning is still keeping Oklahoma students out of the classroom over a month longer than most of our neighboring states. We must ensure parents not only have the right and ability to choose the best school for their child, they must be able to make these decisions without governmental interference. We’re moving back to common sense governance. No more DEI, Green New Deal, gender ideology extremes and NO OPEN BORDERS! Americans voted for courage, they voted for freedom and they voted for the American Dream. In order to achieve these ideals, we must apply these four principles that Oklahomans voted for. • Protect Oklahoma taxpayers. • Be the Best State for Business • Safeguard our Savings • Protect the Oklahoma Way of Life Governor Stitt said, “these are all not controversial issues, but they will require sacrifice and tough decisions” He is calling for a “half and a path” which will reduce the personal and business income tax in Oklahoma by half a percentage point, with a pathway to zero personal income tax for Oklahomans. This can be achieved with smart, fiscal conservative policies and elimination of wasteful spending. He reminded the legislators to always protect and prioritize your constituents over special interest groups, at all costs. He laid out his vision for attracting more quality businesses to our state. Oklahoma has become a top ten state for business. We rank 4th for GDP growth and we rank 2nd in the nation for cost of doing business. Oklahoma is 8th in the nation for net migration, making our economy the strongest it has ever been. Today, we have 3,500 fewer children in DHS custody than when he took office 6 years ago. We have made great strides, and we’re not done yet! In 2024 Oklahoma saw 274 new businesses open or expand their enterprise, and 31,000 jobs created as a direct result of small businesses and entrepreneurs. By making Oklahoma the best state in the nation for businesses, we also improve our public education system, our infrastructure and ensure Oklahoma is the state where people want to work, live and raise their families. First Lady, Sarah Stitt has worked to ensure Oklahoma is a place for second chances. People should not be defined or excluded from opportunities because of a past mistake. Nearly 4,000 Oklahomans have received a second chance due to our efforts- yet there is still work to be done. Exorbitant fines and costs can perpetuate the cycle of imprisonment. It’s time to reform the system, reducing the costs and fees that create a debtor’s prison and keep people from being contributing members of our state. The Oklahoma way of life helps people achieve the American dream. We offer a place where businesses can thrive without the fear of bloated bureaucrats or governmental interference. Oklahoma is a place where families can live freely and parent without fear. As we enter this new legislative session we are excited that our Republican Governor and members of the legislature will deliver to we the people initiatives which will result in increased prosperity for our state and its citizens, as well as protect and defend our rights and freedoms while continuing to drive Oklahoma into prominence as a top state in the nation. For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman
[OKGOP.com](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaFV0SDrZLGm58HTO_eQGRHU&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_response_to_gov_stitt_7th_st&n=2)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_response_to_gov_stitt_7th_st&n=3).
You can also keep up with OKGOP on [Twitter](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JcrYNQ7dhdufXPgOgJxNGHSsRONv6mnq7ly6aBOUvGVprSj7jfHNOpP70kR_1QLA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_response_to_gov_stitt_7th_st&n=4) or [Facebook](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UQNagEd-DqbIXa37T8ODid9mG9NGbq3z9te4_riKc6EaGmrOrRzKc2wAaVTFbzRY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_response_to_gov_stitt_7th_st&n=5).

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Gas, fruits and vegetables, and tequila will all be more expensive under Trump’s plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Trump’s costly trade war is just another part of his impulsive and reckless agenda.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101491264/526115049/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTMyODk1YS02N2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-w-eu7wKRVHjyB2VjcdknWGAlkYH8LfR5hoxeccBBww=&emci=b8327102-67e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=8132895a-67e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Over the weekend, Trump unleashed a wave of reckless tariffs on goods coming from Canada and Mexico, and that means one thing for you: higher prices on everyday essentials. **Trump's tariff tantrum is another self-serving move to distract from his plans to massively cut taxes for his billionaire friends while you're stuck paying the price.** And with Canada and Mexico planning to retaliate with tariffs of their own, his trade war will only intensify. Here's just a short list of how Trump's new tariffs could hit your wallet hard:
* **Gas** : Mexico and Canada supply 70% of U.S. crude oil imports, which means it will cost more to fill your tank.
* **Fruits and vegetables** : Mexican imports account for a large share of fruits and vegetables, including 90% of the avocados eaten in the U.S., which means it will be more expensive to put food on the table.
* **Tequila, beer, and other alcoholic drinks** : In 2022, the U.S. imported about $26 billion worth of alcoholic drinks from Mexico, which will make some of the most popular brands more expensive.
* **Cars and auto parts** : In 2023, Canada and Mexico accounted for nearly $120 billion worth of U.S. motor vehicle imports, which means car prices and repairs are going to climb.

**Trump's costly trade war will mean more economic pain for working families.** For ordinary Americans, these higher costs are the difference between healthy meals, paying for daycare, getting to work with a full tank of gas, or affording rent. We know that when we stand up and fight back, Trump often backs down. It was just reported that the tariffs on Mexican-made goods have been delayed – which is good news for Americans – but Trump is still ready to implement them at any moment. I'm working with my colleagues to raise the alarm about the real impacts of Trump's ego-fueled costly trade war and put working Americans first. name: Debra
subject: About my son Ritchie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101491321/526115152/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250203_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMyODk1YS02N2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h9-SZkcPVdpa2071yLbIq0_z55SmWH6OfbV3C_7skAc=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101491322/526115153/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250203_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMyODk1YS02N2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h9-SZkcPVdpa2071yLbIq0_z55SmWH6OfbV3C_7skAc=)

I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101491323/526115154/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250203_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjMyODk1YS02N2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h9-SZkcPVdpa2071yLbIq0_z55SmWH6OfbV3C_7skAc=)

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Team Gallego
subject: Trump’s Tariff Tax
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump just increased everybody’s taxes — about $1200 per household.
#

Peter —
You’re going to see a lot of coping from the right over the next days, weeks, and months. They’ll be out on Newsmax, posting through it on X and Truth Social, and they’re going to be having a tough time.
They’re going to struggle to find ways to justify the tariffs Trump just imposed on our largest trading partners. But at the end of the day, this is really simple: **Trump just increased everybody’s taxes — about $1200 per household.**
This is a **Trump Tariff Tax** , and it’s going to hit working families and the middle class the hardest. And while Ruben fights for them in the Senate, it’s our job to make sure everyone knows who to blame for what’s coming.
So please, help us continue mobilizing against Trump as we drive public opinion against these insane, anti-family policies. [**If you can, make a $5 contribution to help us power that work.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb25.RCmV-L&refcode=em250203-1-f&t=1&akid=3693%2E734936%2EpmfYy5)
[DONATE $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb25.RCmV-L&refcode=em250203-1-f&t=2&akid=3693%2E734936%2EpmfYy5)
Thanks so much,
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=3693%2E734936%2EpmfYy5). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=3693%2E734936%2EpmfYy5). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=3693_734936_pmfYy5&akid=3693%2E734936%2EpmfYy5)

| | It’s the season for love, and we LOVE how much progress has been made towards an affordable Virginia this session! On Wednesday, crossover will occur, and all bills that have passed from the House of Delegates will go to the Senate and vice versa. It’s a crucial time to advocate for affordability. So, what can you do to spread the love?
* **REACH OUT** to your local legislators! Find your Senator and Delegate [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101492144/526118044/-591754513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDJhNmU3NC02OWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxQW-jhoCKWG9HIQXxF0jw1TvPZezqx0O77_v0cLQOM=&emci=721b2dc5-64e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=b42a6e74-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=6782597) and call or email them to let them know about the issues you support. Some bills we’re calling our legislators about are:
* [HB 1724](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101492147/526118047/-203430535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDJhNmU3NC02OWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxQW-jhoCKWG9HIQXxF0jw1TvPZezqx0O77_v0cLQOM=&emci=721b2dc5-64e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=b42a6e74-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=6782597) to establish a **Prescription Drug Affordability Board**
* [SB 1122](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101492149/526118051/178513040?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDJhNmU3NC02OWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxQW-jhoCKWG9HIQXxF0jw1TvPZezqx0O77_v0cLQOM=&emci=721b2dc5-64e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=b42a6e74-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=6782597) and[ HB 2531](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101492152/526118053/-989379765?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS84NTU2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDJhNmU3NC02OWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CxQW-jhoCKWG9HIQXxF0jw1TvPZezqx0O77_v0cLQOM=&emci=721b2dc5-64e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=b42a6e74-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=6782597) to provide **Paid Family and Medical Leave** for hardworking Virginians

clean_body: | | | | | It’s the season for love, and we LOVE how much progress has been made towards an affordable Virginia this session! On Wednesday, crossover will occur, and all bills that have passed from the House of Delegates will go to the Senate and vice versa. It’s a crucial time to advocate for affordability. So, what can you do to spread the love? REACH OUT to your local legislators! Find your Senator and Delegate and call or email them to let them know about the issues you support. Some bills we’re calling our legislators about are: to establish a Prescription Drug Affordability Board and to provide Paid Family and Medical Leave for hardworking Virginians and to Ban Hidden Fees and provide more transparency for consumers to create a Fair Tax on Millionaires and Billionaires to establish a Grant for First Time Home Buyers CONTRIBUTE!**= will go a long way in helping us achieve our goals! | | = | | SHARE** on social media! We keep you up to date on bills passing, our advocacy work, and so much more on our social media. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | We love all that you do to keep fighting for an affordable Virginia! Rhena Hicks Co-Executive Director | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc. Freedom Virginia PO Box 10102 Norfolk, VA 23513 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Kotek HQ
subject: Making housing more affordable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, A few weeks ago, Tina had the opportunity to speak at the Western Governors Association roundtable about affordable housing in Bend. From the start of her term, Tina and her administration have prioritized addressing the housing crisis — including expanding the supply of affordable housing across the state, in both rural and urban communities. **Because of the collective work of elected leaders and community advocates in Oregon, our state is cutting red tape and encouraging the construction of affordable housing. Moreover, we’re showing other states how we’re getting the job done.** Tina joined local leaders to discuss housing reforms to increase the housing supply not just in Oregon, but in states along the west coast. She’s collaborating with a bipartisan group of governors in the region to tackle the housing crisis. After all, the housing crisis isn’t a red-state, blue-state issue. As Tina said at the event last month, _**we’ve got to figure this out together.**_ [**If you believe in Tina’s efforts to increase the supply of affordable housing and enact policies to encourage construction, add your name as a supporter today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101492362/526118648/-1803171943?contactdata=Owopx9Po0di2m1aFtmawmodjaRcWLKUa+SPpua+5O8mgoWvEYMa5+GdxNU5HnYwmVilZPaMrmiQSAeDKlGzudy6JSC9T/0YCwtDGZOJICezHKk3uRfq3NCtVnyzx83hgNWsrCegS4zppxjsIGnCzdGSY6a8+nrCG1X7v9NQT01s=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODlhZjc4ZC02OWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV9TWzH6a3qAm2DV3aTtFkv0sHtHAzFDwRKohwLdoc0=&emci=079af78d-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=089af78d-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101492364/526118651/-1803171943?contactdata=Owopx9Po0di2m1aFtmawmodjaRcWLKUa+SPpua+5O8mgoWvEYMa5+GdxNU5HnYwmVilZPaMrmiQSAeDKlGzudy6JSC9T/0YCwtDGZOJICezHKk3uRfq3NCtVnyzx83hgNWsrCegS4zppxjsIGnCzdGSY6a8+nrCG1X7v9NQT01s=&refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODlhZjc4ZC02OWUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OV9TWzH6a3qAm2DV3aTtFkv0sHtHAzFDwRKohwLdoc0=&emci=079af78d-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=089af78d-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=15353729)

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: The latest attack on abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Louisiana is trying to enforce its abortion ban on doctors in New York.
#
Derek, Republicans are doubling down on their attempts to restrict our freedoms and roll back abortion rights.
**For years they talked about “states’ rights,” but now Louisiana is trying to enforce its abortion ban on doctors in _New York_. Here’s what John had to say:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250203?refcode=em20250203-9858&refcode2=9858_434096_6k2-oD&akid=9858%2E434096%2E6k2-oD)
John has _always_ stood on the side of a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. And while Republicans try to further erode that right, John won’t hesitate to fight back.
**With abortion rights increasingly under threat, it’s critical that we keep this seat 🔵 so John can continue to fight for our freedoms in the Senate. [Derek, can you pitch in $5 today to help?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250203?refcode=em20250203-9858&refcode2=9858_434096_6k2-oD&akid=9858%2E434096%2E6k2-oD)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250203?amount=5&refcode=em20250203-9858&refcode2=9858_434096_6k2-oD&akid=9858%2E434096%2E6k2-oD)**
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

clean_body: Louisiana is trying to enforce its abortion ban on doctors in New York. Derek, Republicans are doubling down on their attempts to restrict our freedoms and roll back abortion rights. For years they talked about “states’ rights,” but now Louisiana is trying to enforce its abortion ban on doctors in New York. Here’s what John had to say: John has always stood on the side of a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. And while Republicans try to further erode that right, John won’t hesitate to fight back. With abortion rights increasingly under threat, it’s critical that we keep this seat 🔵 so John can continue to fight for our freedoms in the Senate. —Team Fetterman HQ 💛 | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| | **The NEGOP invites you to attend the 2025 Nebraska Republican Senators' Recognition Dinner** Dear Friends,
The **2025 Nebraska Republican Senators’ Recognition Dinner** , hosted by the Nebraska Republican Party**, **will take place on **March 27, 2025** , at the historic Lincoln Station in Lincoln, Nebraska.

The event, themed **"Nebraska: A Call to Greatness"** , will honor Nebraska's state elected officials, including State Senators, and recognize historical figures from the Nebraska Hall of Fame**, **such as John J. Pershing, Willa Cather**, **and Standing Bear**.**

This special evening provides an opportunity to celebrate Nebraska's leadership and history, while showing appreciation and support for those who serve the state.

**SEATING IS LIMITED! **You may purchase individual tickets or sponsor a table, with tickets available online until **March 17, 2025 **at **[SENATOR'S DINNER EVENT](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=9dfd0e3f57&e=25844e23a8)**.

If you have questions, please email **[communications@ne.gop](mailto:communications@ne.gop).**

We look forward to seeing you! **[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=970689c3df&e=25844e23a8)

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: I’m writing to you today as a last resort
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a97c68203a742e89d8194c016131e3a&_e=_egZT4ZKfHI4FSQNghP1rGci5lViTnmA8HYjAA54VlDZHy1WVpUVrwjqsX_CVX0CT4uV3Fk0XHQIOO3SuhXZ3hLPpEHIRP3zj56vUR3ZwKwwLDW5frATSuRpr-MVEOBLSjDF6db68AHkidfM_m8YrC9p3TnHKWALhPX8FkW7zjIYcRaeirQttX7K_SoN6cVZvfyqJdkLpyBsVGqhPyAe6AHlD1B-MFhCkAcWlDFOXR8l55QHf87ZqrDJu5NQSO46aKNG8YT_Xm6NLqQYZEfDlASIDPNUtOqAYDGJOo_qoFPMqKrn5rWuSsYiKQiVoVnhYqRSp69hDhKxtr4EwKZ712ai1g92_j3bO655ltNQONNSsg4ylOwAZ3ATOw4zBxzX)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a97c68203a742e89d8194c016131e3a&_e=_egZT4ZKfHI4FSQNghP1rGci5lViTnmA8HYjAA54VlDZHy1WVpUVrwjqsX_CVX0CT4uV3Fk0XHQIOO3SuhXZ3hLPpEHIRP3zj56vUR3ZwKwwLDW5frATSuRpr-MVEOBLSjDF6db68AHkidfM_m8YrC9p3TnHKWALhPX8FkW7zjIYcRaeirQttX7K_SoN6cVZvfyqJdkLpyBsVGqhPyAe6AHlD1B-MFhCkAcWlDFOXR8Isy7ZQSvj2YoM8_8mXZKLMtGKyQxezONiWbd190wqd_qheWMd4qjjK6s4FZPXhphzJE7VwC9DfzVzy6HN7gWxsNeJpfGDzpBkZqU1IQOfpZLtpT-BKhNj91h21ay-e-mPj5lwOB_1TiQvTliBANTW)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a97c68203a742e89d8194c016131e3a&_e=_egZT4ZKfHI4FSQNghP1rGci5lViTnmA8HYjAA54VlDZHy1WVpUVrwjqsX_CVX0CT4uV3Fk0XHQIOO3SuhXZ3hLPpEHIRP3zj56vUR3ZwKwwLDW5frATSuRpr-MVEOBLSjDF6db68AHkidfM_m8YrC9p3TnHKWALhPX8FkW7zjIYcRaeirQttX7K_SoN6cVZvfyqJdkLpyBsVGqhPyAe6AHlD1B-MFhCkAcWlDFOXR-pDo6GzAacIkyPnDjm-TLVFOeW5NhKbVZyxy5O_k7CNgFZXTYHIX94J570F2sEECRe8uAfxvUqnwDrn0aiaSowWUdcL4gkoUNZxkhX2KoYLGmVjLiz-c2Gx5UIWVOywaFbtx5d6p6VPh78_ynZA5uf)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in less than two weeks and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a97c68203a742e89d8194c016131e3a&_e=_egZT4ZKfHI4FSQNghP1rGci5lViTnmA8HYjAA54VlDZHy1WVpUVrwjqsX_CVX0CT4uV3Fk0XHQIOO3SuhXZ3hLPpEHIRP3zj56vUR3ZwKwwLDW5frATSuRpr-MVEOBLSjDF6db68AHkidfM_m8YrC9p3TnHKWALhPX8FkW7zjIYcRaeirQttX7K_SoN6cVZvfyqJdkLpyBsVGqhPyAe6AHlD1B-MFhCkAcWlDFOXR8CarxJ1_aM-UvDmwaL4ovRYaTr_G-JbWZTRPdti5JoBgojq4fn6jMJ_lDzfAPrwS-Z_qvQ20dbFpLbrdb1WPDt3eVAUmOSQEuOtkQyKYxgTHEN91TGTCBkl6ggwhXbjr1CTktDWbZk2J1ri_k9Aao9)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a97c68203a742e89d8194c016131e3a&_e=_egZT4ZKfHI4FSQNghP1rGci5lViTnmA8HYjAA54VlDZHy1WVpUVrwjqsX_CVX0CT4uV3Fk0XHQIOO3SuhXZ3hLPpEHIRP3zj56vUR3ZwKwwLDW5frATSuRpr-MVEOBLSjDF6db68AHkidfM_m8YrC9p3TnHKWALhPX8FkW7zjIYcRaeirQttX7K_SoN6cVZvfyqJdkLpyBsVGqhPyAe6AHlD1B-MFhCkAcWlDFOXR9bfixYXmg4ivHLeyPK2ge3nw8WXSyPiD2NpCchlbevWs_XyJlsOw02BHj0LJVaX9NHCNYHk4Q1aVIk8KJAVsDUG2cj-dznVcKCFUXSIVlmpiaOu6UcRtS6hQrCTrBH2lcx0HOOsZILy4NXFMcima2V) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7a97c68203a742e89d8194c016131e3a&_e=_egZT4ZKfHI4FSQNghP1rGci5lViTnmA8HYjAA54VlDZHy1WVpUVrwjqsX_CVX0CT4uV3Fk0XHQIOO3SuhXZ3hLPpEHIRP3zj56vUR3ZwKwwLDW5frATSuRpr-MVEOBLSjDF6db68AHkidfM_m8YrC9p3TnHKWALhPX8FkW7zjIYcRaeirQttX7K_SoN6cVZvfyqJdkLpyBsVGqhPyAe6AHlD1B-MFhCkAcWlDFOXR9_zHZBv9pkkxniqWemSgYvIT9AIfQ7wV_BQLtrWUwMG8nIUS3dH220J52lUXGPYunCBnRLo5Dqkh1FAkChYTrhqyVhUqlMHnn8gcXFm2oRzVj4K0gMUfzOggeELDZ7ULNk-bhHtP8MS66bx129uWm2) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_
---

# Monday, February 3, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** Thanks for being a loyal reader of _The Flyover_. Today, we're sending along a special message for you from one of our sponsors, American Hartford Gold. _The Flyover_ works hard to publish a quick read of relevant news each day--without the corporate media bias--and we deliver it absolutely FREE to our loyal readers. We can do this thanks to advertisers like American Hartford Gold, who help us pay our writers and editors--and literally help us to keep the lights on. Our advertising partners are critical to our success, and we hope you take a few minutes to read [American Hartfort Gold's message today.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcGK2zAQhp9GviWMR5adHHRISQ0t7F57NCNp5AgkK8hKun374l23FAqr48evmW9mfrxMLxRiWOZXSqzrm8-TYxcsVXYT4AHkAdVl6hqnDbhz27BuB3nq207KU3PTStkB-o6cUa2UvTrTGamDFqzxztDQBI2AChAkAoKSR-8G9Cdr2pMEIGxFB-xCzeVYb1z5jVYff-Unl6PNqYn6Vut9FfIicBQ4Zu-5rEdKXIKl5Ual-lzcnKPb8gJHThTin6TA0Rfmw_wIjgWOJh8KW17XkJetoBwjk1vzo1gW8vr142__qGn6C_kfmNiFRxLyujvueKHE_8HKZUu-j652ZvNSealCXk2IMU-F7bS7fTT1ltKdwrwIeR2gfX3C9r4bVcu3y5emaHf_GWIMaz-IDuZN7X1P9bPbPTX-DgAA__97TZ_C) -Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcGK2zAQhp9GviWMR5adHHRISQ0t7F57NCNp5AgkK8hKun374l23FAqr48evmW9mfrxMLxRiWOZXSqzrm8-TYxcsVXYT4AHkAdVl6hqnDbhz27BuB3nq207KU3PTStkB-o6cUa2UvTrTGamDFqzxztDQBI2AChAkAoKSR-8G9Cdr2pMEIGxFB-xCzeVYb1z5jVYff-Unl6PNqYn6Vut9FfIicBQ4Zu-5rEdKXIKl5Ual-lzcnKPb8gJHThTin6TA0Rfmw_wIjgWOJh8KW17XkJetoBwjk1vzo1gW8vr142__qGn6C_kfmNiFRxLyujvueKHE_8HKZUu-j652ZvNSealCXk2IMU-F7bS7fTT1ltKdwrwIeR2gfX3C9r4bVcu3y5emaHf_GWIMaz-IDuZN7X1P9bPbPTX-DgAA__97TZ_C) **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here, ** I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds. ** And now it looks like history is repeating itself. ** Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:** • More than 2 million lost jobs • Stocks plummeting over 20% • IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling **We can't stop the recession from happening,**but you can prepare for it.**** That's why I've put together **_[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcGK2zAQhp9GviWMR5adHHRISQ0t7F57NCNp5AgkK8hKun374l23FAqr48evmW9mfrxMLxRiWOZXSqzrm8-TYxcsVXYT4AHkAdVl6hqnDbhz27BuB3nq207KU3PTStkB-o6cUa2UvTrTGamDFqzxztDQBI2AChAkAoKSR-8G9Cdr2pMEIGxFB-xCzeVYb1z5jVYff-Unl6PNqYn6Vut9FfIicBQ4Zu-5rEdKXIKl5Ual-lzcnKPb8gJHThTin6TA0Rfmw_wIjgWOJh8KW17XkJetoBwjk1vzo1gW8vr142__qGn6C_kfmNiFRxLyujvueKHE_8HKZUu-j652ZvNSealCXk2IMU-F7bS7fTT1ltKdwrwIeR2gfX3C9r4bVcu3y5emaHf_GWIMaz-IDuZN7X1P9bPbPTX-DgAA__97TZ_C)_** during this downturn. **_[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcGK2zAQhp9GviWMR5adHHRISQ0t7F57NCNp5AgkK8hKun374l23FAqr48evmW9mfrxMLxRiWOZXSqzrm8-TYxcsVXYT4AHkAdVl6hqnDbhz27BuB3nq207KU3PTStkB-o6cUa2UvTrTGamDFqzxztDQBI2AChAkAoKSR-8G9Cdr2pMEIGxFB-xCzeVYb1z5jVYff-Unl6PNqYn6Vut9FfIicBQ4Zu-5rEdKXIKl5Ual-lzcnKPb8gJHThTin6TA0Rfmw_wIjgWOJh8KW17XkJetoBwjk1vzo1gW8vr142__qGn6C_kfmNiFRxLyujvueKHE_8HKZUu-j652ZvNSealCXk2IMU-F7bS7fTT1ltKdwrwIeR2gfX3C9r4bVcu3y5emaHf_GWIMaz-IDuZN7X1P9bPbPTX-DgAA__97TZ_C)_** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. But you can't use it if you don't know the details. **Don't put your future in someone else's hands.** The time to prepare for an economic hurricane is before it hits. Seize the opportunity to protect your finances while you still can. body:
National Republicans have made restricting abortion rights their number one goal

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101493642/526122757/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWI4MzA4NS02Y2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jr9B3_1Bu7WxIGmhBUZcQTXZb3b16wf1HMUN_SUQA7A=) Today marks one month since National Republicans took full control of Congress. And in that short time, we’ve already seen multiple attempts to restrict the right to choose in all 50 states. Time and time again, extreme Washington politicians have tried to inject politics into personal health care decisions — despite the fact that Kansans overwhelmingly _rejected_ an amendment to restrict abortion rights in our state. **This isn’t up for debate: The majority of Kansans — and Americans as a whole — support a woman’s right to choose.** But despite our nation’s decisive pro-choice majority, National Republicans have made restricting abortion rights their number one goal — a goal that is completely out-of-step with the priorities of the American people. Look, hardworking families clearly want their leaders to address the cost of living crisis. But under National Republican leadership, we haven’t seen _any_ progress on this issue! While the price of eggs has continued to skyrocket under their watch, extreme politicians like Mike Johnson are solely focused on taking our freedoms away. [_**I will continue working every day to protect abortion rights and address the real issues impacting Kansas families — but I can’t win this fight alone. body:
Are you patriotic enough to rock this with pride?

|
---
| | |
Picture this...

You're cruising down the highway, the sun setting over the water, and a warm breeze blowing through your hair. | **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

body:
If we want to flip this seat blue in November, we need to make sure Abigail has the resources to compete at every level.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101493756/526123159/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRhYTU1MjQtNmRlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=97_NbMu0M_YThHd4Ic_motPQ6oSR6xy21lNRvOO3B84=)

| Peter,

National Republicans are making it clear: they’ve set their sights on the Virginia Governor’s race, and they’re going to pull out all the stops to keep this seat red.

In the last week, top Republicans in Washington have announced their support for Abigail’s opponent, and we’ve already seen thousands of dollars flowing in. We know this is just the beginning – in the coming months, Republicans will fly in headline names to campaign for Abigail’s opponent and pour millions of dollars into this race against us.

_**Why? Because they know this race is neck-and-neck and that Virginia is a bellwether, so what happens in Virginia could set the stage for the rest of the country.**_

That’s why building our support and momentum now is so important and will help us set the stage for November. If we want to flip this seat blue in November, we need to make sure Abigail has the resources to compete at every level.

[_**So, can you contribute today to help us prepare for this tough race ahead?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101493757/526123160/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGRhYTU1MjQtNmRlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=97_NbMu0M_YThHd4Ic_motPQ6oSR6xy21lNRvOO3B84=)

## [**Jim Jordan Lets Liz Cheney Know 2025 Is Going to Be One Bad Year**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=3scxniqufjvo8mhk3ricz3niluhp4ymewxnyeh0d29yxtmfqk381iv9kyhvx548d8snx2jkr9i725y3u7clyk32xy9jv3cwxnq6yyvjoscai9ivqcsavte87iwzfukgdgqxe5x1asmelsz4rfo2m9pnff7fa9xajs4ylp2ksxzod9ctv4byharprs6gg80amtc63mg6hdw771bi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4k3i&__onlt=h)

Liz Cheney thought Joe Biden pardoning her was a godsend.

But Cheney didn’t win a reprieve from investigations.

body:

It's as simple as this, Fellow Patriot.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

**[I've had _ENOUGH,_ Fellow Patriot. My message to these liberals is simple: We can do this the easy way, or the hard way -- and it looks like it's going to be the hard way.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=6450ed8ddac642968568bd1d54465888&_e=UvqZgQAMgk2mtcYfbZx4UiSSXV-3fcZizwl7Ll1dbV8sHpr7YYFAluILtKyskfhXY1cYASZiTkJ9KKf3BRJGNLlvouCDdryivUT47VGW0-8PdrSM3x5mAARWOCnrQM9dTtE2AoxhDlUS7p5JUi3XapeNJ6q2aOid4tyu8g_XAFrJCijqZzGsYVK8LX-7NIvuAcaY7jUuoV0GeOBS2edCYh0YLOoxw3oFVqlPTl6ZSMrLYeUU09B4DzxUc3STNjvtpVjOdAL_9-cUIqV8l4sCUqtbCSShMDrUCFV9uLmwBNghIYrTPkMhlXLNDwKjr-JVaPLv8m2cSMJZt2s_3iemSItP8brHH-FkuP328Bt3HHANVgnb5EdpB5pOQ_RCiFeBrOgB-NjlP5-qyPERDkW-Xd9TuCdCo1VeUeKdYsNJh9llBpZP2_iFXFD7P9L_hWsLHXsTwW0Y9pSpuZ6tKh3ppg%3D%3D)**

Senate Democrats don't respect the will of the people, and they certainly don't want President Trump to have his team in place.

The only way to stop their games is to mount an unprecedented pressure campaign.

clean_body: The Senate vote for HHS will be RAZOR THIN | | | | Patriot, as the next Secretary of Health & Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be one of the most transformative political appointees in American history. He will hold the government bureaucrats accountable. He will take action to stop the chronic disease emergency ravaging our country. He will restore integrity and transparency to our nation’s health policies. RFK Jr. will be President Trump’s fighter at the head of HHS to demand the truth from government agencies , hold public health officials to the highest standards, and put the well-being of the American people above all else. But none of these achievements are possible if let the Radical Left tarnish the reputation of President Trump’s cabinet nominees and apply pressure to obstruct their appointments. We have already seen what the liberal media and special interests have done in their vicious attempts to derail the appointment of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense. The final vote to confirm Hegseth ended in a 50-50 tie with Vice President J.D. Vance needed to break the tie in the Senate. ** To confirm RFK Jr. and begin the work to Make America Healthy Again we cannot afford to lose a single vote. . This is our chance to reject the corruption, the lies, and the unchecked power of special interests. The Democrats in the United States Senate need to know, beyond any doubt, the American people demand that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be confirmed. They need to know that the era of appointing those that promote the status quo to run our nation’s healthcare is over. And with your support we can help get President Trump’s choice over the finish line to finally begin a new era of accountability in public health. **. To Victory, HOUSE GOP | | | | | | | | | | | |

body:

In case you missed it, anti-choice extremist Judge Jefferson Griffin is demanding that the court _throw out some 60,000 valid ballots_ to overturn the election in his favor.

**That means he wants the outcome decided by justices whose _own spouses_ donated to his campaign!**

Pro-choice champion Justice Allison Riggs defeated Griffin by 734 votes in November's elections, and not one, but _two (!!)_ recounts have confirmed she is the winner.

Still, Griffin refuses to concede, and now, he's urging the Republican-majority state Supreme Court to change the results of the election in a blatantly corrupt partisan power grab. [**We're doing everything we can to help Justice Riggs fight back — but this legal fight is costly and we need your support. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: What a month, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, One month ago today, I was sworn in to represent Arizona’s Third District in Congress. Just one month in, standing up to the extremist policies of the Trump-Vance Administration has kept this team on our toes, but we’re ready and willing to fight for the hardworking folks across our District.**[If you’re with us and already ready to pitch in $1 right now to help us keep fighting, I’d appreciate your support today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101495326/526128138/120229137?amount=1&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzFhYWViYy03MmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pw2GL0X1jhKixVOVgrQ9721K1GB8yJhYeyUCmDjB6ZU=)** On my very first day in Congress, I spoke on the House floor to stand up for the immigrant and mixed-status families in AZ-03 and across the country because I believe that we can achieve secure borders without scapegoating immigrants or promoting xenophobia. I was also assigned to be the Ranking Member of the Energy and Mineral Resources Subcommittee of the House Natural Resources Committee, and I’m excited to get to work and make a direct impact on holding the Trump Administration accountable and reverse the course of our climate crisis. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101495327/526128139/1740130684?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzFhYWViYy03MmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pw2GL0X1jhKixVOVgrQ9721K1GB8yJhYeyUCmDjB6ZU=)
_The Phoenix New Times_ On Day 1 of his second term, Donald Trump released dozens of executive actions, including orders that could undo a lot of our progress on our climate goals and target our immigrant communities. As a climate advisor at the UN who worked to deliver the Paris Climate Agreement, I understand and cannot overstate the dire consequences of global climate change for U.S. national security, public health, prosperity, and the legacy we will leave to our children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101495328/526128140/1740130684?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzFhYWViYy03MmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pw2GL0X1jhKixVOVgrQ9721K1GB8yJhYeyUCmDjB6ZU=)
_Throwback to my time at the UN_ I know all too well the danger posed by Donald Trump’s action to withdraw our country from the Paris Climate Agreement. I’ve spent my entire career working on this issue, Peter, and I’m not stopping now. As for the Trump Administration’s cruel and extreme anti-immigrant policies, I am proud to represent a district that is home to diverse communities of immigrants who speak more than 64 languages — and I’m prepared to fight back against Trump’s horrific policies to protect my constituents. Just last week, I hosted a bilingual Immigration Tele-Town Hall with experts local to AZ-03 to answer questions, offer resources, and ensure every person — regardless of their immigration status — knows their rights.
