clean_body: | Peter, One month ago today, I was sworn in to represent Arizona’s Third District in Congress. Just one month in, standing up to the extremist policies of the Trump-Vance Administration has kept this team on our toes, but we’re ready and willing to fight for the hardworking folks across our District.= On my very first day in Congress, I spoke on the House floor to stand up for the immigrant and mixed-status families in AZ-03 and across the country because I believe that we can achieve secure borders without scapegoating immigrants or promoting xenophobia. I was also assigned to be the Ranking Member of the Energy and Mineral Resources Subcommittee of the House Natural Resources Committee, and I’m excited to get to work and make a direct impact on holding the Trump Administration accountable and reverse the course of our climate crisis. = The Phoenix New Times On Day 1 of his second term, Donald Trump released dozens of executive actions, including orders that could undo a lot of our progress on our climate goals and target our immigrant communities. As a climate advisor at the UN who worked to deliver the Paris Climate Agreement, I understand and cannot overstate the dire consequences of global climate change for U.S. national security, public health, prosperity, and the legacy we will leave to our children. = Throwback to my time at the UN I know all too well the danger posed by Donald Trump’s action to withdraw our country from the Paris Climate Agreement. I’ve spent my entire career working on this issue, Peter, and I’m not stopping now. As for the Trump Administration’s cruel and extreme anti-immigrant policies, I am proud to represent a district that is home to diverse communities of immigrants who speak more than 64 languages — and I’m prepared to fight back against Trump’s horrific policies to protect my constituents. Just last week, I hosted a bilingual Immigration Tele-Town Hall with experts local to AZ-03 to answer questions, offer resources, and ensure every person — regardless of their immigration status — knows their rights. = And as the Trump Administration proposed stoppages in funding critical services nationwide, I joined alongside my colleagues in opposition to these extreme and dangerous freezes. = Thanks to the pressure of the people, community organizations, and the Democratic coalition, we’ve slowed Trump’s plan down — however, we need your support to keep the pressure up and fight for critical services like SNAP, Medicare, and Head Start. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I truly can’t thank you enough for sticking with our team, Peter. — Yassamin Ansari Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump’s blatant power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Instead of fulfilling his campaign promise to lower costs, Donald Trump has immediately embarked on one of the most blatant power grabs we’ve ever seen from a United States president. On his very first day, he issued full pardons to hundreds of people who assaulted Capitol police officers on January 6th. Next, he began a methodical elimination of all forms of accountability, including senior officials in the Department of Justice and other agencies, culminating with the illegal firing of 18 independent inspectors general charged with holding executive branch agencies accountable. **And last week, he issued a blanket order to usurp Congress’s power of the purse and effectively defund the federal government.** Congress — and Congress alone — has the power to appropriate funds for federal spending, but Donald Trump tried to grab unchecked power by ignoring Congress’s constitutional and legislative authority. The consequences of Trump’s decision were widely felt across the United States — numerous states could not access funding for Medicaid, Head Start and other non-profit organizations. An uproar followed, as Democrats and Americans nationwide aggressively opposed Trump’s lawless and unconstitutional action that would hurt hundreds of millions of Americans. You, me, and millions of Americans pushed back, and a federal judge temporarily blocked Trump's order. Peter, we proved that our voices matter. **Just two weeks in, the Trump Administration’s schizophrenic, lawless agenda has thrown this country into chaos. The American people voted for lower costs, not unchecked power for a president intent on revenge and retribution. But together, we can hold Trump and congressional Republicans accountable to their campaign promises to help working Americans.** We showed Trump that, even in the minority, we can effectively push back against his authoritarian instincts. But our work is just beginning. Trump has made clear he will keep trying to implement his unconstitutional agenda. **And when he does, we need to be ready.** **[Please chip in a contribution to help me continue leading our fight to defend our democracy and the rule of law against the extremist Trump Administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101495530/526128487/-585077023?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFiYjMzYy03M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yPP9FEVP2y-tP05Jl5EY3R_nE9B_dcqXST_3qJuvWeg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101495531/526128488/-585077023?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjFiYjMzYy03M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yPP9FEVP2y-tP05Jl5EY3R_nE9B_dcqXST_3qJuvWeg=)

Next, he began a methodical elimination of all forms of accountability, including senior officials in the Department of Justice and other agencies, culminating with the illegal firing of 18 independent inspectors general charged with holding executive branch agencies accountable. And last week, he issued a blanket order to usurp Congress’s power of the purse and effectively defund the federal government. Congress — and Congress alone — has the power to appropriate funds for federal spending, but Donald Trump tried to grab unchecked power by ignoring Congress’s constitutional and legislative authority. The consequences of Trump’s decision were widely felt across the United States — numerous states could not access funding for Medicaid, Head Start and other non-profit organizations. An uproar followed, as Democrats and Americans nationwide aggressively opposed Trump’s lawless and unconstitutional action that would hurt hundreds of millions of Americans. You, me, and millions of Americans pushed back, and a federal judge temporarily blocked Trump's order. Peter, we proved that our voices matter. Just two weeks in, the Trump Administration’s schizophrenic, lawless agenda has thrown this country into chaos. The American people voted for lower costs, not unchecked power for a president intent on revenge and retribution. But together, we can hold Trump and congressional Republicans accountable to their campaign promises to help working Americans. We showed Trump that, even in the minority, we can effectively push back against his authoritarian instincts. But our work is just beginning. Trump has made clear he will keep trying to implement his unconstitutional agenda. And when he does, we need to be ready. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Dan | | Dan Goldman is fighting to protect our democracy and defend our fundamental rights at a moment when there have never been greater threats to both. = | = Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

Dear Fellow American,I’m reaching out to you with a very important message. **[I am humbly asking for your help today to defend Kari Lake from Leftist Lawfare that is plaguing her and her family.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ad3be68a16ad4a8d808b2018d146b186&_e=KiH5EABKm8Z7Jr68eH301P5tEMxEdzhpRi7PiyDBu0ASyoYTVpVAzkdUuJ5bA07ABMt9t-kaen48HrupKmFUep3wHMlTiIoY6lSqEmKpo3tpgY9WLcG14PIaArZHiBqKmlA_FWUV-hAL11rVOPKKxnq-S8s_lyE_XEuzjCUbadP4a_5ejZmslvNvJzoZw1rxdsYzejCJFamSnbkV1k8pWUaquyfmx__MNXVkFOu8CE8HLQljZPTdGqF0iEEAYvRviYjxyPG9uTpLzanrZSwA74cSr3djmao_YYTgLutfzXMsGn-EWuygEEW1kU1lgqBorFIm7HnC1V-0wvaL5R6bV6Yp2OiN916_AaqlZW5qQgPxBZU1dgQwPToIXXKnYAAzPo-0BwLMn09Rtz3imVVilwxvgN5DSHkAP2Alp4BXKHg%3D)** The Left is **_still_** trying to make an example of Kari Lake by using unethical Lawfare to financially ruin her. All because she dared to speak the truth about election integrity.
---
...When the Arizona election system continues to be a national embarrassment...When Democrats are constantly fighting to remove voter ID requirements...When an Arizona Election Official promised to “Make life hell” for her
---
That’s why it is such an incredible injustice that the Left is using courts packed with Liberal judges to prosecute Kari Lake simply for speaking up.The establishment Left is trying to send a message.If you speak out against us - we will ruin you.Your reputation...Your prosperity...Your **_family_** ...In order for us to preserve the America we love; we need to send a message in return. We will not watch the legal systems meant to protect us be weaponized by the Left and we will rally to the defense of those who are fighting for the American people. That’s why I am so grateful for the brave patriots at American Media Council who are stepping up.American Media Council established its Emergency First Amendment Fund to help Kari Lake fight this battle. For speaking the truth about election interference Kari is facing enormous legal fines, media hit pieces, and the constant threat of massive financial burden on her and her family. Your contribution to this First Amendment Fund will help defend Kari Lake and others like her threatened by Leftist Lawfare just for exercising their freedom of speech.That’s why I’m asking you today – **[will you help me to protect Kari Lake from retaliatory Leftist Lawfare?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=ad3be68a16ad4a8d808b2018d146b186&_e=KiH5EABKm8Z7Jr68eH301P5tEMxEdzhpRi7PiyDBu0ASyoYTVpVAzkdUuJ5bA07ABMt9t-kaen48HrupKmFUep3wHMlTiIoY6lSqEmKpo3tpgY9WLcG14PIaArZHiBqKmlA_FWUV-hAL11rVOPKKxnq-S8s_lyE_XEuzjCUbadP4a_5ejZmslvNvJzoZw1rxdsYzejCJFamSnbkV1k8pWUaquyfmx__MNXVkFOu8CE8HLQljZPTdGqF0iEEAYvRvl9BjhX_9b_l_3CDE6KG_56gIlmKg2HMhCYLsAJU_kFoPpGiw1IMVv6yoMR8uH9ZFAJaYQpKotVD5SgpkLaKDlSTzPbWEYPdi28tPWd3_7igiZnrS5i_eb-CdMXzTRtY748GlaUjaWzNbzWAI93XPbvxyRfSieMtAnOORikHc2HA%3D)** The Left is never going to stop using underhanded tactics to go after their political enemies and they are going to attack Kari Lake harder than ever. name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump and Musk are gutting USAID
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Shame on them for demonizing Americans who are serving our nation, often in difficult and dangerous places.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101495640/526128918/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzczMDZhOC03M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qfru7_AEQyZqgiKoPtWlMcv71-XhNgXpkLzH3pHhz7o=&emci=cb53ee7a-69e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=a37306a8-73e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=26261389)
---

| | As Trump and Musk gut USAID today, I think back to my first day ever working for the US gov, showing up at the Reagan Building to start at USAID. **Shame on them for demonizing Americans who are serving our nation, often in difficult and dangerous places.** We can have a policy debate about how much to spend internationally or what programs to fund, but their hate and paranoia toward other Americans go much deeper. I'm proud I worked at USAID. I worked at USAID in the Africa bureau where we helped rehabilitate former child soldiers in Uganda and helped with an emerging famine in Malawi. The Trump admin complains about China's growing influence in Africa but then shuts down one of our best tools to fight this. **USAID helps strengthen our nation's reputation, showcasing our power and our values.** The Trump admin is now doing extraordinary damage to our reputation, not just in trying to stop USAID's work but by denigrating the mission of humanitarian and development assistance as a whole. Their vindictive way of trying to shut down USAID sends signals all over the world that we are a nation at war with itself. It tells authoritarian adversaries that America is distracted and divided. It tells other nations we don't care about them as China and others try to woo them to their side. To the workers at USAID, I'm sorry you have been treated the way you have, disrespected in your work, maliciously had your patriotism questioned. You serve your nation and should never be attacked, especially by our own. **As someone who once worked at USAID, I stand with you.** These actions by Trump and Musk show America as a nation trampling the rule of law. Trump and Musk cannot unilaterally close USAID or transfer under State. USAID is codified by the Foreign Affairs Reform and Restructuring Act of 1998, 22 U.S.C. 6501 et seq. **Any action to shut USAID down would need to go through Congress, and we will fight this.** This is all self-inflicted damage. We face real national security threats, and right now, our adversaries and competitors are loving what they see — America at war with itself. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: RFK Jr. needs to face the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need a Secretary of Health and Human Services who is ready to treat America’s gun violence epidemic like the public health crisis it is
#

Friends -
In official responses to U.S. Senators, RFK Jr. said he doesn’t think gun violence is a public health crisis.
We think he needs to face the facts:
* → **Over half** of adults in the US report that they or a family member have been involved in a firearm-related incident.

* → Every single year, **nearly 46,000** people in our country die from gun violence.

* → Gun violence is the **NUMBER ONE** killer of children and teens in America.

We need a Secretary of Health and Human Services who is ready to treat America’s gun violence epidemic like the public health crisis it is—not someone like RFK Jr. who will downplay this crisis to keep the gun lobby happy.
[**We’re fighting back to stop RFK Jr. from becoming the next leader of the Department of Health and Human Services. Will you chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help fuel these efforts?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250203-1-b&t=1&akid=9940%2E3935704%2ExtPrLO)

Freeway](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/LJVCRXsOWkziZUE-G44A2Q~~/AAVLBhA~/w_4Jrsm_aiPWjMymDchqaDPfJQ40pbspwvoRNTSo9nhF2QiGRCQQF4PNIeWfyxf33vLN3RSvgd53LaQhMIOqfb9NA3zHIEgWlU2FHHlIGGw8KccZ-C-3g2_K6Ww0h3y9H8oBuUr-rSChb3RMy771cf2_W8_9kFxDEk0CaZeL6KRqih-xBwKJJW9jGSP9uYJnY0ZVL-H7EgcplvjgTUpvwpOKSRjWSGWReaQ6L3oC74c~)
The protests reportedly began on Olvera Street and later grew to a few thousand people as they marched on City Hall and later to the 101 Freeway where they shut down traffic. name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: MEMBERSHIP DEADLINE EXTENDED: Peter, we haven't heard from you yet. Renew before midnight (it's only $5)
disclaimer_text: paid for by auctioning off
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIwODI1MzgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE2MDA0NzE1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Real quick — Trump’s move last week to freeze all payments on federal grants
touched off chaos that affected virtually every aspect of American life, and the
public outcry set them on their heels. But they are doubling down with their
cutting programs for safe drinking water, clean air, and more affordable wind
and solar power. In light of the troubling developments, we’ve just gotten approval to extend
LCV’s Membership Drive to midnight tonight. I hope you’ll renew your LCV membership right now. $5 is all it takes. https://links.messages.lcv. If we fall short, it will mean scaling back when... ... Trump has ground federal programs to a halt and issued dozens of “Day One”
executive orders attacking the environment and benefiting his billionaire
polluter cronies. They include: ordering that the Arctic and coastal waters be
opened to oil and gas drilling; withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement;
and essentially banning wind energy. ... Congress is preparing a sweeping bill — including virtually all of Trump’s
most extreme priorities — in his first 100 days. That could mean mass
deportations, abandoning affordable clean energy, eliminating climate and
environmental justice programs, huge tax cuts for the wealthy, slashing
Medicaid, and eliminating federal disaster aid, paid for by auctioning off
public lands to oil and gas executives. ... Trump and MAGA Republicans are attempting to massively roll back civil rights,
including nondiscrimination protections, the freedom to vote and have your vote
counted, and even revoking citizenship from Americans born to immigrants in the
United States. We have a real chance to win some fights and stop Trump’s agenda— but we’re relying on LCV members like you to pull it off. There are only a few
hours left before our extended January membership deadline, and our environment
is under threat like never before, so a group of donors is offering a triple match to keep our campaigns going strong. Peter, this triple match offer won’t be extended again, so please: Don’t sit this one out. Renew your LCV membership for just $5 before midnight and your contribution will be triple matched >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcRydk_ Each year, our Membership Drive determines how big we can go with our
environmental campaigns for the entire year. We have a lot on the line — please take a moment to review your status: LEAGUE OF CONSERVATION VOTERS
2025 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE

Goal: $50,000
Progress to Goal: 87%
Deadline EXTENDED: 11:59 pm, February 1
Match Status: TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTV-

FOR IMMEDIATE REVIEW
Supporter Record: Peter Willis
DONATED TO JANUARY MEMBERSHIP DRIVE? NOT YET

Member Status: PENDING — Renew your membership now for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. To keep our campaigns going strong throughout 2025, we need to raise $50,000
before midnight tonight. If everyone reading this right now pitched in, we’d
blow through that goal in minutes. Don’t miss this chance, Peter. Renew your LCV membership for just $5 today and you’ll TRIPLE your impact. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~ Thank you for everything you do for people and our planet. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12082538&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDA0NzE1NgS2&spReportId=MjE2MDA0NzE1NgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12082538&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE2MDA0NzE1NgS2&spReportId=MjE2MDA0NzE1NgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Folks, we can’t afford this.
body:
|
#
Folks, **We can’t afford this.** President Trump’s tariffs aren't just numbers on a page – they're a direct threat to the pocketbooks of working families. Let me break it down a bit: Trump’s tariffs will hit your wallet hard; at the grocery store, at the gas pump, on your utility bills, and far more – raising the cost of everyday essentials for the average household by over **$1,200** a year. If you’ve been saving to buy a car or a home, these tariffs will make the price tag even steeper. Higher costs on imported materials mean higher prices on cars and homes. That ends up costing _you_ thousands of dollars. And it doesn’t stop there. Our autoworkers and farmers will also be the first to feel the squeeze, with entire supply chains unraveling, threatening thousands of jobs. I have a 15 year old son at home, so I pay attention to the price of groceries, and I know what it costs to feed a family. That’s one reason why in Congress I am laser focused on lowering costs and creating better paying jobs in Mid-Michigan. And that’s also why I am doing everything in my power to demand accountability, because hardworking Americans shouldn’t be left to bear the brunt of this recklessness. More soon, Kristen
---

name: Team WFP
subject: What do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We’re just two weeks into the second Trump presidency — and it’s already been a _lot._ So we’d like to invite you to take a moment, take a breath, and take a chance to reflect on this political moment by filling out the WFP February 2025 Member Survey. Our short survey will ask for your priorities and your perspective at this hectic time, and will help us as we refine our priorities and strategies for 2025 and beyond. **[Click here to get started.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8JbLD84c1XVe6FyGBHTqBDQRu62JOYGBTibOxMs1F36cbZVX61Xn1ZSjSxEBmSAeeXAeXsfpGck8f_B_obxaxn-LmyYTQNzOu6VcDNh5xE8eRUqP9aozo5r45GwPZTWPq_bJCiCOfwRBK8NNhVaKfeDP678m4YepET6xhl17dl7Tvs/4dp/xY7Sdn17Td65yrpJPbQUWA/h0/h001.Vev01aE4y037NPzFB7cUJYaBhdTx5m-YOt1jmMhHA_U)** **[Take the member survey
](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8JbjMwCEEHeNW9OG4lmCF6TpA5XTb0EVgug2yTCP7im27NVJI5vd2kHxOkY_oxYznxl5Eh_EevrqHv7pEWbPZXMUwP5uaMeIYC_QdUfAdmvREJjHEX6VaklF63ENJ0v_sMA_O4TB2CWw0UoibiLRqLjsBdz8MziOmC0ggXeCoZtlx0/4dp/xY7Sdn17Td65yrpJPbQUWA/h1/h001.Gg8QPwV8rYtDwPbZiLXnuExvrKyHgZJxDjUUSz82BBI)** The Working Families Party isn’t the political party of oligarchs like Elon Musk. We’re regular working people coming together across our differences to make a better future for us all — with a multiracial party that fights for workers over bosses and people over the powerful. As part of that work, we’ve been checking in with members like you through these pulse surveys to help guide our strategy in an ever-changing world. And with so many challenges ahead of us in federal, state, and local governments, it’s more important than ever that we hear your voice. **[Will you take our short February Member Survey now?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRKTpJTUFr6kN3BZIJFJXqqIlorRAiArS22T3lFBuKjVlDY65gjLP1TE8UmYHOfFcKPZSuE7cc-txhtCCktIu8Jbg_-qkXu27muMcpUFc3P9Y6UxSp205GgSq7rq3ppRp2_iHOBmpplUCq0yXFub06-KATUQongUJ07kH9adgHZO7ljM5kA9P06mBZZm6LTk1uik5J51D67i5oU265S91QPNECebzT8SMc43-dam6a_BUGe30AYyxwtQWWkPbZlzfMQ/4dp/xY7Sdn17Td65yrpJPbQUWA/h2/h001.YkYtF3IvlwuRFnC1JhNY6UD0yHazw8SlCttld0jJdag)** Our short survey will ask for your priorities and your perspective at this hectic time, and will help us as we refine our priorities and strategies for 2025 and beyond. The Working Families Party isn’t the political party of oligarchs like Elon Musk. We’re regular working people coming together across our differences to make a better future for us all — with a multiracial party that fights for workers over bosses and people over the powerful. As part of that work, we’ve been checking in with members like you through these pulse surveys to help guide our strategy in an ever-changing world. And with so many challenges ahead of us in federal, state, and local governments, it’s more important than ever that we hear your voice. body:
Please stop what you’re doing and read this, Peter: Barack Obama just called on every single grassroots Democrat to step up and mobilize. He knows Donald Trump and his MAGA allies are playing political games with our livelihoods, and we need to prove that their schemes have no place in our government. But it’s going to take all of us banding together to answer Obama’s call and stop Trump in his tracks. Before midnight: Will you rush $14? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

This is HUGE, Peter:

FIRST: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Trump and his Republicans barged their way into power.

SO THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
For the FIRST time since the election, President Obama broke his silence and called on us to stand firm and speak out!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Before midnight: I’m asking my grassroots supporters to chip in $14. With your help, we can answer Barack Obama’s call to step up and mobilize. Truly, Peter, your $14 can help us prove to Donald Trump and his allies that their schemes have no place in our government. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to step up with $14, this is it, Peter.

When one of our most beloved Democratic Presidents personally asks us for help – we wouldn’t dare let him down.

Will you rush $14 before midnight?

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Chip in $19 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=19]

Thank you, RajaP.S. Here's a picture of President Obama and me back in the good old days when I served as his Policy Director for his U.S. Senate campaign! He’s made such a powerful impact on my life, and now, I want to answer his call. So please, will you chip in $14 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]Raja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Elon Musk is Killing USAID
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This is an absolute crisis, and we need people speaking out about it. We held the line on the federal funding freeze last week, and we need you again now.
#
Peter —
Things are moving at such a pace right now that it is difficult to track — exactly — what’s happening moment-to-moment.
That’s part of the Trump administration’s strategy. They want us off balance as unelected and unaccountable bureaucrats and their lackeys take a hatchet to the federal government.
But one thing is apparent, even with all the chaos right now.
**Elon Musk is moving to kill USAID.** Here are three reasons why that matters:
1. **It will make us less safe.** The foreign assistance USAID administers around the world prevents crises, staves off famine, fights disease, and promotes democracy around the world. People will suffer and die if that funding disappears, and instability around the world will increase. American Troops could be put into harm’s way as a result.
2. **It will reduce our influence, and benefit our adversaries.** There is no organization sponsored by any nation that matches the impact of USAID. For now. When we withdraw, our adversaries — China, Iran, Russia — will take advantage.
3. **It is blatantly, unequivocally unconstitutional.** Congress authorizes and appropriates the funding for USAID. It is not within Trump’s power to revoke it — much less some unelected, unaccountable billionaire like Elon Musk.

We’re shooting ourselves in the foot here, and we’re doing immense damage to our system of government at the same time.
This is an absolute crisis, and we need people speaking out about it. We held the line on the federal funding freeze last week, and we need you again now.
[**Please, join VoteVets and add your name. Demand that Republicans in Congress do their jobs and hold Elon Musk accountable for his assault on the Constitution.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250203_vv_em_usaid/?source=em250131-1-f&akid=34134%2E3013755%2E0bBdJu)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250203_vv_em_usaid/?source=em250131-1-f&akid=34134%2E3013755%2E0bBdJu)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: David Horowitz
subject: The “crown jewel” of the radical left
body:
| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkashPSKM2sQs_wbuVi8e7a5V2bN_UR2vx4FI9SuILiZjn_BiJBSp83niZdyEpnF4ZnHlV8lIDc_f5pKslYf1mWvab9Xho96wR4PQCNGsDqP1gs4ah40a5Ai0bNRrwC9E6lU_S0MMvfSMRLYjjKmrCIu8%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkauatJ3MR8pDa0TELxB0TG0dUcbj82pJwB265e1eKVkMBrTcYDWMcEPvBW-ewXqV3odDiVrPhhcdSwuCu-qpC7Eny-LYxf5tmeDB4nZFFxCpojeYxiNVd9caswc_r-E1ZCzIDIGGsEsyaCVtre4j0h14%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkak23oiK4TOyoUwos_a9J7lFGzRbhREqHFRGFctFkHHamhMVBHuHhkzCQg9_8k72Cweor-Txcq7jiSkxk9gzf-3m6GWPl49E4O6oz6vDBWOnHcPwUCFGDx7O4LxhyswHGFqUSP9GSIdyNs8VnjCw-6xg%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkapSX0SuC_ADToXh1KipixqNzNUM2kLg5np8Vf78LdnMAE5Cbq4oBwvNe-uu1voEEprIwuw1vJ0jyjBWVuiVlyNKk_8ppAMLGQwnsa5Gyeme4pYE2wykg0uqfYvaiHfoIMnWGP52ALtbufCAmHJxBneI%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkajo9IYv_DA0D4pyqVNc94L0ByY473zTlu-7F5-BEGE6DOmLj6lIPYRlilOhn7AM5CvstwgxZNoItMgV_NSzb1QgFYJMzETvLU5UDc9m_2Lu4ErOX82hOzl1SSeWiQNkwFgGrzbb8Xc3sCbSt1Kzbu0c%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkao_cXulTWz1djZu70Zs_nSnWsnRLS98hIIIC0tQFbpWvH_QK5urn3-LTtr1m4DSiVHZwGS1i2L-KiBujC2psgJ2IFycGYbjYlYpEboJ_Q5LmAbnqLRmOo7LiOARx7J3q4smPm1ygyG4EZfjCwpkdn14%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkamcuAPVC0doSO_O3-JBV1zW3tp-FdIkUm5mLOnKZl36AJDAKtiuxDmE58iJ-sYclWqHhw7ooeBodIUUvL_Y0NALj_RwszQdcNELDhXG9fe_bsEGFS4s7B2_LyUazJYHmxZZjViEtRRNJq3j3B2L9QaY%3D)
---
| | **David Horowitz**
---
P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “** _On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues_**.” **[**Your survey and your financial support are of the utmost importance in this fight to overcome the illegal, ill-gotten influence of these government unions.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0e2abbc4a88d451aac8d0ba8b548a669&_e=2v4TmO5E4ruA9ZVzVrNE_GLdQ0JShqcHZa8OV4ysbRawt_MmfEMn_V-ut-7mHQg5kVXANnnQi5Ff-UKTQHSI38Da7mEpgpa9rcwbQM43XtMlNMa7PYxutz29CDWxihRW-cY30oas_uTXNHAo8xcoeTpRcEmUNGVrU9XOGsHguWJXqR9JXB3VD0RcK0304I2kUbUXKMDjVf__UYbxYqCMqOgdH9HBH7kvLso9BFSvplIvdT04yA4JB5m2-am8awaRSHvVoGc0ZaHNWjE-rjEkahEQ-4TfelOijPbgvXyQ2HcjS-_YtQEMslzGhLdkNPx4EkNk-f1eE_D4_6AgSBMMC0MoPj1re4fWqr_uEC43JN3MMA9e_P7vWu52gil8tt-MrLNdKgdeA6kDf1oZ6zQLhwiAaXCaXSm2VgPtC2yqFbU%3D)**

These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

**By Jessica Sandoval and Qasim Rashid**
###### _**Let 's Address This **_**is proud to publish this piece co-authored with Jessica Sandoval, National Director of the Unlock the Box Campaign to End Solitary Confinement.**
Imagine being locked in a small cell, cut off from meaningful human contact, sunlight, or fresh air for days, months, or even years. This is the grim reality for at least 122,000 people each day across the U.S. in solitary confinement. Solitary isolates individuals for up to 24 hours a day, inflicting profound harm. Recognized as a form of torture by human rights organizations, solitary confinement remains pervasive in U.S. prisons, jails, youth detention centers, and immigration facilities. It is long past time we worked to stop this injustice. **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3LOd3SvY_EMBxB-X8YA8Jyl8acsd4HUULJ0ZSUs3pDo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=155759624)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ee1ad1e-bf2d-43b9-8e5d-3787f00aeb42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Former Dane County, Wisconsin, Sheriff David Mahoney shows how small a solitary confinement cell is at the county jail. (Morry Gash/The Associated Press)
## **The Psychological Harm of Solitary**
The psychological harm caused by solitary confinement is severe, long-lasting and profound. Any length of time in solitary, including measured in hours or days, takes a heavy toll on mental health. Deprived of human contact, individuals often experience anxiety, depression, paranoia, and even psychosis.Hallucinations and cognitive impairments are common, severely impacting mental and physical health and overall well-being. Research underscores the danger: people in solitary confinement are six times more likely to die by suicide than those in the general prison population, a group already at high risk of death by suicide. The National Institute of Health reports, for example, that:
> Although only 7.3% of admissions included any solitary confinement, 53.3% of acts of self-harm and 45.0% of acts of potentially fatal self-harm occurred within this group.1
And behind those statistics are tragic stories like that of Kalief Browder, a Black teen falsely accused of stealing a backpack. For more than 700 days, Browder was held in solitary confinement for more than 23 hours a day. The mental trauma and torture he suffered was fatal, and on June 6, 2015 he died by suicide.
## **The Physical Harm of Solitary**
The physical impacts of solitary confinement are just as damaging. Without access to sunlight, fresh air, or adequate movement, individuals suffer from cardiovascular problems, muscle atrophy, and chronic pain. The stress of isolation weakens the immune system, leaving people more vulnerable to illnesses. Studies highlight these risks. For example, a Journal of American Medical Association study found that individuals subjected to solitary are 78% more likely to die by suicide within a year of release and 127% more likely to die of an opioid overdose within two weeks. These figures paint a grim picture of the toll isolation takes on the body and the difficulty of reentry into society.
## **The Discriminatory Impact of Solitary**
We already suffer a system of incarceration in this country in which Black and brown people are charged and arrested up to 10 times more than white Americans, and delivered 20% longer prison sentences for the exact same crimes. For example, a recent study found that:
> Nationwide, in 800 jurisdictions, black people were arrested at a rate 5x higher than white people. In 250 jurisdictions, black people were 10 times more likely to be arrested than their white counterparts.
Solitary confinement further reflects and exacerbates these cruel systemic inequities. Black, Latino, and Indigenous individuals are disproportionately subjected to this practice, a stark reminder of the racial injustices within the criminal legal system. Vulnerable groups, including people with mental health conditions, LGBTQ+ individuals, and youth, are also more likely to be placed in solitary confinement. This not only deepens existing disparities but also compounds the harm done to those who are already marginalized.
## **The Counter-Impact of Solitary**
Adding insult to all the injury documented above, far from promoting rehabilitation, solitary confinement undermines it. Isolation damages social and cognitive functioning, making it more difficult for individuals to engage with others or adapt to life outside. Instead of addressing behavioral issues, solitary often exacerbates them, increasing the likelihood of recidivism. Therefore, solitary confinement jeopardizes public safety by failing to prepare incarcerated individuals for reentry into their communities. To put it bluntly, solitary confinement doesn't just torture the individual suffering confinement, it also makes you and I less safe.
Literally speaking, if some evil mastermind wanted to build a system in which people admitted for alleged crimes are even _more_ likely to commit crimes after leaving that system--solitary confinement is the system that evil mastermind would build. Far from rehabilitating a given individual or from making our societies safer, solitary makes both the individual and our society less safe and more dangerous.
## **A Violation of International Human Rights**
Finally, solitary confinement violates human rights. It is not just a moral failing; it is a breach of international standards and recognized as torture. Despite this, U.S. practices routinely isolate individuals for months, years, and even decades. For years, the international community has repeatedly called on the U.S. to reform its use of solitary confinement.
Each day this practice continues, it erodes our nation's commitment to human dignity and justice.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3LOd3SvY_EMBxB-X8YA8Jyl8acsd4HUULJ0ZSUs3pDo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155759624)
## **Actions To Stop This Injustice**
The evidence is clear, and the moral imperative is urgent: it is time to end solitary confinement. And we can and must act to end this cruel and outdated practice that perpetuates harm and fails to deliver justice. What does that look like, practically?
1. **Enact Federal Reform:** Push your elected representatives to co-sponsor and pass the[ Federal End Solitary Confinement Act](https://substack.com/redirect/49b880fe-07de-4912-ab73-2ee826f3d2fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). This Act would build on the aforementioned best practices to ban solitary and promote proven alternatives in federal custody, while incentivizing states and localities to do the same. Have your organization endorse the End Solitary Confinement Act here:[ https://bit.ly/EndorseEndSolitaryAct](https://substack.com/redirect/72c3fa8c-5010-450a-a601-cd930a75df1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We absolutely need this federal standard of reform and rehabilitation to ensure equality and justice nationwide.
2. **Follow Proven State and Local Models:** Visit the[ Unlock the Box website](https://substack.com/redirect/6c835eab-2111-4035-8c90-cb69c667b25c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to learn about grassroots campaigns led by people who have lived through solitary or had family members inside and are leading a movement for change. As a result of these grassroots efforts, New York State, New Jersey, Connecticut, Nevada, and others have placed significant restrictions on solitary, New York City banned solitary entirely, numerous states have restricted solitary for vulnerable groups, and advocates are pushing for effective implementation.
3. **Replace Retribution With Restoration:** Join us in contacting your local, state, and[ federal representatives](https://substack.com/redirect/15f34339-d9ba-4d7a-8a5e-59441bcf02d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to urge them to end solitary confinement. When speaking to them, convey to them that in contrast to punitive prison terms, they enact restorative justice programs as alternatives, which have proven far more effective in promoting rehabilitation and reducing harm. For example, we have known for decades through numerous studies that restorative justice programs decrease recidivism by an astounding 50%, dramatically increase victim satisfaction that they received justice, decrease victim fear of re-victimization, and dramatically increases the likelihood that the that a person who caused harm completes their restitution obligations.

In short, if we work together, we can join human rights leaders globally and end this cruel and torturous practice of solitary confinement.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..3LOd3SvY_EMBxB-X8YA8Jyl8acsd4HUULJ0ZSUs3pDo?&gift=true)
## **Conclusion**
Solitary confinement does nothing but ensure that the psychological, physical, and social impacts ripple far beyond prison walls, affecting families, communities, and society as a whole. It further harms and marginalizes already marginalized communities. It makes us all less safe, and it undermines our Constitutional principles of justice and humanity. By advocating for more humane alternatives, while also working to reduce the use of incarceration as a whole, we can move toward a justice system that prioritizes rehabilitation, equity, and human dignity.
Together, we can dismantle this practice and create a future that aligns with our values of compassion and justice. Let us act now to end solitary confinement--for good.
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

clean_body: Most Americans are entirely unaware that every day the U.S. Government tortures more than 100,000 people in prison -- but here's how we stop this injustice | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Most Americans are entirely unaware that every day the U.S. Government tortures more than 100,000 people in prison -- but here's how we stop this injustice | | | Feb 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | By Jessica Sandoval and Qasim Rashid Let 's Address This is proud to publish this piece co-authored with Jessica Sandoval, National Director of the Unlock the Box Campaign to End Solitary Confinement. Imagine being locked in a small cell, cut off from meaningful human contact, sunlight, or fresh air for days, months, or even years. This is the grim reality for at least 122,000 people each day across the U.S. in solitary confinement. Solitary isolates individuals for up to 24 hours a day, inflicting profound harm. Recognized as a form of torture by human rights organizations, solitary confinement remains pervasive in U.S. prisons, jails, youth detention centers, and immigration facilities. It is long past time we worked to stop this injustice. Let 's Address This. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Former Dane County, Wisconsin, Sheriff David Mahoney shows how small a solitary confinement cell is at the county jail. (Morry Gash/The Associated Press) The Psychological Harm of Solitary The psychological harm caused by solitary confinement is severe, long-lasting and profound. Any length of time in solitary, including measured in hours or days, takes a heavy toll on mental health. Deprived of human contact, individuals often experience anxiety, depression, paranoia, and even psychosis.Hallucinations and cognitive impairments are common, severely impacting mental and physical health and overall well-being. Research underscores the danger: people in solitary confinement are six times more likely to die by suicide than those in the general prison population, a group already at high risk of death by suicide. The National Institute of Health reports, for example, that: Although only 7.3% of admissions included any solitary confinement, 53.3% of acts of self-harm and 45.0% of acts of potentially fatal self-harm occurred within this group.1 And behind those statistics are tragic stories like that of Kalief Browder, a Black teen falsely accused of stealing a backpack. For more than 700 days, Browder was held in solitary confinement for more than 23 hours a day. The mental trauma and torture he suffered was fatal, and on June 6, 2015 he died by suicide. The Physical Harm of Solitary The physical impacts of solitary confinement are just as damaging. Without access to sunlight, fresh air, or adequate movement, individuals suffer from cardiovascular problems, muscle atrophy, and chronic pain. The stress of isolation weakens the immune system, leaving people more vulnerable to illnesses. Studies highlight these risks. For example, a Journal of American Medical Association study found that individuals subjected to solitary are 78% more likely to die by suicide within a year of release and 127% more likely to die of an opioid overdose within two weeks. These figures paint a grim picture of the toll isolation takes on the body and the difficulty of reentry into society. The Discriminatory Impact of Solitary We already suffer a system of incarceration in this country in which Black and brown people are charged and arrested up to 10 times more than white Americans, and delivered 20% longer prison sentences for the exact same crimes. For example, a recent study found that: Nationwide, in 800 jurisdictions, black people were arrested at a rate 5x higher than white people. In 250 jurisdictions, black people were 10 times more likely to be arrested than their white counterparts. Solitary confinement further reflects and exacerbates these cruel systemic inequities. Black, Latino, and Indigenous individuals are disproportionately subjected to this practice, a stark reminder of the racial injustices within the criminal legal system. Vulnerable groups, including people with mental health conditions, LGBTQ+ individuals, and youth, are also more likely to be placed in solitary confinement. This not only deepens existing disparities but also compounds the harm done to those who are already marginalized. The Counter-Impact of Solitary Adding insult to all the injury documented above, far from promoting rehabilitation, solitary confinement undermines it. Isolation damages social and cognitive functioning, making it more difficult for individuals to engage with others or adapt to life outside. Instead of addressing behavioral issues, solitary often exacerbates them, increasing the likelihood of recidivism. Therefore, solitary confinement jeopardizes public safety by failing to prepare incarcerated individuals for reentry into their communities. To put it bluntly, solitary confinement doesn't just torture the individual suffering confinement, it also makes you and I less safe. Literally speaking, if some evil mastermind wanted to build a system in which people admitted for alleged crimes are even more likely to commit crimes after leaving that system--solitary confinement is the system that evil mastermind would build. Far from rehabilitating a given individual or from making our societies safer, solitary makes both the individual and our society less safe and more dangerous. A Violation of International Human Rights Finally, solitary confinement violates human rights. It is not just a moral failing; it is a breach of international standards and recognized as torture. Despite this, U.S. practices routinely isolate individuals for months, years, and even decades. For years, the international community has repeatedly called on the U.S. to reform its use of solitary confinement. Each day this practice continues, it erodes our nation's commitment to human dignity and justice. Actions To Stop This Injustice The evidence is clear, and the moral imperative is urgent: it is time to end solitary confinement. And we can and must act to end this cruel and outdated practice that perpetuates harm and fails to deliver justice. What does that look like, practically? 1. Enact Federal Reform: Push your elected representatives to co-sponsor and pass the. This Act would build on the aforementioned best practices to ban solitary and promote proven alternatives in federal custody, while incentivizing states and localities to do the same. Have your organization endorse the End Solitary Confinement Act here:. We absolutely need this federal standard of reform and rehabilitation to ensure equality and justice nationwide. 2. Follow Proven State and Local Models: Visit the to learn about grassroots campaigns led by people who have lived through solitary or had family members inside and are leading a movement for change. As a result of these grassroots efforts, New York State, New Jersey, Connecticut, Nevada, and others have placed significant restrictions on solitary, New York City banned solitary entirely, numerous states have restricted solitary for vulnerable groups, and advocates are pushing for effective implementation. 3. Replace Retribution With Restoration: Join us in contacting your local, state, and to urge them to end solitary confinement. When speaking to them, convey to them that in contrast to punitive prison terms, they enact restorative justice programs as alternatives, which have proven far more effective in promoting rehabilitation and reducing harm. For example, we have known for decades through numerous studies that restorative justice programs decrease recidivism by an astounding 50%, dramatically increase victim satisfaction that they received justice, decrease victim fear of re-victimization, and dramatically increases the likelihood that the that a person who caused harm completes their restitution obligations. In short, if we work together, we can join human rights leaders globally and end this cruel and torturous practice of solitary confinement. Conclusion Solitary confinement does nothing but ensure that the psychological, physical, and social impacts ripple far beyond prison walls, affecting families, communities, and society as a whole. It further harms and marginalizes already marginalized communities. It makes us all less safe, and it undermines our Constitutional principles of justice and humanity. By advocating for more humane alternatives, while also working to reduce the use of incarceration as a whole, we can move toward a justice system that prioritizes rehabilitation, equity, and human dignity. Together, we can dismantle this practice and create a future that aligns with our values of compassion and justice. Let us act now to end solitary confinement--for good. Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help Me Save My Son
body:
Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f49708980e684d79802201a752e06c2f&_e=oJ2a3HsewhcKfSqffAFqHN1sttF2YvXdNOgGgN61n4J3JqACXYT8aFME1KIlmoLkyoEncm9lmtOy97Ds7VobcR0KLrsrB29CxA1xNE5dwJVBkIdztd8HTqfqFsVL43LFzHzS2IuuK0D1TOWV2zrAV7tO_YiOIfshElcxQzUbvWbPGJXeYGyX5sfqfU39k3gGXS76rTxN6jDXqGx2q1LTX4SRMK9itdLKYfpQ3WpkqooViD0Kv--xeGp_bvfqRwZb1nGo9c_gp4Iyi1hnGem1U-tt7a2lyRE3DrIekfSoJwv0t_3GbJlFGJTI8IMvkMxxWopK7vz6SavDhIV5oPejW7Qe7iK7Swy2lKQaYspyRiAJ-2EsREgql37G7H4KUSLhu-IIc-sRo8DEcA4AGAQ-iA%3D%3D)
---
My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son **James** in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” **James** against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy **James **wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with **James** to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son **James **from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... [I hope you’ll consider sending a one-time gift to PLDF today to help fund my battle against the California courts and judges who are trying to mutilate my son.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f49708980e684d79802201a752e06c2f&_e=oJ2a3HsewhcKfSqffAFqHN1sttF2YvXdNOgGgN61n4J3JqACXYT8aFME1KIlmoLkyoEncm9lmtOy97Ds7VobcR0KLrsrB29CxA1xNE5dwJVBkIdztd8HTqfqFsVL43LFzHzS2IuuK0D1TOWV2zrAV7tO_YiOIfshElcxQzUbvWbPGJXeYGyX5sfqfU39k3gGXS76rTxN6jDXqGx2q1LTX4SRMK9itdLKYfpQ3WpkqooViD0Kv--xeGp_bvfqRwZbQo5HLuZYuGc_r1-TaQvnzEK9RSEHWNyBE_oUDGREpEWjZqIT8mDQ9g1rDZwfWKfyEQ4sAgWTBox6LT7nUKaGczLJNTzVMDixIYU9E4XJkdeuC4szT_LHvpVqCgJ3dGgqmDGFFNLEjcOk3KijbWz1jw%3D%3D "https://patriots-legal-defense-fund.revv.co/rcl9ea4bb135305b?amount=50&utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250203_BDG_PLDF_DMSJ2_BDG_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=FREEDOMTRAIN")

clean_body: Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” James against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy James wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... "" | | | | | | | I was fired from my job in the tech industry after speaking out about this LGBTQ+ madness. I have been funding my fight from my own savings. But I can’t keep this up forever. And I’m running out of time to save James. "" I’ve met so many good Americans in this battle. It’s what keeps me going when I feel there’s no hope left. God bless you for reading my letter. With gratitude, P.S. After Tucker Carlson interviewed me on his podcast, I was fired from my job and blacklisted. These radical LGBTQ+ activists have the upper hand when it comes to money and power. But I’ll never stop fighting to save my son. By God, never. P.P.S. This is an old photo...I know I don’t look like that anymore.Sadly, I don’t know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.Would you help me fight these corrupt judges and politicians? I’d love to send you a new photo once we’ve overturned these bogus rulings and I’m reunited with my boy. Thank you for reading my letter. "" Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

The privatization of the U.S. Postal Service would be _**AWFUL!**_

➡ It would shake up consumer shipping and business supply chains.
