name: Forward Party
subject: Change - The Right Way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
America needs change, but it doesn't need it like this...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=1)
---
| Peter -- The Forward Party is built on the idea that **_America needs change_**. Change in leadership. Change in how we approach our biggest problems. Even change in which problems we view as the most important. The American dream feels out of reach for too many—those Americans have been sending a clear message that they want to disrupt the status quo through their votes for decades. But not all disruption is good. Sometimes it can be dangerous. And it’s too easy for those in power to exploit the appearance of change for their own needs, instead of the needs of the American people. Since his inauguration, a number of President Trump’s nominees had their confirmation hearings. Some have already been confirmed, passing through the Senate, even if only by tie-breaking votes by Vice President Vance. Many people, including leaders at the Forward Party, feel **many of these individuals are unqualified** for the positions they are being appointed to. **Lives hang in the balance** based on the decisions these nominees will make. Additionally, disrupting the status quo in search of better ways to serve the interests of the American people shouldn’t mean compromising on science, ethics, and human decency. Too many of Trump’s nominees have lapses in these areas. We need a government that is willing and able to challenge the corrupt centers of power in this country, not a government that intends to implant its own set of special interests. Those that have sold out our lives, our futures, our autonomy, our health, and our children need to be called to account. That is why we founded the Forward Party in the first place. It’s time to invest in and nourish a **pipeline of independent-minded leaders, candidates, and activists** who will galvanize the country to implement changes that will give us _back_ our lives, our futures, and our health. That will help us build a world that’s better for our children and for generations to come. For too long, the legacy parties have frozen out, demonized, or silenced those who are calling for change. We deserve better. While we disapprove of many, if not most, of the Trump cabinet nominees, we also recognize that a few of them are raising issues and questions about domestic and foreign policy that need to be pursued. But we also **deserve better than flawed nominees who have bent a knee to the President** and shown, through their answers during their confirmation hearings, that they’re more interested in being loyal to Trump than in being loyal to us, the American people. Our work is to build the infrastructure necessary to elect creative and positive disruptors, independent-minded candidates to represent the **half of all voters who are currently disenfranchised by the two-party system**. We will also work to ensure that all public servants—elected and appointed—are held accountable to the law, the Constitution, and the voters. Sincerely, The Forward Party [](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=2)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=3)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=4)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=change_the_time_is_now&n=9) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: The Squad
subject: Happy birthday, Ayanna! 🎂
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250203-1210-foote&t=1001&akid=1210%2E342411%2Evu9q4O ]Squad Victory Fund

Today is Ayanna’s birthday,
Peter!

We couldn’t let today pass without celebrating Ayanna’s incredible work
and dedication to the movement.

Ayanna is a champion for justice, equity, and change, and she’s made a
profound impact for her constituents and our progressive movement. From
her powerful leadership to her fierce commitment to people-powered
progress, Ayanna has been at the forefront of the fight for a better
future.

That’s why we’re asking for your help to make her birthday extra special.
We’ve set up a birthday card for Ayanna, and we want you to sign it! 🙌

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AP-birthday-card-25/?source=em20250203-1210&akid=1210%2E342411%2Evu9q4O ]Let’s make her day as extraordinary as the work she does every single
day. Will you take a moment and sign your name on Ayanna’s card? You can
even leave a personal note, if you’d like!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AP-birthday-card-25/?source=em20250203-1210&akid=1210%2E342411%2Evu9q4O ][IMG]

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AP-birthday-card-25/?source=em20250203-1210&akid=1210%2E342411%2Evu9q4O ]Say Happy Birthday!

Ayanna is a champion for true change and we’re so grateful that she’s on
our side in our fight for our democracy. Through her storytelling,
leadership, and legislative brilliance, she’s dedicated to keeping those
who are closest to the pain, closest to the power.

She’s fighting for all of us. ❤️

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/signup/svfem-AP-birthday-card-25/?source=em20250203-1210&akid=1210%2E342411%2Evu9q4O ]Peter,
thank you for helping us celebrate
Ayanna’s birthday, send her joy and solidarity for her 51st year, and show
her this movement has her back.

With love,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1210%2E342411%2Evu9q4O

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Elon Musk said I hate America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Frankly, there is no bigger grifter and nobody doing more to harm America today than Elon Musk.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1487%2E791427%2EqIxvIj)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250203-1-60&t=2&akid=1487%2E791427%2EqIxvIj)
Friend — Elon Musk called me a “grifter who hates America” earlier today.
He needs to look in the mirror.
Because frankly, there is no bigger grifter and nobody doing more to harm America today than Elon Musk.
He’s the richest man in the world and he’s using his wealth and access to the President to dismantle the parts of the government he doesn’t like, while collecting the private data of the American people.
He’s never been elected by anyone, and he’s trying to take control of the Treasury department! Trillions of dollars in Medicare payments, social security, and more.
Not to mention the billions of dollars he and his companies get in Department of Defense contracts each year.
So yes, I will keep saying that Trump is acting like a dictator and enriching himself and his oligarch friends at Americans’ expense, no matter how many times they come after me for it.
I’ve never let the right-wing attacks stop me, and I don’t plan on doing so now. But I can’t take them on alone. Nobody can. It’s going to take a movement. So I need to know if you’re with me.
**[Friend, can you please chip in $3 or any amount to help me fight back against Trump, Musk, and the oligarchy trying to take over our government? The amount of the donation today isn’t as important as the donation itself, I’m just grateful to know you’re in this fight alongside me.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250203-1-60&t=3&akid=1487%2E791427%2EqIxvIj)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-feb25.CfU7ka&amount=3%7D&refcode=em250203-1-60&t=4&akid=1487%2E791427%2EqIxvIj)**
---
****
| **[Donate Other](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-feb25.CfU7ka&refcode=em250203-1-60&t=5&akid=1487%2E791427%2EqIxvIj)**
---
****
They are breaking the law and lying about it to the American people. It’s despicable behavior. And together we will hold them accountable.
In solidarity,
Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1487%2E791427%2EqIxvIj)**. name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: We’re running out of time
body:
My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UjXq9nf2DFLESXfItutgb-aphcrqglmrC5cacofgklMe-qMeevfl82D--QHBtq4Qjb8LzfNPDNqtyHqHFkHbVQ0waYvqtufIhVpj1wzFnBIVyS8ncTG2JDDQLyCJNlliVQ01DzKWN_TluPg9Cy4n0j9LOjW-ENczpN9tWYKARvWIG5zxzIJKTAIXRvpK810LEsh7hiqMEsx6R3AWM-qjrHQrXN_Ba6w7lsoKLTDM08DPk00eF29oiSGuoADsHYdC2ZzENBckyTh2FJwAqY3nUyCftkK5UDpGYPUtpURoCqSrNmZ59Fok5Ceg8v53xzuXyqnfkw_Ldu_gWDQ0CPoIZgv43vmZhRmHgOjrPOlWDxnt)
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UjXq9nf2DFLESXfItutgb-aphcrqglmrC5cacofgklMe-qMeevfl82D--QHBtq4Qjb8LzfNPDNqtyHqHFkHbVQ0waYvqtufIhVpj1wzFnBIVyS8ncTG2JDDQLyCJNlliVQ01DzKWN_TluPg9Cy4n0j9LOjW-ENczpN9tWYKARvWIG5zxzIJKTAIXRvpK810LEsh7hiqMEsx6R3AWM-qjrHSZxqHjPxDDSA0a2gSEnuagWYyYd_g-DhLQlvidi653vJZku4mmOHd1-Ygh0osga64fww3DHU7rViLasVfwoR09VkGEcz_V6GjB1E9XOpg4UQfOc8FhMV5lMnuX-X-bJ4-CkAupgkiOGuKetN25TCF5)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UjXq9nf2DFLESXfItutgb-aphcrqglmrC5cacofgklMe-qMeevfl82D--QHBtq4Qjb8LzfNPDNqtyHqHFkHbVQ0waYvqtufIhVpj1wzFnBIVyS8ncTG2JDDQLyCJNlliVQ01DzKWN_TluPg9Cy4n0j9LOjW-ENczpN9tWYKARvWIG5zxzIJKTAIXRvpK810LEsh7hiqMEsx6R3AWM-qjrHRWpcIkTvcO-kcExoK2lh_Z86aTzBUnK0PCdPHhBY5qlfdTxjEsJRV_MDbfZTJyWwErDez0ffpPeL85guwivY9rZ86NFfg534-dqs1hVdPwwA5ePI0mB4b3SHeNtbUSsufg2AvF5WXmGZPuFvNg0w6O)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in less than two weeks and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UjXq9nf2DFLESXfItutgb-aphcrqglmrC5cacofgklMe-qMeevfl82D--QHBtq4Qjb8LzfNPDNqtyHqHFkHbVQ0waYvqtufIhVpj1wzFnBIVyS8ncTG2JDDQLyCJNlliVQ01DzKWN_TluPg9Cy4n0j9LOjW-ENczpN9tWYKARvWIG5zxzIJKTAIXRvpK810LEsh7hiqMEsx6R3AWM-qjrHQQNq_Cu_6DR3PXfBRRdRY1q7VXuih4O8QiubzE_OdD_9v5Tn9mRVVBAUbnqzjeh94-on5fF0IKRP9g0yxTxSNly7NVNWoLevDhI033vez7tcG6pF2pdDp5BIsTxAUrbmdEa5J0f-aVSuBuFgGvCkRV)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UjXq9nf2DFLESXfItutgb-aphcrqglmrC5cacofgklMe-qMeevfl82D--QHBtq4Qjb8LzfNPDNqtyHqHFkHbVQ0waYvqtufIhVpj1wzFnBIVyS8ncTG2JDDQLyCJNlliVQ01DzKWN_TluPg9Cy4n0j9LOjW-ENczpN9tWYKARvWIG5zxzIJKTAIXRvpK810LEsh7hiqMEsx6R3AWM-qjrHS4ogTFs3F2DkAFIPp5n0XLWN3VHkY28drs_VdwhuvDrji0Oc2_g8S7xaGaqdpeVV2iu0TAUv93qe1qyomHl4wDjWSCZ4-7letqdo-O_FWFwJaVWJLKXSVF6tBHc4X_SAeGO_BlgZZWe21-RZZtOm8N) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UjXq9nf2DFLESXfItutgb-aphcrqglmrC5cacofgklMe-qMeevfl82D--QHBtq4Qjb8LzfNPDNqtyHqHFkHbVQ0waYvqtufIhVpj1wzFnBIVyS8ncTG2JDDQLyCJNlliVQ01DzKWN_TluPg9Cy4n0j9LOjW-ENczpN9tWYKARvWIG5zxzIJKTAIXRvpK810LEsh7hiqMEsx6R3AWM-qjrHQ_TZcQ4-epNnd7WbbxZK8N5_xWqJGTqnJ44PfYoA5EjhIhG-kIWkZ7Ke83t-fNyDbqheNTqncEh8_b_UC5glJaDTIGokCCcf8XKUg6nX-9gLKb0WNXaWdevAxzDyiNP6aDkltPbKstRYP6hEygiuwi) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_
---
© Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_e=1HzV_QFJLuqNPatjBZG7UrEy1CLkQsdCaviZwzpZipeQuNi3RSU3th5TIlTX70s6Jqeskaen5LwG8CGQYW_qFGQpYazCM0C5FZTLmm4f5gWX9vwNYsrkj70OGhgMHlHE6dAPWtFFTkm3ywxZy3h9L27A5CvxIUtwHCX4LJijyOuzXMpnYMGG_JgQwr20H4IiIxBzQmj2jEVzKFWgIzf-kQ%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=6dd3e6054ff84ad0a3ee6f320e0af0c5&_t=TZnlqDkM6-xgh5jVqjxufdgonm0HIIVG6sFpfuGp6J-UAVJXGBj9SnHNVKCa7JZZXRga-Ov8TjtJ1Z4XZ-tMTC77eF_r6_nXBcwfoI_G3oyyI1hJPQ6GejId7TmlBsVE)

No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Lacy Lunsford | | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor! | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/kathybarnette/p/i-just-spoke-with-a-friend?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I just spoke with a friend earlier this afternoon and we immediately began affirming what the other person has been thinking for some time.
I know you feel it too.
We survived literal hell over these past four+ years. It was horrible. Many of us have experienced real loss - the loss of life, the loss of opportunities, the loss of time that we will never get back, the loss of freedom, and the loss of peace of mind which you can't put a price on.
I would never want to repeat what we just came out of and yet, I'm beginning to understand why it was necessary.
We were asleep. Yes, we were working and raising our families. Yes, we were faithful to attend church, and we said our prayers at night. But many of us had no idea how bad things were about to get...and how quickly it would get there.
Who knew we needed to retake the Panama Canal? Who knew where Greenland was located, much less that it was a problem we needed to pay attention to? Who knew there was more than 2 genders before Democrats told us? Who knew that our most existential threat wasn't China, but women around the world being able to abort their own bloodline? Who knew our elected officials would have the gall to shut down churches, while leaving liquor stores open? Who knew the same government that coward to ANTIFA and BLM would suddenly grow a backbone and send an FBI raid to the home of a father of 6 for a 3-year-old case that had gotten dismissed? Who knew?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/103866ca-de52-4a54-9012-c73fae4be301?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Well, we know now. We must never kick our feet up and go back to sleep (or even take a nap) again. There is work to be done.
1. Trump can't do it by himself, and we should know better than to expect him to do it all. Grab a cup of coffee, go talk to your neighbors and join a group of like-minded individuals.
2. We invite you to understand the mandate and sign the _[Contract From The American People](https://substack.com/redirect/7d82f084-1268-4b44-9fb5-9b7c8b5c2534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ that will be hand delivered to President Trump.
Click _[here](https://substack.com/redirect/7d82f084-1268-4b44-9fb5-9b7c8b5c2534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to sign and visit _[www.JoeFromTexas.com](https://substack.com/redirect/f4616034-9a69-42f0-a909-981d3b9c2376?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to learn more about the _[Contract](https://substack.com/redirect/7d82f084-1268-4b44-9fb5-9b7c8b5c2534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and stand with us in this critical mission.
3. Support my efforts here by becoming a **Paid Subscriber** to my Substack.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.yGbN6F0h98KkdRbuCVzfvfPjUaiV-8CvBWeipuQpkW0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156400809)
4. Advertise with me on, _The Kathy Barnette Show_ , airing on the #1 talk radio station in Philadelphia that covers most of the Mid-Atlantic states, including PA, NJ, DE, and MD. Across all my platforms, I now speak to over 7M people.
I invite you to come alongside my efforts to speak Truth and help others stand up for Truth while we have this open door of opportunity to do so.
[Advertise On Radio](https://substack.com/redirect/3b720dcc-8c9e-4eed-a7ac-616d3eae9edc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Blessings, Kathy Barnette

Our plans to STOP Trump from destroying everything in sight are evolving _as we speak_. **And this is your chance to help shape them.**

During Trump's first presidency, a united Democratic front _saved_ the Affordable Care Act, _blocked_ Trump's plan to "defund" Social Security, and _exposed_ Trump's corruption and malfeasance for the nation to see. Grassroots Democrats like us stepped up, raised our voices, and fought for what we believe in -- and now we MUST do that again!

But to get it done, we'll need to hear _directly_ from you. Your survey invitation expires at midnight, so don't risk your answers not being recorded in time -- **and whatever you do, DON'T let this opportunity pass by:**

[**Take our Democratic strategy survey before it closes at midnight >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21035?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250203-InputNeeded-PoliticoQuoteStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250203-InputNeeded-PoliticoQuoteStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=19495%2E9716520%2EDXo-F3)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: 2025 is off to a strong start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

We did it!

Your support helped us pass our first big fundraising test of the year. That's no small feat — especially with Trump back in office and his MAGA minions doing everything they can to keep us quiet. I’m more grateful than ever for your continued support.

Over the past few weeks, we can see one thing is clear: Trump is not wasting any time. He's packing his administration with loyalists hellbent on revenge. If they had it their way, I wouldn't even be in office.

But I am. I'm showing up every day and refusing to give them any breathing room. And I can only do that because I know supporters like you have my back.

So, I just wanted to take a second to say thank you — truly .

Let's keep this momentum going into the next challenge. Whenever it happens, I know you'll be there.

Talk soon,
Eric

That's no small feat — especially with Trump back in office and his MAGA minions doing everything they can to keep us quiet. I’m more grateful than ever for your continued support. Over the past few weeks, we can see one thing is clear: Trump is not wasting any time. He's packing his administration with loyalists hellbent on revenge. If they had it their way, I wouldn't even be in office. But I am. I'm showing up every day and refusing to give them any breathing room. And I can only do that because I know supporters like you have my back. So, I just wanted to take a second to say thank you — truly . Let's keep this momentum going into the next challenge. Whenever it happens, I know you'll be there. Talk soon, Eric DONATE TO ERIC » [|E12128|NA|EOMThanks|--footer-DeadlineEOM&amount=25] [] Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. Join Swalwell's Circle, Eric's inner circle of supporters, by committing to a $50 or more monthly contribution today! [|E12128|NA|EOMThanks|--footer-DeadlineEOM&amount=50&recurring=auto] Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

### We are looking for **_25,000 AMERICA-FIRST PATRIOTS_** _**FROM** **your area**_ to sign our petition and show their support for **RESTORING AMERICA’S MILITARY**!

| Republicans thrive when we get distracted.

Last month's slew of executive orders and the Trump administration’s actions since then are some of the most dangerous policies I’ve seen in my career. But fear and distraction are exactly what Republicans want from us.

---

Trump Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem **[called out NBC's Kristen Welker](https://substack.com/redirect/2de5ab35-d13e-41a7-b54e-bab40946fba9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the media spinning falsehoods about nationwide deportation efforts.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2de5ab35-d13e-41a7-b54e-bab40946fba9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2de5ab35-d13e-41a7-b54e-bab40946fba9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I've been talking to people who are here legally and they have expressed concerns," Welker told Noem. "Can you guarantee that people who are here legally won't be wrongfully detained?"
Noem fired back affirming that those who are in U.S. legally will not be apprehended and that the media are the ones to blame for spreading this concern.
"The media has perpetuated that fear! The media has said that that is a possibility," Noem answered. "There is nothing from this administration, from President Trump or from any of the law enforcement individuals in these communities that says they need to be concerned about that at all!"
**[Watch the tense interview below:](https://substack.com/redirect/2de5ab35-d13e-41a7-b54e-bab40946fba9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2de5ab35-d13e-41a7-b54e-bab40946fba9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **RFK Jr SNAPS at Democrat who calls him a "dangerous" racist during fiery confirmation hearing**
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. **[stood his ground when Democrat Senator accused him](https://substack.com/redirect/f6a5ba98-03b7-4d5b-a9d3-68e0cbc22ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of making "dangerous" racial comments related to taking the vaccine during his explosive confirmation hearing.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f6a5ba98-03b7-4d5b-a9d3-68e0cbc22ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You said 'we should not be giving black people the same vaccine schedule that is given to whites, because their immune system is better than ours,'" Sen. Angela Alsobrooks told RFK. "What different vaccine schedule should I have received?"
Before RFK could even answer, Alsobrooks interrupted, "That is so dangerous!!"
RFK explained that he was citing "pier-reviewed studies" when he made the claim.
"Is science dangerous?!!" he fired back at Alsobrooks. **[Watch the fiery clash below:](https://substack.com/redirect/f6a5ba98-03b7-4d5b-a9d3-68e0cbc22ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f6a5ba98-03b7-4d5b-a9d3-68e0cbc22ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Two weeks of Trump 2.0
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Donald Trump has already ruthlessly attacked the Constitution while rolling back our freedoms and sabotaging federal government functions.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250203&t=1&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4)
You're receiving this message because you have supported Democrats in the past. **Rob Bonta is fighting for justice and progress for all as California's Attorney General.** If you want to stop receiving emails from us, [click here](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4).
---
Today marks only two weeks of Trump 2.0. I know, it feels like it’s been a lifetime.
So far in his second presidency, **Donald Trump has already ruthlessly attacked the Constitution and the separation of powers that make our country a democracy** rather than an autocracy or authoritarian government, while rolling back our freedoms and sabotaging our critical government functions that provide services to millions of people.
He and his far-right administration are:
* Trying to roll back the right to birthright citizenship guaranteed in the 14th Amendment (which I sued him over);
* Attempting to freeze trillions of dollars in federal funding for essential health, food, housing, disaster relief, public safety, education, and childcare services (which I also sued him over);
* Silencing scientists and censoring agencies like the CDC, ordering them to halt all public communications;
* Attacking the LGBTQ+ community in a number of ways, including banning trans troops from serving in the military;
* Scrubbing government websites of any mention of climate change, gender, transgender and non-binary identities, racial justice, and other important topics like HIV prevention and sexual violence;
* Rolling back DEI initiatives and attacking the very notion of hiring and promoting women, people of color, people with disabilities, and people from all backgrounds in government roles;
* Pushing out thousands of federal government workers, urging them to get “more productive” jobs in the private sector, setting the stage for privatization of government services;
* Handing unchecked power over to billionaire private citizen Elon Musk and letting him access sensitive private data like Americans’ social security numbers, etc.

This is a lot, and that’s the point: **the Trump administration is sowing chaos and confusion, trying to overwhelm us so we feel powerless. We can’t fall by the sidelines and let them win.**
I’m giving it my all to take Trump to court when he breaks the law, and protecting all Californians from his right-wing attacks on our fundamental rights and well-being.
**[With only two weeks down and four years to go, we have our work cut out for us. Will you join me in standing up for our democracy, our values, and our people by pitching in $5 or more toward our grassroots campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250203?refcode=em20250203-1619&amount=5&refcode2=1619_1088799_Qyz4C4&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250203?refcode=em20250203-1619&amount=5&refcode2=1619_1088799_Qyz4C4&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4)**
This is a pivotal moment in our nation’s history, and while I know it’s scary and overwhelming, remember that we are in this together, and I am fighting for each and every one of you.
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250203&t=3&refcode2=1619_1088799_Qyz4C4&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1619%2E1088799%2EQyz4C4)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

name: Katie Porter
subject: A note about staff, in Congress & on campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39417%2E3422442%2EA1pyFD)
Katie Porter here. During my six years in Congress, I had the privilege of working with so many different amazing, brilliant, joyful staff. From policy nerds who helped me craft legislation and prepare for hearings, to campaign staff who raise money and knock doors, every person made a difference.
My staff taught me about issues, they got me places on time (no easy task!), they took meetings and phone calls to learn from our constituents, and most of all, they fought for a better America.
**My PAC, Truth to Power, often supports Democratic candidates at the very beginning of their race.** Sometimes these candidates are operating on tight budgets as they work to advance out of a congressional primary. Other times, they’re challenging Republicans in districts where we’ve yet to see investment from big super PACs or national groups.
Truth to Power’s support can help these candidates hire staff—whether that’s an organizer who can now mobilize hundreds of door-knocking volunteers, or a Communications Director who can help them prepare for interviews with reporters, sharpen their social media, and reach key voters.
**[With that in mind, can you pitch in $5 or $10 today to support Truth to Power?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250203-1?refcode=em20250203-39417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39417_3422442_A1pyFD&akid=39417%2E3422442%2EA1pyFD)** Your support will help our candidates hire the staff they need, run ads, and turnout voters.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250203-1?refcode=em20250203-39417&refcode2=39417_3422442_A1pyFD&akid=39417%2E3422442%2EA1pyFD)
_A few pictures of my staff from over the years:_
[__](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250203-1?refcode=em20250203-39417&refcode2=39417_3422442_A1pyFD&akid=39417%2E3422442%2EA1pyFD)
-Katie Porter

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250203-39417&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39417_3422442_A1pyFD&akid=39417%2E3422442%2EA1pyFD)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39417%2E3422442%2EA1pyFD).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Fox News Alert
subject: Kash Patel will 'open the books' on FBI corruption, Sen. Josh Hawley says
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2ecd973f3f2b4384bbfcf116b7a0e26c&_e=0sAUj_hfddYAh6ilqBfF0NPdjjUkWQqpEWUZiGhYJ2Q99EmJKOCu0eZxYyDBMHkZ5NeFc9N_smU4KUJXg32-BZUf4Cjiyr0nbplvByI0ggUQtXA_gGukgk0OC9_itbF8bkpWBAww6DdYpOQlLO5EI5X5lXW2Y_9vSZjAs8Sc-qPBR9Tb1yMwhzCE-9-cDl2O0HWZEsrVeR9a-c82UQGZtWBbFo_i9enMHmyCs7U61dvdWMhG2MTSG2c5NzvmsYrwAbJNI0QnJlsMgJ0Htg9ygaTDe8SBXTQuM1XVUKVA5FsVvzoqCrRPfeMa6q3S8VhujC_8fo9nvzrg8okzkmpGBOXs01mD4vf4hLKHdCnSwkI8q_1DwLq1o7rPaO48aXJVI6JcUVFfbcaxvUnLq4DlMA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
For the last four years, the American people have gotten nothing more than stonewalling and lies from the FBI and the FBI Director. We need transparency in the FBI, and that’s exactly what nominee Kash Patel will provide. That’s why the Democrats are so scared of his confirmation. When I spoke with him, he stated that he would open the books on the assassination attempts, the FBI lying to the court when they falsified evidence to obtain wiretaps on President Trump, and all of the agency’s corruption. The left talks about enemy lists and political persecution, but the FBI has been their personal plaything, and they are scared to death that Kash Patel will end their use of political weaponization. They’re not worried he will actually persecute political opponents; they are worried he will stop the FBI from doing that—because that is exactly what they have been doing for the last four years.
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2ecd973f3f2b4384bbfcf116b7a0e26c&_e=0sAUj_hfddYAh6ilqBfF0NPdjjUkWQqpEWUZiGhYJ2Q99EmJKOCu0eZxYyDBMHkZ5NeFc9N_smU4KUJXg32-BZUf4Cjiyr0nbplvByI0ggUQtXA_gGukgk0OC9_itbF8bkpWBAww6DdYpOQlLO5EI5X5lXW2Y_9vSZjAs8Sc-qPBR9Tb1yMwhzCE-9-cDl2O0HWZEsrVeR9a-c82UQGZtWBbFo_i9enMHmyCs7U61dvdWMhG2MTSG2c5NzvmsYrwRtQmyMrGrvJGI7Tq8Y5alBrH1ne7m8TVP4xX8fkqYIP96FOmzvRbGpPkubjXgGduDP86_4nKVBSnMIS3Z2ED1ZAuYpAb3Gw_1-yL24NeAW_4KlO8KRNKw0-9G2AXhDTmMbGMRDjgo_pDq-8Jz4RY7g%3D%3D)
---
**Here is a great exchange from the interview:**
**Jesse Watters: **Senator Josh Hawley is on the Judiciary Committee and joins me now. We will get a lot of disclosure from Kash Patel, especially on January 6th. But what will that look like, Senator? **Senator Hawley:** Number one, it will look like a change just because what we have had for the last four years is nothing but stonewalling and lies from the FBI and the FBI Director when he has come before Congress. The world deserves to know, the American people deserve to know exactly what the FBI’s role was on January 6th. They also deserve to know what the FBI has been doing with its time. While they have been pursuing January 6th defendants, they have not been putting drug kingpins behind bars, they have not been going after child traffickers, they have not been going after the drug cartels. It is time to get the FBI focused on, I don't know, criminals again and actually putting violent criminals behind bars? I think he will do that.
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, For the last four years, the American people have gotten nothing more than stonewalling and lies from the FBI and the FBI Director. We need transparency in the FBI, and that’s exactly what nominee Kash Patel will provide. That’s why the Democrats are so scared of his confirmation. When I spoke with him, he stated that he would open the books on the assassination attempts, the FBI lying to the court when they falsified evidence to obtain wiretaps on President Trump, and all of the agency’s corruption. The left talks about enemy lists and political persecution, but the FBI has been their personal plaything, and they are scared to death that Kash Patel will end their use of political weaponization. They’re not worried he will actually persecute political opponents; they are worried he will stop the FBI from doing that—because that is exactly what they have been doing for the last four years. Here is a great exchange from the interview: Jesse Watters: Senator Josh Hawley is on the Judiciary Committee and joins me now. We will get a lot of disclosure from Kash Patel, especially on January 6th. But what will that look like, Senator? Senator Hawley: Number one, it will look like a change just because what we have had for the last four years is nothing but stonewalling and lies from the FBI and the FBI Director when he has come before Congress. The world deserves to know, the American people deserve to know exactly what the FBI’s role was on January 6th. They also deserve to know what the FBI has been doing with its time. While they have been pursuing January 6th defendants, they have not been putting drug kingpins behind bars, they have not been going after child traffickers, they have not been going after the drug cartels. It is time to get the FBI focused on, I don't know, criminals again and actually putting violent criminals behind bars? I think he will do that. In Liberty, Team Hawley | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | -

Peter, don’t miss

But we noticed we haven’t seen one from you yet!

Team Pramila
2025 Priorities Survey

dpwillis67@gmail.com

Not yet!

Democrats should prioritize as the second Trump administration takes
shape.

— Team Pramila

--------Forwarded message--------
From: Team Pramila
Subject: [SURVEY] What should Democrats prioritize right now?

Peter,

Tomorrow marks two weeks since Donald Trump stepped back into the White
House, and we have our work cut out for us to stop the worst of his plans
as the administration tries to implement Project 2025.

With Trump constantly creating distractions to divert attention away from
his unpopular agenda, Democrats need to focus on what actually matters to
working people.

That’s why we’ve created a short open-ended survey to get your thoughts on
what we should prioritize as the second Trump administration takes shape.
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-priorities-survey-kicker?source=em20250203-4731&akid=4731%2E420207%2ELE8XCE ]Will you take a minute to give us your thoughts?

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-priorities-survey-kicker?source=em20250203-4731&akid=4731%2E420207%2ELE8XCE ]Take the survey

Whether there’s a policy you think we should rally around or an opposition
strategy you think Democrats should adopt, we want to hear from you.

This administration is stacked with billionaires like no other before it,
and the only way we’re going to overcome their money and influence is with
a mass popular movement of working people across the country.

That’s why your feedback is so important to us,
Peter. We have a long four
years ahead of us, but together we can fight back and win.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2025-priorities-survey-kicker?source=em20250203-4731&akid=4731%2E420207%2ELE8XCE ]Take a minute to fill out our 2025 Priorities Survey now and help us
step up our opposition to Trump’s MAGA madness. We can’t do it without
you!

In solidarity,

Team Pramila

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499476/526141745/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTYwOGM5YS04MmUyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oxoNk1Gcz6PufyZG58gpel0QqArS7GJeT3HAyWyLFRY=&emci=de85603d-81e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=be608c9a-82e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=15529135) | Team, the dysfunction we are seeing in Washington right now is inexcusable. As you might have seen by now, the White House announced that they would freeze all funding of federal loans and grants. This hurts communities from every walk of life — affecting programs like SNAP, Medicare, Meals on Wheels, and Head Start. This order from President Trump is unlawful, plain and simple. Unfortunately, that is just the beginning of the chaos. After being sued by several states for withholding essential funding, including Connecticut, the administration announced that they would rescind the order. But just a few hours later, the White House press secretary tried to backtrack — saying that it was not rescinded after all, and that the order “remains in full force and effect, and will be rigorously implemented.” Nobody — Republicans, Democrats, Independents — knows what is going on. At every turn, we are left with more questions than answers. And while all of this is happening, team, our most vulnerable neighbors are left confused. This freeze impacts every community in the 41 cities and towns across CT-05, and I have heard the outpouring of anger from constituents. **This is unsustainable, and it cannot stand.** As funding is paused and legal challenges are filed, I remain committed to working to restore impacted programs and stand up for the people of Connecticut. **[I am also working to take back the House majority, so we can restore commonsense leadership back to Congress and focus on the real issues at hand. clean_body: | | Team, the dysfunction we are seeing in Washington right now is inexcusable. As you might have seen by now, the White House announced that they would freeze all funding of federal loans and grants. This hurts communities from every walk of life — affecting programs like SNAP, Medicare, Meals on Wheels, and Head Start. This order from President Trump is unlawful, plain and simple. Unfortunately, that is just the beginning of the chaos. After being sued by several states for withholding essential funding, including Connecticut, the administration announced that they would rescind the order. But just a few hours later, the White House press secretary tried to backtrack — saying that it was not rescinded after all, and that the order “remains in full force and effect, and will be rigorously implemented.” Nobody — Republicans, Democrats, Independents — knows what is going on. At every turn, we are left with more questions than answers. And while all of this is happening, team, our most vulnerable neighbors are left confused. This freeze impacts every community in the 41 cities and towns across CT-05, and I have heard the outpouring of anger from constituents. This is unsustainable, and it cannot stand. As funding is paused and legal challenges are filed, I remain committed to working to restore impacted programs and stand up for the people of Connecticut. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for taking the time to read this email. — Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Alan Cohn
subject: Stop the MAGA Majority
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499461/526141716/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2MDhjOWEtODJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkuxnUYB2lBjVPEBp6u8EbwfOfHSKfLqJQwfb4o2Kc8=&emci=1acb1464-7be2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=b7608c9a-82e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
In just one week, Trump has pardoned the January 6th insurrectionists who beat capitol police, fired FBI agents and prosecutors who were doing their assigned jobs, started a trade war with our closest allies, and left the Paris Climate Accords... again.
This is what happens when a president has no fear of prosecution after his hand-picked radical right-wing MAGA majority on the Supreme Court created immunity just for him.
This is what happens when the MAGA SCOTUS majority knows they have a job for life and no oversight.
But with your help, that’s about to change.
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate, including Adam Schiff and Hakeem Jeffries, to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.
Our movement exploded in support over the last year as Americans rebel against an out-of-control court that robbed women of the right to make their own healthcare decisions and Clarence Thomas’s one-man ethics scandal.
Polls show 70% of Americans want SCOTUS term limited.
If you agree, help us back candidates for the mid-term pledging to support the TERM Act.
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499464/526141731/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2MDhjOWEtODJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkuxnUYB2lBjVPEBp6u8EbwfOfHSKfLqJQwfb4o2Kc8=)
You don’t have to sit home frustrated at what Trump and the Republicans are getting away with.
**[>>>Join an effort to bring “Equal Justice under law” back to the highest court in the land!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499471/526141736/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2MDhjOWEtODJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkuxnUYB2lBjVPEBp6u8EbwfOfHSKfLqJQwfb4o2Kc8=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499474/526141741/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2MDhjOWEtODJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkuxnUYB2lBjVPEBp6u8EbwfOfHSKfLqJQwfb4o2Kc8=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499475/526141744/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjc2MDhjOWEtODJlMi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WkuxnUYB2lBjVPEBp6u8EbwfOfHSKfLqJQwfb4o2Kc8=)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This message is from the heart.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by
body:
Thank you so much for everything.

_A PERSONAL NOTE FROM THE DESK OF REP. ELISE STEFANIK_

Friend,

Thousands of my constituents and supporters hosted events to thank me
for more than a decade of fighting for hard-working families in New
York’s 21st Congressional District over the weekend.

To call it inspiring would be an understatement.

I WAS COMPLETELY BLOWN AWAY BY THE OUTPOURING OF SUPPORT FROM SO MANY
AMERICANS WHO’VE HAD MY BACK FOR SO LONG AND DONE SO MUCH TO HELP
POWER REPUBLICANS TO VICTORY LAST NOVEMBER.

And while I appreciated the gesture, YOU deserve just as much credit
as I do.

Our historic victory wouldn’t have been possible without your
unwavering support!

But unfortunately, the fight for America’s future is far from over.

AS I CONTINUE FIGHTING TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, I WANT TO ASK YOU
ONE MORE TIME TO STAND WITH ME BY MAKING A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION OF
ANY AMOUNT TO DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY.

We fought so hard to help America First Republicans win the governing
trifecta of the House, the Senate, and the White House. Now, we’re
counting on your sustained support to defend it.

_(I know you’ve already done a lot, so please don’t feel pressured
to contribute if you’ve already done all that you can – or if you
simply aren’t in the position to do so.)_

OTHERWISE, PLEASE CONSIDER MAKING A GRASSROOTS CONTRIBUTION OF ANY
AMOUNT TO HELP DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY.

name: History Facts
subject: What the War of 1812 was fought over
body:
The Korean War is nicknamed “the Forgotten War,” but the War of 1812 — fought between the United States and Great Britain just a few decades after America won its independence — certainly rivals it in terms of its lack of place in the collective national memory.

# [What Was the War of 1812?](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4qt6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4qt6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4qt6&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he Korean War is nicknamed “the Forgotten War,” but the War of 1812 — fought between the United States and Great Britain just a few decades after America won its independence — certainly rivals it in terms of its lack of place in the collective national memory. Asking the average American for details about the War of 1812 is likely to be met with a shrug. Let’s make some sense of this obscure yet formative conflict.

Asking the average American for details about the War of 1812 is likely to be met with a shrug. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I hope you’ll take a minute or two to add your input. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499779/526142613/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmVkN2Y2My04M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LB7feM4bvE0N2TOKirrsgj_I7XBvD4-Y0HXrTFpxqiU=&emci=aded7f63-83e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=afed7f63-83e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, the chaos of Donald Trump’s first two weeks in office has been widespread. From pardoning the violent criminals who assaulted hundreds of police officers on January 6th to throwing the lives of tens of millions of Americans into uncertainty by issuing a blatantly unconstitutional freeze on federal funding, our work to stand up to Trump and his allies has never been more important. I’m working around the clock to hold the Trump administration and defend working families from his dangerous agenda — and I’m also prepared to continue fighting for progress on issues like Social Security, our public lands, and access to affordable health care. But to best serve families in New Mexico and across the country, I make sure to reach out each month to give you the opportunity to weigh in on the issues that matter most to you. You’re a valued member of this team, and it’s important that we speak out with what we’re most concerned about as Trump grows louder in his extremism. **[Can you take a few minutes to share what’s on your mind? You can fill out my team’s Priorities Survey here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499780/526142614/-1077126353?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmVkN2Y2My04M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LB7feM4bvE0N2TOKirrsgj_I7XBvD4-Y0HXrTFpxqiU=&emci=aded7f63-83e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=afed7f63-83e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499781/526142615/-1077126353?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmVkN2Y2My04M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LB7feM4bvE0N2TOKirrsgj_I7XBvD4-Y0HXrTFpxqiU=&emci=aded7f63-83e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=afed7f63-83e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=252045)
---
Together, we will defend our shared values and protect our progress. Thank you for sharing your thoughts.
— Martin

name: Tina Smith
subject: I questioned Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — Last week, I questioned Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at his confirmation hearing to be Secretary of Health and Human Services. His hearing represented one of his final chances to ease concerns about his nomination — **but if it wasn’t already clear before, RFK Jr. has no business being in charge of America’s health. ** He demonstrated a lack of knowledge about the most basic parts of the job, like not understanding the difference between Medicare and Medicaid. He refused to answer a question about whether people who take antidepressants are dangerous. And he also reaffirmed that his confirmation would represent a grave threat to women’s health. When asked whether he would agree that federal law protects a woman’s right to receive life-saving pregnancy care — _which it does_ — he said he didn’t know. And he left the door open to declaring Mifepristone unsafe even though the commonly used abortion medication has been deemed safe and effective for over _two_ decades. **[I will work with anyone to deliver real progress for Minnesotans and move our country forward, but I’ll also stand up to anyone who puts them in harm's way. Will you pitch in a donation today to help me continue my work to hold Trump and his appointees accountable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499795/526142660/-510839029?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTFjODQ2OS04M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_a5T-9bLvL4GtnzR-F2457xrP6hQwx63bT5L3FIEaE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101499796/526142661/-510839029?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250203_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTFjODQ2OS04M2UyLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_a5T-9bLvL4GtnzR-F2457xrP6hQwx63bT5L3FIEaE=)

clean_body: | Team — Last week, I questioned Robert F. Kennedy Jr. at his confirmation hearing to be Secretary of Health and Human Services. His hearing represented one of his final chances to ease concerns about his nomination — but if it wasn’t already clear before, RFK Jr. has no business being in charge of America’s health. He demonstrated a lack of knowledge about the most basic parts of the job, like not understanding the difference between Medicare and Medicaid. He refused to answer a question about whether people who take antidepressants are dangerous. And he also reaffirmed that his confirmation would represent a grave threat to women’s health. When asked whether he would agree that federal law protects a woman’s right to receive life-saving pregnancy care — which it does — he said he didn’t know. And he left the door open to declaring Mifepristone unsafe even though the commonly used abortion medication has been deemed safe and effective for over two decades. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: AOC
subject: I feel more like squaring up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This administration is much more prepared and planned this time around, in terms of the kinds of chaos that they're trying to unleash.
More than legal programs, more than policy, **they are trying to invoke _fear_**.
That is how authoritarianism works. These are the tools to get us to sacrifice and surrender our civil liberties, more than they take them.
Trump pardoned virtually all the January 6th insurrectionists, including specifically people who were arrested with threats against my life.
**I'm not going to give them my fear**. I feel more like squaring up than anything else.
When I was running in 2018, people would say, “Why should we vote for a waitress instead of this 20-year incumbent?” — understandably, right? I didn't have experience. They did. And I often talked about the story of _The Wizard of Oz_.
This was my mom's favorite movie. I know it's in the zeitgeist now because _Wicked_ is out, but genuinely: all of these big, scary things, it reminds me of the end of _The Wizard of Oz_ , where you yank back the curtain — and _it's a little guy_.
**It's a small, scared, incompetent little man**.
I think we need to remain focused. Yes, they are capable of immense amounts of damage.
It can be scary. It's not something we ignore. It's not something we check out from.
But we register it. We say, “OK.” **Then we figure out what our options are and we do the best we can, day by day**.
They're relying on us giving up. **Hell no**.
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
We’re going to keep standing for the working class.
We’re going to keep fighting for a better minimum wage.
We’re going to keep fighting to guarantee healthcare.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250203.CB0nT0&refcode=em20250203-8056-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250203.CB0nT0&refcode=em20250203-8056-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250203?refcode=em20250203-8056-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=8056_2526796_bJGEG_&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250203-8056-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8056%2E2526796%2EbJGEG_)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

### I'm not yet elected. I'm not a billionaire. I am speaking to you as a voter in NY-21
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Feb 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)

I'm Paula Collins, Democratic hopeful for the Special Election ballot in NY 21.
Like you I am simply appalled by the news of the last 24 hours. I try to understand one unconstitutional maneuver and then we are hit with another.
I don't have to list all of them for you, but to me the most egregious moves are the unconstitutional installations of very young, inexperienced computer engineers in government offices to oversee, collect, move, and interpret American's sensitive data that includes social security information, and could impact payments to Medicaid, Medicare, Veterans benefits, and Social Security. That's all of what we know.
Other egregious and unconstitutional acts include Sam Altman's work to put our nation's sensitive nuclear testing and lab information on Open AI - making it available to the entire world.
Today I heard Senators Schumer, Warren, Murray, and a few others spoke about withholding votes and asking for answers.
Listen - I know I am not yet an elected official. But when you're talking about Social security and the nuclear codes - all handed over to people who have never been elected, never undergone fingerprinting, and a background check - I need to speak out as a citizen.
We haven't even gotten into the tariffs with Canada and Mexico and how they will impact our life in the North Country, specifically with regard to heating oil and other energy sources.
And then there is New Yorker Lee Zeldin, confirmed last week to head up the Environmental Protection Agency, and on his first day he sends an email informing 1000 employees that they can be dismissed at any moment. Again - unconstitutional in that these are federal employees who are entitled to due process review, and the funds that support their employment were allocated by Congress.
This is not the country that we had as recently on November 5, 2024 when Kamala Harris was our Democratic Candidate.
I'm a not a billionaire and I'm not yet elected to represent you in Congress, but I would like to be. I can tell you that as a solidly middle class mom who raised her child alone, and who is a proud, card-carrying member of the teacher's union, I'm on the side of the U.S. Constitution, and of the American people who, like me, just want to be able to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over my head.
I am calling on my elected officials to do that which we say in the streets when we protest: SHUT IT DOWN.
Do not vote to approve any of Trump's nominees.
Do not vote yes on any Republican-proposed legislation.
Demand answers and do not perform any official duties until the following has occurred:
1. Elon Musk and his staffers must immediately be removed from access to files, building,s and data that deal with our national electronic systems.
2. Trump must rescind all threats to our allies - not just the 30 day window he has negotiated today with Mexico and Canada - including but not limited to Mexico, Canada, Panama, Greenland, and Colombia.
3. Trump must rescind unconstitutional tariffs to Mexico, Canada, and China until negotiated trade agreements that have been approved by Congress can be made.
4. Federal employees must be restored with full pay, title, authority, and benefits. Trump did not have the authority to gut our nation's federal civil service.
5. All payments, including those to non-profits, medicaid, medicare and so forth that were threatened last week and are subject to the court-ordered injunction, but be fully restored with promises to not unconstitutionally threaten to cut off appropriations that had already been approved.

Our states have some authority in this, and the ability to act with aggression.
Each wage earner in this country pays FICA. Our states could instruct payroll processors to hold those payments in escrow and not send those funds in until we have re-covered the constitutional basis for our government. I'm not saying don't collect it - I'm saying have the states hold it in escrow until sufficient negotiations have been reached with the Trump administration.
Our states have the legal basis to resist the ICE raids - and the basis for that is from none other than the state of Texas, which sought to develop its own immigration policies under President Biden. Look - I know immigration is a top priority in our upstate Swanton Sector. But none of us wanted children to be afraid to go to school or workers to fail to show up to work. We had a bill that had bipartisan approval to grant work visas, greater enforcement, and more judges. We need to re-open our access points to 24/7 - not this 12 hour shift we currently have at many New York border crossings. The current administration is engaged in shock and awe. New Yorkers want real and lasting solutions.
I'm speaking to you as a New York 21 voter. I remain hopeful that I will be the nominee to the ballot. All I can say is that we should know something in the next several days.
In the meantime, demand of your elected officials that they not just talk - demand that they take action. It's what I would expect you to do of me if and when I take the oath of office.
And remain tuned in. We will get through this. Our country will look different when this is over, but we will have a country. Bill Clinton said, There is nothing wrong with America that cannot be fixed by what is right with America.
I leave you with a reminder from Reverand Doctor Martin Luther King, who asked us to remain alert through a great revolution.
Let's talk again soon.
Thank you for listening.
