That's all of what we know. Other egregious and unconstitutional acts include Sam Altman's work to put our nation's sensitive nuclear testing and lab information on Open AI - making it available to the entire world. Today I heard Senators Schumer, Warren, Murray, and a few others spoke about withholding votes and asking for answers. Listen - I know I am not yet an elected official. But when you're talking about Social security and the nuclear codes - all handed over to people who have never been elected, never undergone fingerprinting, and a background check - I need to speak out as a citizen. We haven't even gotten into the tariffs with Canada and Mexico and how they will impact our life in the North Country, specifically with regard to heating oil and other energy sources. And then there is New Yorker Lee Zeldin, confirmed last week to head up the Environmental Protection Agency, and on his first day he sends an email informing 1000 employees that they can be dismissed at any moment. Again - unconstitutional in that these are federal employees who are entitled to due process review, and the funds that support their employment were allocated by Congress. This is not the country that we had as recently on November 5, 2024 when Kamala Harris was our Democratic Candidate. I'm a not a billionaire and I'm not yet elected to represent you in Congress, but I would like to be. I can tell you that as a solidly middle class mom who raised her child alone, and who is a proud, card-carrying member of the teacher's union, I'm on the side of the U.S. Constitution, and of the American people who, like me, just want to be able to put food on the table, gas in the car, and keep a roof over my head. I am calling on my elected officials to do that which we say in the streets when we protest: SHUT IT DOWN. Do not vote to approve any of Trump's nominees. Do not vote yes on any Republican-proposed legislation. Demand answers and do not perform any official duties until the following has occurred: 1. Elon Musk and his staffers must immediately be removed from access to files, building,s and data that deal with our national electronic systems. 2. Trump must rescind all threats to our allies - not just the 30 day window he has negotiated today with Mexico and Canada - including but not limited to Mexico, Canada, Panama, Greenland, and Colombia. 3. Trump must rescind unconstitutional tariffs to Mexico, Canada, and China until negotiated trade agreements that have been approved by Congress can be made. 4. Federal employees must be restored with full pay, title, authority, and benefits. Trump did not have the authority to gut our nation's federal civil service. 5. All payments, including those to non-profits, medicaid, medicare and so forth that were threatened last week and are subject to the court-ordered injunction, but be fully restored with promises to not unconstitutionally threaten to cut off appropriations that had already been approved. Our states have some authority in this, and the ability to act with aggression. Each wage earner in this country pays FICA. Our states could instruct payroll processors to hold those payments in escrow and not send those funds in until we have re-covered the constitutional basis for our government. I'm not saying don't collect it - I'm saying have the states hold it in escrow until sufficient negotiations have been reached with the Trump administration. Our states have the legal basis to resist the ICE raids - and the basis for that is from none other than the state of Texas, which sought to develop its own immigration policies under President Biden. Look - I know immigration is a top priority in our upstate Swanton Sector. But none of us wanted children to be afraid to go to school or workers to fail to show up to work. We had a bill that had bipartisan approval to grant work visas, greater enforcement, and more judges. We need to re-open our access points to 24/7 - not this 12 hour shift we currently have at many New York border crossings. The current administration is engaged in shock and awe. New Yorkers want real and lasting solutions. I'm speaking to you as a New York 21 voter. I remain hopeful that I will be the nominee to the ballot. All I can say is that we should know something in the next several days. In the meantime, demand of your elected officials that they not just talk - demand that they take action. It's what I would expect you to do of me if and when I take the oath of office. And remain tuned in. We will get through this. Our country will look different when this is over, but we will have a country. Bill Clinton said, There is nothing wrong with America that cannot be fixed by what is right with America. I leave you with a reminder from Reverand Doctor Martin Luther King, who asked us to remain alert through a great revolution. Let's talk again soon. Thank you for listening. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Checks can be sent to Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road, DeKalb Junction, NY 13630, or click these words to: . ("Subscribe Now" is a great way to subscribe to my Substack!) | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101500424/526144205/1328794144?refcode=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwMGViNTdlLTg1ZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j2W1oMp_iCsYpnOzyexU82MjBNk9ZnkZ6yDnpePzFtk=&emci=1b92dd76-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=4823105)

| **[Elon Musk has no place in our government. Sign the petition to demand his removal from the Trump administration.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101500425/526144206/-642596121?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9%26ms%3Dea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&refcode=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwMGViNTdlLTg1ZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j2W1oMp_iCsYpnOzyexU82MjBNk9ZnkZ6yDnpePzFtk=&emci=1b92dd76-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN ON**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101500426/526144207/-642596121?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9%26ms%3Dea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&refcode=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwMGViNTdlLTg1ZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j2W1oMp_iCsYpnOzyexU82MjBNk9ZnkZ6yDnpePzFtk=&emci=1b92dd76-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=4823105)
---
We need to talk about Elon Musk.
As you know, Trump tapped the richest man in the world to lead the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) — a position that gives him massive influence over federal programs, with no formal oversight or accountability.
**This is the same Elon Musk who made a Nazi salute at Trump’s inauguration celebration. The same Elon Musk who criticized Germany's commitment to Holocaust education and called for the country to “move beyond” guilt over its Nazi past. And the same Elon Musk who turned X into a breeding ground for antisemitism and far-right extremism.**
Musk will use his position to gut government-backed programs while fast-tracking his extremist agenda. As Trump’s handpicked “efficiency czar,” he’d have the power to strip regulations that get in the way of his business empire and funnel even more profits to Trump and their billionaire allies.
Let’s be real, **Trump is installing Musk to help carry out his ultimate goal to slash government agencies, fire thousands of public servants, and consolidate power for himself and his cronies.**
Think about it — the richest man on Earth helping the most corrupt president in history will turn our government into their personal ATM. That’s not democracy. That’s a full-blown oligarchy in the making. We can’t let this happen.
**[That’s why we’re joining forces with a coalition of organizations to demand accountability, but we need your voice in this fight. Add your name to demand Elon Musk’s removal from the Trump administration and protect the integrity of our government.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101500427/526144208/-642596121?source=direct_link&referrer=group-jfcp-woa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjane-bax-email-ja%3Frefcode%3Dea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9%26ms%3Dea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&refcode=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwMGViNTdlLTg1ZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j2W1oMp_iCsYpnOzyexU82MjBNk9ZnkZ6yDnpePzFtk=&emci=1b92dd76-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=4823105)**

Thank you for making your voice heard.
– Team JanePAC
P.S. If you’re tired of Musk’s nonsense, we’ve got good news — he’s not on Bluesky. Follow us there: **[@janeclimatepac.bsky.social](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101500429/526144210/-855415878?refcode=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ms=ea.100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwMGViNTdlLTg1ZTItZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j2W1oMp_iCsYpnOzyexU82MjBNk9ZnkZ6yDnpePzFtk=&emci=1b92dd76-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=100eb57e-85e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: We need to move quickly. | | | We need to talk about Elon Musk. As you know, Trump tapped the richest man in the world to lead the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) — a position that gives him massive influence over federal programs, with no formal oversight or accountability. This is the same Elon Musk who made a Nazi salute at Trump’s inauguration celebration. The same Elon Musk who criticized Germany's commitment to Holocaust education and called for the country to “move beyond” guilt over its Nazi past. And the same Elon Musk who turned X into a breeding ground for antisemitism and far-right extremism. Musk will use his position to gut government-backed programs while fast-tracking his extremist agenda. As Trump’s handpicked “efficiency czar,” he’d have the power to strip regulations that get in the way of his business empire and funnel even more profits to Trump and their billionaire allies. Let’s be real, Trump is installing Musk to help carry out his ultimate goal to slash government agencies, fire thousands of public servants, and consolidate power for himself and his cronies. Think about it — the richest man on Earth helping the most corrupt president in history will turn our government into their personal ATM. That’s not democracy. That’s a full-blown oligarchy in the making. We can’t let this happen. Thank you for making your voice heard. – Team JanePAC P.S. If you’re tired of Musk’s nonsense, we’ve got good news — he’s not on Bluesky. This is _Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds_ coming to you with a simple request, so please keep reading.
You already know there’s nothing the hacks in the Fake News loves to do more than to discredit our movement.
The truth is that _**Patriots like YOU**_ helped build the MAGA movement from scratch - and for that President Trump & I are eternally grateful.
Seeing how badly the Fake News lied about us in 2024, in this New Year, nothing is more important than protecting the good name of our **MAGA Movement**.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Pete Hegseth is in El Paso, Texas today. Ready to fight back?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Amidst the nearly overwhelming blizzard of bizarre behavior from Trump and
his team, I want to call your attention to what he is trying to do to
immigrants and communities along the border.

Today Trump’s Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is in El Paso, the defining
city of the Texas-Mexico border, to intensify the propaganda push that
aims to sell America mass deportations, militarization of border
communities, removal of protected status for migrants who are legally
present in the U.S. and the end-run cancellation of the Constitution’s
14th Amendment granting U.S. citizenship to everyone born in this country.

This, despite the fact that migration numbers are at a four-year low; that
the only solution that will provide controlled borders and lawful,
predictable migration is a re-writing of our immigration laws; and that
these theatrics will unnecessarily hurt American families, our economy and
the rule of law.

Not to be outdone, and always with his political finger in the wind, Texas
Governor Greg Abbott expanded Texas National Guard deployments to the
border, adding more taxpayer dollars to the $11 billion he has already
spent.

Instead of meekly accepting this unconstitutional farce, I suggest we
fight back.

Fight back by making sure that the people who are being harmed have the
help and the resources to protect themselves, to stand up for the rule of
law, and to stop these abuses by the Trump and Abbott administrations.

Fight back by making sure that candidates who challenge the MAGA
stranglehold on political power in Texas can win because they have the
voters, the message and the turnout machine at their back.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250203.Hmvo5q&refcode=ema20250203-239966&t=1001&akid=239966%2E444211%2Exo7ABK ]Join me in fighting back by making a donation today to Las Americas —
which provides free, high-quality deportation defense and legal support
for immigrants.

Keep up the fight,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=239966%2E444211%2Exo7ABK

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Share your thoughts on key issues
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l8lhbzv58ykc3jkges0lts5l0oci4q6ba6tdbd0vupm3t5o9pxpcl60ae9qolgqzlnwgrs3cl5eaf6dg5h&__stmp=sr4ryd&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6da03wl533q8rl1wl933dr9rlhk2dfo8az1xut958u8dzriteatwhx2lvc59pnkxm2cx09ks6oc3zt84zzrikgi8ow3snjlbwjl3efbkxy946b41qgfcz994ib1i0yjo1nyrmsx23l5f6fpsdbf9j&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6da03wl533q8rl1wl933dr9s05x58146vqkek6ruhaxpum77cqb81dys1iap2ew0nkzzomti1rpjkfngusx0gtuu3909mgk0wgbkza7l7kb5b01cxicg9i8d6pl5k3chxzi4z91b3g7uin2w2ztb7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr4ryd&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d7129db046234243ad05b18a4d204651&_e=nJdcp9XK42Ra_xn61ihO1Eula_X3x5-e7QFLjH19BWACMGujvuigdgT5mZn2pMMdxbuCqnWFLdm86O_x_SXDrh_UHNSr8TjETfk8AWMA3LsdchPloZq7zo0u1m8DKrKJ4Tf4TsRkXfl5rhkU9j0jt9PX6FLK3iTER4gfQDnmzTTz5HadWMUvsW7Z6pjeFrwIRTDQQ-uuwiJx4AG_w07gg8FxL3sU_fZxlGcNE6-mPYrCUl5hBH3AVqXMFA8qo3vkui5wgnaQcF7IYrcvgcPZlkuFKNfuPy3atlpBRnoy_SzZ1ZhluuQMCULBELBjJffFa1nfIUWZxUiTFZWCw0Df-yJKGatvV5QrTpB2oTnDVpK6v0naKI_zzxnKjiJJFIwr_vXaIUCdYZXhxYI09M-e_w%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d7129db046234243ad05b18a4d204651&_e=nJdcp9XK42Ra_xn61ihO1Eula_X3x5-e7QFLjH19BWACMGujvuigdgT5mZn2pMMdxbuCqnWFLdm86O_x_SXDrh_UHNSr8TjETfk8AWMA3LsdchPloZq7zo0u1m8DKrKJ4Tf4TsRkXfl5rhkU9j0jt9PX6FLK3iTER4gfQDnmzTTz5HadWMUvsW7Z6pjeFrwIRTDQQ-uuwiJx4AG_w07gg8FxL3sU_fZxlGcNE6-mPYqwxDxJVQesJNq9gosdqgALCDtx-ln981kSNFuABS8L4K3Q-ojIyLg1yYhRhTyijT3SODof2E8jKYBK2LYs2fqvuMH35CwpDljB8HXK_TCB3hnIyh-K1dPcBXNsQN2qeCJQNLpwiCJWudu_Kx4r97Aj4wb4eo6rGJIbiG75_fdE2A%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. name: Veronica Escobar
subject: 8 Things You Can Do to Resist MAGA Madness
body:
https://veronicaescobar.com/ [https://veronicaescobar.com/]
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/Veronica%E2%80%99s%20Updates%283%29.png]
Friend,
Many of you have reached out to share your feelings of frustration, anger and helplessness. From the firing of U.S. Attorneys who did their job to prosecute some of the most violent January 6th insurrectionists, to the attempt to freeze critical federal funding to communities, to blaming diversity for a tragic airline crash resulting in dozens of deaths, and far too much to mention without feeling exhausted. I get it. After having spent 7 months in my own community and traveling to several battleground states campaigning for Democrats last year, I did everything I possibly could -- as many of you did -- to prevent what we’re living through today.
As we live with the consequences of an election resulting in MAGA Republicans having full control, with the House, Senate and White House, I want you to know some of what I’m focused on.
1) Sounding the alarm so that the American people know how Trump’s plans will harm our nation, our economy and the lives of Americans who aren't billionaires;
2) Working to stop as much of the Trump-Musk agenda as possible; especially the deep cuts to federal programs that hurt hard-working Americans and devastate our economy. There are efforts in the House [https://www.axios.com/2025/02/03/hakeem-jeffries-house-democrats-donald-trump] and Senate [https://www.reuters.com/world/us/democratic-senator-block-trump-nominees-over-us-aid-agency-shutdown-2025-02-03/] with more to come; and
3) Working to ensure Democrats win the next election - Congressional primaries are 11 months away! We must hang on to every Democratic seat (mine included) and we need to elect at least three more Democrats in the House to reclaim our majority and have the leverage we need to stop more of this awfulness.
There’s much more I’m working on and will keep you posted along the way.
What can you do?
Thank you for asking! That means you understand you have a role to play, you refuse to give up and give in, and you’re ready to keep up the hard work saving our country and our democracy.
Before I give you my to-do list, let me first say this. The most important thing you can do is take care of your spirit. Please don’t obsess about every Trump move. It will exhaust you and that’s exactly what he wants. But also, don’t stop being engaged. In other words, don’t burn out but also don’t tune out. Find that balance that preserves you and what’s important to you, but do what you can to pitch in.
We need a much stronger grassroots movement that works from the ground up. And there are many ways to do this, from the easiest to the most involved, here you go:
1) Amplify our messaging - repost and share our social media posts and help us ensure everyone knows how harmful what Trump is doing is. Social media is filled with disinformation – help us spread accurate information.
2) Call your Senators and members of Congress who are part of the Trump-Musk effort to cut programs, reward billionaires, undermine the federal government and harm allies. I know it's frustrating to call politicians who you feel won't listen to you, but believe me, they are hearing from their constituents who agree with this destructive agenda. Make sure they hear from you, too.
3) Help raise money for Congressional Democrats so we can flip the House – from writing a check to organizing a group of your friends, you can give as little as you like or as much as you like – and monthly contributions are easy and so helpful.
4) Educate your family, friends and neighbors . Host house parties to strategize with like-minded individuals so you can help register voters and get out the vote in the next election. If you live in my district, invite me! I’d love to join you when I can. If you need ideas about how to do this, ask us, we’re ready to help.
5) Write letters to the editor. Don’t surrender any space. Use every opportunity to push back. Make your voice heard!
6) Work with like-minded individuals on a plan to help get out the vote in the next election. In other words, don’t agonize - organize!
7) Join our next volunteer meeting in El Paso in March to learn how you can help locally. Hit reply to RSVP and my team will share the details with you!
8) Call the White House! Let the President know how you feel!
Phone number: (202) 456-1111
This is one of the most difficult times in American history. Truly – we are living through an effort to unwind protections for the vulnerable, our environment, our health, our future in a way we’ve never seen before in our lifetimes.
Misinformation is thriving on social media and we have a President and an administration spreading and thriving on the lies. This is an attack on our country literally from within. We cannot afford to sit this out.
I’m not giving up, giving in or willing to look the other way. I care about my country, my community and my loved ones too much to ever do that.
I hope you’ll join me!
Warmly,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/%40mx_500%40my_300.jpg]
https://www.facebook.com/veronicaescobartx [https://www.facebook.com/veronicaescobartx] https://twitter.com/vgescobar [https://twitter.com/vgescobar] https://instagram.com/veronicaescobartx [https://instagram.com/veronicaescobartx]

Veronica Escobar for Congress
P. O. Box 3961
El Paso, TX 79923
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/eaGgxqxLfEqdtb8Wp4hmVA2?unsubscribedata=YD4eStne6Ooln8jRtevNyMJmTriPWR8PZjbZls1jN0JMadx1uujY8DKImt3UUQbrEjV263PskJbNsMDTA0e5uqDhD5Li5l33EKimbwXlZs%2BarHz3Mltlu6Bs83BNTZDVyogxzRyykSZoHsnD6V%2F9c9p5cLOmdBDINBf0BWYfGlFhktJSAeFvl3l2RWZrGukh8iDZuMeDbpdlCXh196RWjk%2BZzs302X2l8tYk7VKiMuQvXvrswiHjNTmJbcqovf9lH4zBYInsaRO7mAZdaRLHJCH6ayFWXmdP6jrPMfKRMktY%2BZEND%2ByIImxBb1TGShXzrnAxLkgU7CsdgrHYjL4NrhLAoSJnTaUqSvbuUrNz%2BAhxXhPNbT9GbHXiMbnA7csr2JNvsJXFX%2BkP5MO2ynh1uq4OHbjCS2NmD5cfFDW5Kkojcg2QMba%2F%2BBIaB%2B82QngP .

Box 3961 El Paso, TX 79923 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The latest on Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
To say the least, this is an extraordinarily dangerous situation.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2482%2E4032634%2EsqwKaz)
---
The Trump administration has allowed Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire — along with an unknown number of his unqualified flunkies — to access critical federal payment systems and illegally shut down government funding for certain departments and programs. The system that he is now controlling is the same system that Americans rely on to receive Social Security payments, Medicare support, federal salaries, government contracts, grants, and tax refunds this filing season. What happens now? Maybe you get paid, maybe you don’t. It all depends on what Elon Musk thinks. He can now turn on funding for his friends and turn off funding for anybody that he doesn’t like. And as long as Musk has this access, he can retrieve people’s sensitive personal information. Social security numbers. Bank account numbers. Tax returns. Musk now has the power to extract that information for his own use, to boost his finances or strengthen his political power. To say the least, this is an extraordinarily dangerous situation. I’m working to get specific answers from Donald Trump’s new Treasury Secretary on why Musk was given access to this information. And I’ve called on the Secretary to lay out what safeguards are in place to protect the privacy and economic security of the American people. **On Twitter (or “X,” as Musk wants us to call it), I made the point that no one elected Musk. His handpicked Twitter CEO wasn’t happy to hear that. She wrote back to me:** | [
](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2921?t=8&akid=2482%2E4032634%2EsqwKaz)
---
**Actually, no. I can’t believe I have to say this, but over 77 million people did not vote for Elon Musk.**
Over 77 million people voted for Trump.
Over 75 million people voted for Kamala Harris.
Elon Musk was not on the ballot.
Elon Musk did not win a single electoral vote.
Elon Musk did not win an election.
Elon Musk has not been confirmed by the U.S. Senate to a position in the administration.
And the Constitution doesn’t give him any power to cut off funding that Congress approved.
He’s in this position because he spent more than $290 million on the 2024 elections — and that bought him an opportunity to be “co-president” with Trump.
**This situation is alarming. When unelected billionaires start ransacking our government offices, we cannot act business as usual. We are living a nightmare created by Trump and Musk, and we need to wake up and do something.**
**I’ll keep ringing every alarm bell I can find and continue doing everything in my power to get this under control.**
[**With your support, I will continue to push back against any billionaire who tries to take over our government and attempt to line their pockets with taxpayer money while shutting off funding that our seniors, our kids, and working people all over America rely on. If you’re able, please chip in any amount to help fight back.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2921?t=9&akid=2482%2E4032634%2EsqwKaz)

name: DNC HQ
subject: Trump’s first two weeks…
body:
---
Derek, in the two weeks since Trump took office, here’s what he’s done so far: Attempted to end birthright citizenship unconstitutionally... [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250203_2697_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2697_22930333_LIpLXL&akid=2697%2E22930333%2ELIpLXL) Rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs... [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250203_2697_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2697_22930333_LIpLXL&akid=2697%2E22930333%2ELIpLXL) Withdrew from the Paris Climate Accords... [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250203_2697_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2697_22930333_LIpLXL&akid=2697%2E22930333%2ELIpLXL) Overturned the Equal Employment Opportunity order... [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250203_2697_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2697_22930333_LIpLXL&akid=2697%2E22930333%2ELIpLXL) Pardoned more than 1,500 January 6 insurrectionists, including those who committed acts of violence... [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250203_2697_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2697_22930333_LIpLXL&akid=2697%2E22930333%2ELIpLXL) ...and those were just the _first two weeks._ From attempting to freeze funding for essential programs to normalizing political violence, **it has never been more clear how dangerous Trump is for this country.** It’s going to take every resource at our disposal to protect our freedoms and democracy, while simultaneously working to elect Democrats at all levels who can check Trump’s power in their cities, states, and districts. That starts right here, right now, with this team. It's as simple as this, Peter.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

### Bible Prophecy Unfolding Before Our Eyes!
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)

| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)

Bible prophecy warns of a time of mass disappearances, planes falling from the sky, and sudden destruction--leading into the seven-year tribulation and the great tribulation. What will happen to America, the collapse of the dollar looms, and wars and rumors of wars escalate, could we be nearing the final battle--Armageddon?

BEAT BACK the Democratic establishment at the DNC.

On Saturday, we helped elect Ken Martin as the new Chair of the DNC,
defeating an establishment candidate backed by Nancy Pelosi, Hakeem
Jeffries, and Chuck Schumer, and bankrolled by the billionaire class and
‘liberal’ dark money groups.

This is a grassroots triumph — but we’re just getting started. This is a
foothold of power for the grassroots to press for real change. Democrats
can’t be a Party dependent on billionaires and corporate PACs. It needs to
be a True Opposition Party that can take on Trump’s Oligarchy and win
elections for working people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21423?t=1060&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ][IMG]

Our Revolution’s DNC pressure campaign of calls to all 448 DNC voting
members and massive Citizen Action Team protest at the DNC led to this
major shift in Party leadership. We worked hard for this, and now we have
a real chance to fight for change.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]We are the only grassroots political group doing this work. Can you chip
in now to help our Citizen Action Team keep up the pressure? We need a
real opposition to stop Trump 2.0 and a new direction for the Democratic
Party and our country.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

We also organized to elect Jane Kleeb — an Our Revolution founding board
member and climate activist — as the next president of the Association of
State Democratic Chairs (ASDC) and Vice Chair of the Party.

Now, we finally have true insurgents at the top of the Party who can hold
Democrats accountable to working people, not billionaires and corporate
consultants.

This is a huge victory that will help us pursue our four major reforms in
the Party:

1. Ban Dark Money in Primaries & Reject Corporate Money
2. Invest in State Parties & Uplift Grassroots Organizing
3. Make the DNC Budget Transparent & Hold Consultants Accountable
4. Commit to a Working Class Platform & Small Donor Democracy

Since Bernie’s first presidential run in 2016, grassroots activists have
demanded a party that fights unapologetically for working people — and
with this leadership shift, the base has made its voice heard.

This is the first big step forward in 2025. Now, we need to get going and
push the Party to implement our reforms AND step up to be the opposition
we need to stop Trump’s Authoritarian Capitalism. Our Citizen Action Team
of 30,000 activists (and counting) are ready — but we will need resources
to carry out this urgent work.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21422?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250203nd&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]If you can, help us take this project to the next level by chipping in a
donation today. We’ve shown we can fight back against Trump and the
billionaire class — now we have to go further.

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7638%2E5885482%2EXxYR91 ]Website |

group in America.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: My pledge to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
While I’ve technically been in office for three weeks, it didn’t feel right until we came together as a Delaware family to formalize it.
#
While I’ve technically been in office for three weeks, it didn’t feel right until we came together as a Delaware family to formalize the privilege that I have to represent the greatest state in the House of Representatives.
That’s why last week I was honored to be sworn in at an honorary ceremony right here in Delaware, at the Old Town Hall in Wilmington:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250203-1?refcode=em20250203-1733&amount=5&refcode2=1733_21716_-M__l1&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)
I’m entering Congress at a moment of great uncertainty and fear for so many in our country.
While it’s understandable that many are feeling overwhelmed by our politics, it’s important that we confront our challenges **head on** and face up to the circumstances that gave rise to the current state of our politics.
There’s a lot of very real pain that exists across this country right now, in red areas and blue areas alike. That’s why I’m committed to fighting for _all_ of Delaware, and to working with anyone who is willing to work with me to help our neighbors.
Because here in Delaware, we know you cannot have a diverse democracy if we lose our capacity to have conversations across difference and disagreement, if dissent is disallowed, if we stop seeing one another as people.
And while I know people are scared and angry, we must remember that democracy is not easy. Changemaking is not easy.
But it _is_ possible if at the national level, we seek to replicate what is so special about Delaware: that by being close to one another we can find compassion for one another.
That is my pledge to you. To stand up to abuse of power, but to resist the urge to move away from those who think differently than we do. To see everyone’s pain, to foster a politics of grace, not of grievance, and in the words of Scripture, to be the “repairers of the breach.”
[**If you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in $5 or any amount you can to support my campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250203-1?refcode=em20250203-1733&amount=5&refcode2=1733_21716_-M__l1&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250203-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250203-1733&refcode2=1733_21716_-M__l1&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250203-1&t=1&refcode2=1733_21716_-M__l1&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1733%2E21716%2E-M__l1)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware
